100.text: After an uncomfortable silence, the sentient compliments your clothing with even more effusive praise. They offer you some pointers on how to give better compliments. Gain ability [b]Item 1480[/b], 1 boost, and 1 random skill.

101.text: If you have flora or food, let the animal nibble on part of it, then gain animal [b]Item 853[/b]. If not, you smile as the animal nuzzles against your hand (gain 1 morale).

1010.text: The circuit sentients, who have been watching you ever since you obtained one of their levitating cubes, are in awe that you have retained your sanity despite untethering from the planet. They reassure you in a completely unreassuring way that they have no intentions to spread their influence throughout the galaxy. Replace this with a partial spaceship ([b]Item 1434[/b]) and gain destiny [b]Item 1606[/b] (place it in the center); if you have any circuit cards in your grid, gain 3 boost on vehicle [b]Item 1434[/b].

102.action: [0b955e]CRAFT[-] a simple gold item from a loose intaglio on the chest
102.text: As you remove the golden decoration from the treasure chest, you realize that what’s inside the chest could be far more valuable than the simple trinket you intended to craft. You may either continue with the [fff349]take-[b]DISMANTLE[/b][-] action with a cost reduced by 3 or use the gold to craft a simple zamazingo (gain item [b]Item 1099[/b]).

choices.outcome: The sentient is overjoyed to see you planting the seeds. They ask you to travel with them through the time portal to the north and find the future version of this location. If you accept, lose item [b]Item 1020[/b] to gain sentient [b]Item 1364[/b] and quest [b]Item 1699[/b] (add the quest horizontally to your supply). Otherwise, gain 1 boost on the sea seed card.

choices.option: If you are not on location 740 (you may only choose this option once per game)
choices.outcome: You notice a small piece of paper among the seeds that guides you through a secret passage. If you ignore the instructions, now or any time in the game you may choose a location to plant this seed (the card remains in your grid until it is full). If you follow the instructions, perform a [a84fc0]look-◆4-[b]NAVIGATE[/b][-] action to go to [b]Location 746[/b]; the grove is just west of there.

1023.text: Replace this with a flying pirate ship ([b]Item 1017[/b]).

103.text: You’re impressed that such diminutive creatures were able to construct such a home, but it could still use a makeover. After making some structural improvements, you hear the animals chirp appreciatively. Gain animal [b]Item 845[/b].

1032.text: Refresh X challenge dice in your grid (you may not refresh dice placed during this action). Then, if there are no challenge dice in your grid, gain 1 health.

104.action: [0b955e]CRAFT[-] an item from the small tree
104.text: As you reach for a branch, the animal vanishes into thin air. You have a few seconds to study the details of your current location before there’s a flurry of movement in the grove, then the trap door slams shut. Go to [b]Location 511[/b] and continue.

1040.text: Replace this with a winter coat ([b]Item 929[/b]).

105.text: If you have flora or food, let the animal nibble on part of it, then gain animal [b]Item 803[/b]. If not, the animal presents you with a warm, squirming grub from the roots (gain 1 health).

1057.action: [0b955e]RELAX[-] in the shade of the maw
1057.text: Refresh X challenge dice in your grid (you may not refresh dice placed during this action). Then, if there are no challenge dice in your grid, gain 1 health.

106.action: [0b955e]BUILD[-] an agricultural establishment in the grove
106.text: You sketch out a few ideas of what you might make. Gain blueprint [b]Item 1296[/b].

1066.text: Crafting this vehicle also requires you to attach it to a giant turtle-like animal. Gain vehicle [b]Item 1013[/b] with 1 boost on it.

107.text: A pulse of light ripples outwards from the center seam of the runecaster. Each player gains 1 skill matching the rune. You also gain 1 morale.

1074.action: [0b955e]CRAFT[-] an energy key from the flower

1077.action: [0b955e]CRAFT[-] a blinding grenade from the tree

108.text: It’s clear to you that this is a sacred place—not to mention one that is probably well-guarded. You bow deeply toward the shield and step away. As you do, a mushroom rolls toward your feet as if of its own accord. Gain flora [b]Item 1082[/b] and 1 morale.

109.text: The sentient seems incredibly uncomfortable that you would offer them your support, but they eventually consent to you accompanying them on their journey south. They insist upon paying you. Gain $3, then you may gain sentient [b]Item 1350[/b]; if you do, go south to [b]Location 104[/b].

110.action: [0b955e]CREATE[-] a truly exceptional flower arrangement for the judges that delights from every angle (only if you have been welcomed as a participant in this trial; otherwise choose another action)
110.text: Find card [b]Item 1135[/b], place it on the table, and begin. You must arrange 4 different types of flowers (four stalks of each type) into a grid. All stalks of each type of flower are the same height (1–4). Proceed to fill the grid with up to four stacked tokens per square so that (a) there is only one of each stack height (1–4) in every row and column and (b) specific rows and columns have an exact number of visible flowers when viewed from straight-on angles as indicated by the numbers adjacent to them around the edges (e.g., when looking at the bottom row from the 2 position, only 2 flowers may be visible). Keep in mind taller flowers completely block any shorter flowers behind them. When you are ready to present your flower arrangement, declare the heights of the green squares from left to right. See entry [b]Location 110[/b] in the Book of Secrets for the solution.

111.action: [0b955e]CRAFT[-] a simple glass item from the broken orb
111.text: You craft a simple but charming glass trinket. Gain item [b]Item 1091[/b].

112.text: If you have flora or food, let the animal nibble on part of it, then gain animal [b]Item 851[/b]. If not, you gain some emotional support as the animal begs for attention by rolling around in the stream (gain 1 morale).

1122.text: Your cats purr louder and louder as you heap them with praise, chin scratches, and head rubs. Gain 2 boost; you may continue.

113.action: [0b955e]BREW[-] a mild tincture from the lotus roots
113.text: You grind the roots into a pulp with makeshift equivalents of a mortar and pestle—plus a hearty wad of saliva—resulting in a sparkling substance. Gain item [b]Item 867[/b].

115.text: The cartographers inside the keep are fascinated that you come from the stars, and they have dozens of questions about their star charts. In exchange for your help, they give you an elixir. Gain item [b]Item 864[/b].

1152.text: Gain X boost on this card.

116.text: The ancient bridge is falling apart—it’s a hazard for any visitor. Using local wood and stone, you patch it up to the best of your ability, much to the gratitude of local leaf sentients. They give you a book in appreciation. Gain item [b]Item 1192[/b] and either go west to [b]Location 115[/b] or continue.

117.text: As you describe your vantage, the group feels a sense of camaraderie. Each player may gain 1 random skill. If the random skill you gain matches that of any other player, you gain 1 morale. If not, gain destiny [b]Item 1599[/b] (place it in the center). You may continue with the [fff349]take-[b]EXTRACT[/b][-] action.

118.text: If you have flora or food, let the animal nibble on part of it, then gain animal [b]Item 804[/b]. If not, the animal signals to you that there is darkness to the west and beauty to the north (gain 2 boost).

119.text: It only takes a few petals for you to create a pleasant novelty. Gain item [b]Item 1096[/b].

012.text: Numerous trips to the surface for air are necessary as you reassemble the broken ship. The job would have been even more difficult were it not for the sturdy construction and water-resistant wood. Eventually the ship rises from the depths with you at its helm. Gain vehicle [b]Item 1015[/b] and float to the ocean surface with it. Gain 1 random skill and go to the ocean location matching that skill: [2694d0]move[-]/[a84fc0]look[-]/[fd8c46]engage[-] ([b]Location 058[/b]); [0b955e]help[-]/[fff349]take[-] ([b]Location 056[/b]); [ec1c3b]overpower[-] ([b]Location 054[/b]).

120.action: [0b955e]CRAFT[-] a simple item from the salt-soaked wood on the dock
120.text: You contemplatively whittle away. Gain item [b]Item 1094[/b].

121.text: In appreciation of your unsolicited effort, the owner gives you a big hug and a few coins. Gain $2 and 1 morale.

122.text: You clean out the device and get it working again. You send a quick signal burst that your homeworld should recognize if anyone’s listening. Your rescuers will need to triangulate the signal to find you, but this is a good start. Gain destiny [b]Item 1598[/b] if you do not already have it. Either way, add 1 signal token to that destiny.

123.text: As advanced as the technology is, you identify a few key areas of the interstellar communication device that could be improved. As you tinker, some curious engineers observe and take notes. They express their appreciation by presenting you with a beautiful bouquet of flowers. Gain flora [b]Item 1074[/b].

1233.text: Gain X boost on this card.

1234.text: Gain X boost on this card.

1235.text: Gain X boost on this card.

124.action: [0b955e]PRAISE[-] the guard for the impressive security system
124.text: The guard puffs out their chest and launches into a detailed explanation that you could now exploit, if you were inclined to hack your way into the building. Gain 1 boost and [fff349]3 take[-]; you may continue.

125.action: [0b955e]HONOR[-] the entrance by offering a cultural exchange
125.text: The sentients are amazed to see an alien like you in their midst. They admire your augsuit and present you with a precious artifact. As you try to use it, though, it doesn’t work. If you pay 3 boost, you activate the scepter (gain item [b]Item 998[/b] and perform no other location actions here). If not, the mystery of the artifact remains unsolved, and it vanishes from your grasp; gain 1 boost.

126.action: [0b955e]CRAFT[-] a simple gold item from a loose intaglio on the chest
126.text: As you remove the golden decoration from the treasure chest, you realize that what’s inside the chest could be far more valuable than the simple trinket you intended to craft. You may either continue with the [fff349]take-[b]DISMANTLE[/b][-] action with a cost reduced by 3 or use the gold to craft a simple zamazingo (gain item [b]Item 1099[/b]).

1265.action: [0b955e]HEAL[-] yourself (if you already have 5 or 6 health, perform another action)
1265.text: You tend to your wounds in the safety of home. Gain 2 health.

1266.text: If there is 1 boost on this structure, gain item [b]Item 1217[/b]. If 2 boost, gain item [b]Item 1224[/b]. If 3 boost, gain item [b]Item 1136[/b]. All boost remain on this structure. Alternatively, you may create a living space within these walls; if so, this structure counts as a shelter for all relevant goals.

1267.text: If there is 1 boost on this structure, gain item [b]Item 974[/b]. If 2 boost, gain item [b]Item 946[/b]. If 3 boost, gain item [b]Item 922[/b]. All boost remain on this structure. Alternatively, you may create a living space within these walls; if so, this structure counts as a shelter for all relevant goals.

1268.text: If there is 1 boost on this structure, gain item [b]Item 868[/b]. If 2 boost, gain item [b]Item 869[/b]. If 3 boost, gain item [b]Item 865[/b]. All boost remain on this structure. Alternatively, you may create a living space within these walls; if so, this structure counts as a shelter for all relevant goals.

1269.text: If there is 1 boost on this structure, gain item [b]Item 1413[/b]. If 2 boost, gain item [b]Item 1231[/b]. If 3 boost, gain item [b]Item 962[/b]. All boost remain on this structure. Alternatively, you may create a living space within these walls; if so, this structure counts as a shelter for all relevant goals.

127.text: Following the Traveler’s lead, you center yourself among the lorestones and bend the knee. Even without runes, their power runs into you. Gain all 6 skills (1 of each).

1270.text: If there is 1 boost on this structure, gain item [b]Item 1154[/b]. If 2 boost, gain item [b]Item 1259[/b]. If 3 boost, gain item [b]Item 1262[/b]. All boost remain on this structure. Alternatively, you may create a living space within these walls; if so, this structure counts as a shelter for all relevant goals.

1271.action: [0b955e]PRAISE[-] a sentient for their gaming skills
1271.text: The confident sentient nods at the praise and flicks a tip in your direction. Gain $2. Alternatively, you may create a living space within these walls; if so, this structure counts as a shelter for all relevant goals.

1272.text: If there is 1 boost on this structure, gain item [b]Item 858[/b]. If 2 boost, gain item [b]Item 1158[/b]. If 3 boost, gain item [b]Item 856[/b]. All boost remain on this structure. Alternatively, you may create a living space within these walls; if so, this structure counts as a shelter for all relevant goals.

1273.text: If there is 1 boost on this structure, gain item [b]Item 1102[/b]. If 2 boost, gain item [b]Item 1417[/b]. If 3 boost, gain item [b]Item 1189[/b]. All boost remain on this structure. Alternatively, you may create a living space within these walls; if so, this structure counts as a shelter for all relevant goals.

1274.action: [0b955e]NURTURE[-] relations between the representatives of several sentient cultures (you may pay 1 boost from this structure to reduce this cost to 1)
1274.text: In an effort to improve diplomatic relations, you host a gathering of several different cultures. Stone, wind, and energy sentients join the summit. The result is a highly constructive conversation about a new competitive sports competition that could bring sentients worldwide together, setting aside old grudges in place of friendlier, low-stakes rivalries. One of the sentients lingers after the discussion is over. Gain wind sentient [b]Item 1306[/b], energy sentient [b]Item 1326[/b], or stone sentient [b]Item 1347[/b].

1275.action: [0b955e]WISH[-] for love (pay 1 boost from this structure; perform this action at most once per game)

1276.action: [0b955e]SPONSOR[-] an actor to join theater (pay $1 or 1 boost)
1276.text: Gain 1 boost on this structure. Alternatively, you may create a living space within these walls; if so, this structure counts as a shelter for all relevant goals.

1277.action: [0b955e]CREATE[-] a special beverage to enhance the menu
1277.text: Gain 1 boost on this structure. Alternatively, you may create a living space within these walls; if so, this structure counts as a shelter for all relevant goals.

1278.text: If there is 1 boost on this structure, gain item [b]Item 928[/b]. If 2 boost, gain item [b]Item 955[/b]. If 3 boost, gain item [b]Item 936[/b]. All boost remain on this structure. Alternatively, you may create a living space within these walls; if so, this structure counts as a shelter for all relevant goals.

1279.action: [0b955e]RESCUE[-] an animal to care for in the stables
1279.text: If there is 1 boost on this structure, gain animal [b]Item 817[/b]. If 2 boost, gain animal [b]Item 821[/b]. If 3 boost, gain animal [b]Item 846[/b]. All boost remain on this structure. Alternatively, you may create a living space within these walls; if so, this structure counts as a shelter for all relevant goals.

128.action: [0b955e]HONOR[-] the sentient by offering a cultural exchange
128.text: The sentient doesn’t seem all that impressed by you, but they give you an opportunity to earn their respect — and perhaps the blade they wield — by solving the mystery of the artifact. Gain 1 boost and continue with the [a84fc0]look-[b]SOLVE[/b][-] action.

1280.action: [0b955e]TEACH[-] an important lesson to the students
1280.text: Gain 1 boost on this structure. Alternatively, you may create a living space within these walls; if so, this structure counts as a shelter for all relevant goals.

1281.text: The tower allows you to communicate at great distances, making it easy for you to learn news from around the world. People pay well for the connection. Gain $X (X is the number of boost on this structure).

1282.text: If there is 1 boost on this structure, Gain vehicle [b]Item 1014[/b] and $4. If 2 boost, gain vehicle [b]Item 1022[/b]. If 3 boost, gain vehicle [b]Item 1010[/b]. All boost remain on this structure.

1283.action: [0b955e]HEAL[-] yourself (if you already have 5 or 6 health, perform another action)
1283.text: You tend to your wounds in the safety of home. Gain 2 health.

1284.text: If there is 1 boost on this structure, gain item [b]Item 1094[/b]. If 2 boost, gain item [b]Item 1093[/b]. If 3 boost, gain item [b]Item 1100[/b]. All boost remain on this structure. Alternatively, you may create a living space within these walls; if so, this structure counts as a shelter for all relevant goals.

1285.text: If there is 1 boost on this structure, gain item [b]Item 1155[/b]. If 2 boost, gain item [b]Item 978[/b]. If 3 boost, gain item [b]Item 977[/b]. All boost remain on this structure. Alternatively, you may create a living space within these walls; if so, this structure counts as a shelter for all relevant goals.

1286.text: Instead of using the tower to hunt, you use it to help nearby animals. If there is 1 boost on this structure, gain animal [b]Item 804[/b]. If 2 boost, gain animal [b]Item 828[/b]. If 3 boost, gain animal [b]Item 836[/b]. All boost remain on this structure. Alternatively, you may create a living space within these walls; if so, this structure counts as a shelter for all relevant goals.

1287.action: [0b955e]REFINE[-] a crystal (select a different action if you don’t have a crystal card)
1287.text: Gain the result of a [0b955e]REFINE[-] action on a crystal in your grid. Alternatively, you may create a living space within these walls; if so, this structure counts as a shelter for all relevant goals.

1288.action: [0b955e]NURTURE[-] the growth of dangerous flora in the garden
1288.text: If there is 1 boost on this structure, gain flora [b]Item 1054[/b]. If 2 boost, gain flora [b]Item 1055[/b]. If 3 boost, gain flora [b]Item 1058[/b]. The flora gained in this way are tucked under the structure, not in your grid—you cannot use this flora. All boost remain on this structure. Alternatively, you may create a living space within these walls; if so, this structure counts as a shelter for all relevant goals.

1289.action: [0b955e]HEAL[-] yourself (if you already have 5 or 6 health, perform another action)
1289.text: You tend to your wounds in the safety of home. Gain 2 health.

129.action: [0b955e]HONOR[-] the ancient script on the spire
129.text: As if the runes recognize your restraint and respect, you feel a purifying wave wash over you. Lose 1 curse and gain 1 morale.

1290.action: [0b955e]HEAL[-] yourself (if you already have 5 or 6 health, perform another action)
1290.text: You tend to your wounds in the safety of home. Gain 2 health.

1291.action: [0b955e]NURTURE[-] the growth of rare flora in the greenhouse
1291.text: If there is 1 boost on this structure, gain flora [b]Item 1066[/b]. If 2 boost, gain flora [b]Item 1057[/b]. If 3 boost, gain flora [b]Item 1081[/b]. The flora gained in this way are tucked under the structure, not in your grid—you cannot use this flora. All boost remain on this structure. Alternatively, you may create a living space within these walls; if so, this structure counts as a shelter for all relevant goals.

1292.text: Gain [ec1c3b]overpower[-] equal to the number of boost on this structure, then place 1 boost on this structure. If you gained [ec1c3b]3 overpower[-] this turn, you may not perform this action again. Alternatively, you may create a living space within these walls; if so, this structure counts as a shelter for all relevant goals.

1293.action: [0b955e]TEACH[-] a special ability to your students
1293.text: As you teach, you better understand the ability. Add 1 boost to an ability card or gain 1 boost on your character. Alternatively, you may create a living space within these walls; if so, this structure counts as a shelter for all relevant goals.

013.text: You curl up in the bedroll within the nook. Refresh X challenge dice in your grid (you may not refresh dice placed during this action). Then, if there are no challenge dice in your grid, gain 1 health and you may continue. Either way, also gain the bedroll ([b]Item 1040[/b]).

130.action: [0b955e]EXPOSE[-] one of the sentients for cheating

choices.outcome: The bigger sentient checks the dice, and you’re correct! Gain ability [b]Item 1499[/b] and $5.
The smaller sentient checks the dice, and you’re wrong. Gain 1 boost.

131.action: [0b955e]OFFER[-] to assist the sentient in their journey
131.text: The occupant of the tent, a circuit sentient, chokes over their words as they try to admit that they need help. They are suffering from a virus that they believe can only be cured by a healing spell that can be learned by studying the green spires to the east, but this far in their journey they’re too weak to move off the ledge. They give you a fire-cooked meal to prepare you for your journey. Gain 1 boost, [a84fc0]1 look[-], and quest [b]Item 1683[/b] (add it horizontally to your supply).

132.text: From your vantage, the sword is trapped in the stone, and it’s up to you to rescue it. Gain item [b]Item 889[/b].

133.text: The green energy seeping through the spires reaches toward you. Seconds later—or perhaps hours—your augsuit is functioning at top capacity. Lose 1 time, and gain 1 morale, 1 health, and 1 boost.

134.text: A pulse of light ripples outwards from the center seam of the runecaster. Each player gains 1 skill matching the rune. You also gain 1 morale.

135.action: [0b955e]HONOR[-] the previous occupants by staying away
135.text: As if the ruins recognize your restraint and respect, you feel a purifying wave wash over you. Lose 1 curse and gain 1 morale.

136.text: As you patch up the masonry around the base of the tower, its occupant thanks you for your help but admits they’re more interested in traveling the world than sitting in this tower all day. They give you their gun and the tower itself. Gain item [b]Item 1153[/b] and structure [b]Item 1286[/b].

137.action: [0b955e]CRAFT[-] a basic item from a bone
137.text: Your mind wanders as you carve away at the ivory, and you’re pleased to create a charming bauble. Gain item [b]Item 1092[/b].

138.action: [0b955e]BREW[-] a mild tincture from the lotus roots
138.text: You grind the roots into a pulp with makeshift equivalents of a mortar and pestle—plus a hearty wad of saliva—resulting in a sparkling substance. Gain item [b]Item 867[/b].

139.text: Practice your ability to leap (gain ability [b]Item 1486[/b]), cleave (gain ability [b]Item 1493[/b]), or scavenge (gain ability [b]Item 1510[/b]). You may continue with the action matching that ability.

140.text: You sketch out a few ideas of what you might make. Gain blueprint [b]Item 1298[/b].

1409.text: Gain X boost on this card.

141.action: [0b955e]CRAFT[-] a basic item from a bone
141.text: Your mind wanders as you carve away at the ivory, and you’re pleased to create a charming bauble. Gain item [b]Item 1092[/b].

1410.text: Gain X boost on this card.

1411.text: Gain X boost on this card.

1412.text: Gain X boost on this card.

1413.text: Gain X boost on this card.

1414.text: Gain X boost on this card.

1415.text: Gain X boost on this card.

1416.text: Gain X boost on this card.

1417.text: Gain X boost on this card.

1418.text: Gain X boost on this card.

142.text: From the ship’s wiring and microchips, you cobble together a universal translator. Gain item [b]Item 891[/b].

143.text: After patching a small portion of the shattered spaceship, you realize just how big of a task you’ve created for yourself. Gain destiny [b]Item 1605[/b] (place it in the center) and 1 boost. You may either stop or continue with a [0b955e]help-◆5-[b]REPAIR[/b][-] action to weld the pieces into something more cohesive yet still nonfunctional (then read the next result only):

choices.outcome: You step back and admire your work. This part of the spaceship is airtight, but the most difficult job remains. For the spaceship to be even semi-operational, you must rewire it and fix the power supply. Gain 1 morale and [0b955e]1 help[-]. You may either stop or continue with a [0b955e]help-◆7-[b]REPAIR[/b][-] action to obtain a partial spaceship (then read the next result):
The lights flicker on, and your heart sings as the ship hovers off the ground. Gain vehicle [b]Item 1434[/b].

1435.action: [0b955e]EQUIP[-] your saber (perform this action at most once per game)
1435.text: The saber feels like a little slice of home in your hands. Gain item [b]Item 1299[/b].

1436.action: [0b955e]EQUIP[-] your binoculars (perform this action at most once per game)
1436.text: The binoculars offer you a fresh perspective of your surroundings. Gain item [b]Item 1300[/b].

1437.action: [0b955e]EQUIP[-] your notebook (perform this action at most once per game)
1437.text: The notebook has always helped you process your thoughts in writing. Gain item [b]Item 1301[/b].

1438.action: [0b955e]EQUIP[-] your first-aid kit (perform this action at most once per game)
1438.text: The first-aid kit contains everything you need to survive on an alien planet. Gain item [b]Item 1302[/b].

1439.action: [0b955e]EQUIP[-] your multi-tool (perform this action at most once per game)
1439.text: The multi-tool has taught you that there is no such thing as a locked door. Gain item [b]Item 1303[/b].

144.text: The sentient is slow to accept your aid, but they acknowledge that their task is bigger than them. The elemental to the northeast is disrupting the balance of nature, and they seek to quell the threat. Gain either item [b]Item 861[/b] or sentient [b]Item 1352[/b].

1440.action: [0b955e]EQUIP[-] your axe (perform this action at most once per game)
1440.text: The axe was among the first of the many weapons you’ve learned how to use. Gain item [b]Item 1304[/b].

1441.text: The saber feels like a little slice of home in your hands. Gain item [b]Item 1299[/b].

145.text: The sentient offers either to heal you or to distribute their healing powers to your friends. Choose one:

choices.outcome: Gain 3 health.
Each other player gains 1 health and you gain 1 morale.

1450.action: [0b955e]EQUIP[-] your first-aid kit (if you’ve already done this, select another action instead)
1450.text: The first-aid kit contains everything you need to survive on an alien planet. Gain item [b]Item 1302[/b].

1451.action: [0b955e]EQUIP[-] your multi-tool (if you’ve already done this, select another action instead)
1451.text: The multi-tool has taught you that there is no such thing as a locked door. Gain item [b]Item 1303[/b].

1452.action: [0b955e]EQUIP[-] your axe (if you’ve already done this, select another action instead)
1452.text: The axe was among the first of the many weapons you’ve learned how to use. Gain item [b]Item 1304[/b].

146.text: The sentient begs you to recover their beloved dustmouse. Gain $1 and quest [b]Item 1627[/b] (add it horizontally to your supply). If you pay 1 boost, also gain sentient [b]Item 1329[/b].

147.text: Refresh X challenge dice in your grid (you may not refresh dice placed during this action). Then, if there are no challenge dice in your grid, gain 1 health, and you may continue.

148.text: As you describe your vantage, the group feels a sense of camaraderie. Each player may gain 1 random skill. If the random skill you gain matches that of any other player, you gain 1 morale. If not, gain destiny [b]Item 1599[/b] (place it in the center).

149.text: You sketch out a few ideas of what you might make. Gain blueprint [b]Item 1297[/b].

150.text: If you have flora or food, let the animal hungrily peck a piece of it from your palm. Gain animal [b]Item 814[/b]. If not, you gain a little warmth thanks to the animal as it flies against you (gain 1 health).

151.text: Refresh X challenge dice in your grid (you may not refresh dice placed during this action). Then, if there are no challenge dice in your grid, gain 1 health, and you may continue.

152.text: It only takes a few petals for you to create a pleasant novelty. Gain item [b]Item 1096[/b].

153.text: It’s clear to you that this is a sacred place—not to mention one that is probably well-guarded. You bow deeply toward the amulet and step away. As you do, the six large birds nearby swoop down and land in your path, returning your bow in unison. One of them plucks a flower and drops it at your feet. Gain flora [b]Item 1078[/b] and 1 morale.

154.text: Refresh X challenge dice in your grid (you may not refresh dice placed during this action). Then, if there are no challenge dice in your grid, gain 1 health and you may continue.

155.text: As you describe your vantage, the group feels a sense of camaraderie. Each player may gain 1 random skill. If the random skill you gain matches that of any other player, you gain 1 morale. If not, gain destiny [b]Item 1599[/b] (place it in the center).

156.action: [0b955e]BUILD[-] an agricultural establishment at the confluence
156.text: You sketch out a few ideas of what you might make in this nutrient-rich soil, and you’re surprised to see the large insect inspecting them as if they can help you. Gain blueprint [b]Item 1296[/b].

157.text: It’s a peaceful, meditative place to let your mind wander while you craft. You’re pleased by how pretty the result is. Gain item [b]Item 1096[/b].

1577.action: [0b955e]HONE[-] your talents for the mission (this action can be performed at most once per game)
1577.text: You work on enhancing skills necessary to complete the mission. Gain [ec1c3b]3 overpower[-].

1578.action: [0b955e]HONE[-] your talents for the mission (this action can be performed at most once per game)
1578.text: You work on enhancing an ability to complete the mission. Gain ability [b]Item 1470[/b].

1579.action: [0b955e]HONE[-] your talents for the mission (this action can be performed at most once per game)
1579.text: You work on enhancing skills necessary to complete the mission. If you have an experience card, add 1 or 2 boost to it. If not, gain [a84fc0]2 look[-].

158.text: The sentient explains that their crash left them too depressed to build anything. Without pushing, you patiently offer to help gather materials, and you soon find yourself building a sand skimmer. The sentient indicates that you can keep it for yourself (gain vehicle [b]Item 1022[/b]) or help them bring it to the next race (gain sentient [b]Item 1340[/b] and quest [b]Item 1628[/b]; add the quest horizontally to your supply).

1580.action: [0b955e]HONE[-] your talents for the mission (this action can be performed at most once per game)
1580.text: You work on enhancing an ability to complete the mission. Gain [ec1c3b]3 overpower[-].

1581.action: [0b955e]HONE[-] your talents for the mission (this action can be performed at most once per game)
1581.text: You work on enhancing an ability to complete the mission. Gain ability [b]Item 1476[/b].

1582.action: [0b955e]HONE[-] your talents for the mission (this action can be performed at most once per game)
1582.text: You work on improving the size of your coin purse so you can hire more sentients: Gain $5.

1583.action: [0b955e]HONE[-] your talents for the mission (this action can be performed at most once per game)
1583.text: You work on enhancing an ability to complete the mission. Gain ability [b]Item 1471[/b].

1584.text: You work on enhancing an ability to complete the mission. Gain ability [b]Item 1500[/b].

1585.text: You work on enhancing an ability to complete the mission. Gain ability [b]Item 1503[/b].

1586.text: You work on enhancing skills necessary to complete the mission. Gain [0b955e]3 help[-].

1587.text: You work on enhancing an ability to complete the mission. Gain ability [b]Item 1479[/b].

1588.action: [0b955e]HONE[-] your talents for the mission (this action can be performed at most once per game)
1588.text: You work on enhancing skills necessary to complete the mission. Gain any 2 skills.

1589.action: [0b955e]HONE[-] your talents for the mission (this action can be performed at most once per game)
1589.text: You work on enhancing an ability to complete the mission. Gain ability [b]Item 1461[/b].

159.text: The sentients appreciate the gesture, explaining that they were born of this volcano, and every day they spend some time trying to keep it alive. They show you how to craft the lava into new creations, and you realize that skill might be quite useful in solving a major problem. Gain item [b]Item 1101[/b] and quest [b]Item 1695[/b] (add the quest horizontally to your supply).

1590.action: [0b955e]HONE[-] your talents for the mission (this action can be performed at most once per game)
1590.text: You work on enhancing an ability to complete the mission. Gain either the wade ability ([b]Item 1489[/b]), to make movement across water easier, or the cut ability ([b]Item 1508[/b]), to remove the signal once you reach the source.

1591.action: [0b955e]HONE[-] your talents for the mission (this action can be performed at most once per game)
1591.text: You work on enhancing an ability to complete the mission. Gain ability [b]Item 1488[/b].

1592.text: You work on enhancing skills necessary to complete the mission. Gain [ec1c3b]3 overpower[-].

1593.text: You work on enhancing skills necessary to complete the mission. Gain [a84fc0]3 look[-].

1597.text: You work on enhancing an ability to complete the mission. Gain ability [b]Item 1482[/b].

016.text: Avoiding the dangerous magma, you reach the sentient and free them from their bonds. They embrace you and promise to repay the favor. Gain sentient [b]Item 1336[/b], then gain a random skill and move to the dungeon location matching that skill: [2694d0]move[-] ([b]Location 596[/b]); [a84fc0]look[-] ([b]Location 019[/b]); [fd8c46]engage[-] ([b]Location 018[/b]); [0b955e]help[-]/[fff349]take[-]/[ec1c3b]overpower[-] ([b]Location 593[/b]).

160.action: [0b955e]CRAFT[-] an item to impress the proprietor
160.text: The head blacksmith is mildly amused by your makeshift creation, and they challenge you to make something more difficult. Gain quest [b]Item 1644[/b] (add it horizontally to your supply).

161.text: They try to push you away, but not before you remove them from the lava. As the lava cools, they angrily explain that they were trying to free their mother—the volcano itself—from its confines, and you’ve significantly set them back. Gain curse [b]Item 1394[/b] and 1 boost; you may continue.

162.action: [0b955e]ASSIST[-] a sentient heading toward the city
162.text: They eagerly accept your assistance, and they chatter nonstop about runecaster design and repairs. Gain 1 morale and go to city [b]Location 525[/b].

163.text: If you have flora or food, let the animal nibble on part of it, then gain animal [b]Item 813[/b]. If not, you gain a little comfort thanks to the animal as it nuzzles against you (gain 1 morale).

164.text: It’s clear to you that this place is sacred. You bow deeply toward the eye and step away. As you do, a sentient emerges from the lava and greets you with a hearty laugh. Gain sentient [b]Item 1319[/b].

165.text: After patching a small portion of the shattered spaceship, you realize just how big of a task you’ve created for yourself. Gain destiny [b]Item 1605[/b] (place it in the center) and 1 boost. You may either stop or continue with a [0b955e]help-◆5-[b]REPAIR[/b][-] action to weld the pieces into something more cohesive yet still nonfunctional (then read the next result only):

choices.outcome: You step back and admire your work. This part of the spaceship is airtight, but the most difficult job remains. For the spaceship to be even semi-operational, you must rewire it and fix the power supply. Gain 1 morale and [0b955e]1 help[-]. You may either stop or continue with a [0b955e]help-◆7-[b]REPAIR[/b][-] action to obtain a partial spaceship (then read the next result):
The lights flicker on, and your heart sings as the ship hovers off the ground. Gain vehicle [b]Item 1434[/b].

choices.option: Clean some of the gold-like fungal growth from the sentient’s exterior
choices.outcome: The gold peels away, but you worry it will return soon. The sentient mentions that a landwalker friend of theirs to the east is developing a cure. Gain 1 morale and 1 boost.

You apply the antidote to the gold-encrusted areas on the sentient, and within minutes they begin to dissolve into the water. The sentient, free of pain for the first time in ages, thanks you profusely and gives you $10. While they don’t think their fellow water sentients will care about their renewed health, they know their leaf friend will. Rotate and add quest [b]Item 1655[/b] to your grid.

166.action: [0b955e]RELAX[-] to the pleasant sound of the wind chimes
166.text: Refresh X challenge dice in your grid (you may not refresh dice placed during this action). Then, if there are no challenge dice in your grid, gain 1 health, and you may continue.

1662.text: Sinew sentients are vegetarian, but with limited ingredients you are able to brew stew your grandmother would be proud of. The sentients greedily slurp the soup, and they all have opinions about what you could do to add more depth to the flavor. One even hands you a recipe book (gain item [b]Item 1223[/b]) and encourages you to keep cooking. Rotate quest [b]Item 1662[/b] and add it to your grid.

1663.text: Choose one, depending on your circumstances:

choices.option: If you’re not on a location with a skeleton
choices.outcome: Refresh all challenge dice other than those placed for this action and continue.

choices.option: If you’re on a location with a skeleton
choices.outcome: Randomize animals [b]Item 1218[/b]–[b]Item 1220[/b] not in any player’s grid or reserve and gain 1 at random.

1669.action: [0b955e]PLACE[-] a flag so it captures the wind
1669.text: As soon as you place the flag in the ground, the wind tosses it to life, much to the pleasure of the onlooking elder. Place a token on quest [b]Item 1669[/b] relative to location [b]Location 180[/b] (where you gained quest [b]Item 1669[/b]).

167.text: The tired fire sentient collapses on the ground before you, the fire in their chest barely a spark now. Their life is in danger. You notice some water on their husk, which you dry off with your shirt as you gently fan the flames back to life. The sentient will need some time to recover, but they’re eternally grateful. Gain sentient [b]Item 1316[/b].

168.text: Without its tether, the elemental imprints onto you instead. Gain elemental [b]Item 1400[/b]; if you have it, lose the matching elemental curse.

1687.action: [0b955e]HEAL[-] yourself (if you already have 5 or 6 health, perform another action)
1687.text: You tend to your wounds in the safety of home. Gain 2 health.

1688.action: [0b955e]HEAL[-] yourself (if you already have 5 or 6 health, perform another action)
1688.text: You tend to your wounds in the safety of home. Gain 2 health.

1689.action: [0b955e]HEAL[-] yourself (if you already have 5 or 6 health, perform another action)
1689.text: You tend to your wounds in the safety of home. Gain 2 health.

169.text: You notice several sentients wading toward the fixture, each dropping an object into the scalding lava. You realize that all of the objects are weapons. You may lose 1 weapon; if you do, gain spell [b]Item 1367[/b] and 1 health. Otherwise, simply kneel and gain 1 morale. Either way, continue.

1690.action: [0b955e]HEAL[-] yourself (if you already have 5 or 6 health, perform another action)
1690.text: You tend to your wounds in the safety of home. Gain 2 health.

1691.action: [0b955e]HEAL[-] yourself (if you already have 5 or 6 health, perform another action)
1691.text: You tend to your wounds in the safety of home. Gain 2 health.

1692.action: [0b955e]HEAL[-] yourself (if you already have 5 or 6 health, perform another action)
1692.text: You tend to your wounds in the safety of home. Gain 2 health.

1695.action: [0b955e]TEACH[-] the fire sentient about the science and art of spaceship construction
1695.text: Gain 1 token on quest [b]Item 1695[/b], then gain [0b955e]1 help[-] for each token on this quest. If there are now 3 tokens on this quest, remove them and read [b]Location 1695[/b] in the Book of Secrets..

170.text: You patch up the thin lava tubes, which resemble heating coils. Inspired by the artistry, you create a trinket from some excess tubing. Gain item [b]Item 1101[/b].

1701.text: You tend to your wounds in the safety of home. Gain 2 health.

1705.action: [0b955e]PRAISE[-] and appreciate the rescue team for their efforts, ending your adventure
1705.text: The game ends as you head back to your homeworld, and you achieve an epic victory if you have also completed the mission. Otherwise, it is impressive that you survived long enough to control your destiny, and your knowledge of the planet will benefit you in the future.

171.action: [0b955e]AID[-] a sentient in need based on a plea illuminated on the orb’s surface
171.text: The outside of the orb includes requests for help from sentients in the area, each promising a generous reward. One such request is to free some enslaved miners to the north. Gain 1 boost and quest [b]Item 1671[/b] (add it horizontally to your supply).

172.text: You spring into action, high-stepping through the waves, throwing yourself onto the deck, and taking hold of the till. The leaf sentient crewmembers thank you heartily and give you a choice: Join them on their northward journey (gain quest [b]Item 1671[/b]; add it horizontally to your supply), or drop them off on the northern shore and keep the boat (gain vehicle [b]Item 1156[/b]).

173.text: A pulse of light ripples outwards from the center seam of the runecaster. Each player gains 1 skill matching the rune. You also gain 1 morale.

174.text: The judges cheer and welcome you to participate in the trial. Continue with the [fff349]take-[b]ENDURE[/b][-] action.

175.text: The wind sentient gruffly points you to the barrels to the right and asks you to carry them under the hut. In return, they offer you a choice: Gain $2 or sample the sparkling substance (gain item [b]Item 867[/b]).

176.action: [0b955e]RESCUE[-] the helpless sentients from the twister
176.text: You pull the closest sentient out of the reach of the small tornado, and they tumble on top of you, bewildered by your unsolicited aid. “How dare you disturb the Dance of Dust!” they admonish you. You quickly apologize and explain the misunderstanding. They nod and jump back into the fray. Gain 1 boost and continue.

177.text: Nearby sentients see your act of respect and express their gratitude that you did not tread on their sacred land. In appreciation they teach you a lesson in magic. Gain lesson [b]Item 1419[/b].

178.text: The sentient’s aggression softens as they see you caring for the drooping flowers. They explain that these are weeping asterace, so they’re supposed to look sad—just not this sad. Something has plagued them, and they request that you help find a cure. Gain 1 boost and quest [b]Item 1629[/b] (add it horizontally to your supply).

179.text: It only takes a few petals for you to create a pleasant novelty. Gain item [b]Item 1096[/b].

180.action: [0b955e]OFFER[-] to help the sentient with a task
180.text: The sentient brightens at the prospect of your aid, and they ask you to place some flags in the area so they can more easily see the wind patterns from a distance. Gain [0b955e]1 help[-] and quest [b]Item 1669[/b] (add it horizontally to your supply).

181.action: [0b955e]PRAISE[-] the guards for doing their job
181.text: The sentients stand up a little taller, your compliments well received. “We’re the best in the business at protecting the sacred seed,” one of them says. Gain 1 boost and 1 random skill; you may continue.

182.action: [0b955e]HONOR[-] the sentient’s culture with a deep bow
182.text: The sentient is pleased that you would pay such respect to their culture, particularly with the sacred field to the south: Few outsiders know not to walk through that field. They offer to show you around if you’re venturing west; if so, gain sentient [b]Item 1309[/b] and go to [b]Location 181[/b]. If not, gain 1 boost.

183.action: [0b955e]ASSIST[-] the sentient in perfecting the dance
183.text: The sentient describes the combination they’re trying to perfect, and you point out any missteps (and praise them for every perfect set of moves). In gratitude for your help, they offer to join you. Gain sentient [b]Item 1305[/b].

184.action: [0b955e]ENLIVEN[-] the queen with your performance art (only if you have been welcomed as a participant in this trial; otherwise choose another action)
184.text: The queen declares, “Dance for me!” You must think on your feet for the full trial. Roll 2 skill dice to represent some dance moves that come to mind; select and place 1 of them as part of your routine (placed dice cannot change). Then again roll 2 skill dice, select 1, and place it adjacent to the previously placed die. You may never place the same icon in the same row or column (rows and columns extend over empty spaces). Continue rolling 2 skill dice and placing 1 adjacent to the previously placed die. If you ever roll doubles, you may reroll either or both dice. The goal is to have at least 1 die showing each icon and connect back to the first die, completing the dance; you earn $1 for every die you place (succeed or fail; minimum 4 dice and maximum 12 dice). Read entry [b]Location 184[/b] in the Book of Secrets for the results.

185.action: [0b955e]BUILD[-] a structure from the framework of the ruins
185.text: Examining what remains of the ancient floorplan, you sketch out a few ideas of what you might make. Gain blueprint [b]Item 1295[/b].

186.action: [0b955e]ASSIST[-] a sentient heading toward the city
186.text: The sentient shares that they’re heading to the trading post in town, and they appreciate the help. Gain $1 and 1 morale; go to city [b]Location 518[/b].

187.action: [0b955e]HONOR[-] the artifact by offering a cultural exchange
187.text: The sentients are amazed to see an alien like you in their midst. They admire your augsuit and present you with a precious artifact. If you pay 3 boost, you successfully play music from the horn; gain item [b]Item 1003[/b] and perform no other location actions here. If not, the mystery of the artifact remains unsolved, and it vanishes from your grasp; gain 1 boost.

188.text: The gears are clogged with sand, so you take them apart, clean them, and put them back together. The machine’s owner is absolutely overjoyed, and they offer you the choice between a special gem (gain item [b]Item 1168[/b]) and a lesson that could help you earn the Horn of Destiny to the west (gain 1 boost and [fd8c46]2 engage[-]).

189.action: [0b955e]CRAFT[-] some wetland shoes from the flag
189.text: The footwear may not look pretty, and they may not keep your feet dry, but they are technically “shoes.” Gain item [b]Item 933[/b]; you may go north to [b]Location 194[/b].

190.action: [0b955e]CRAFT[-] a simple stone item from the rubble at the mouth of the cave
190.text: Gain item [b]Item 1095[/b]. Up close, the cave doesn’t look as daunting as it did from a distance. If you dare, you may gain [a84fc0]1 look[-] and continue with the [a84fc0]look-[b]EXPLORE[/b][-] action.

191.text: A pulse of light ripples outwards from the center seam of the runecaster. Each player gains 1 skill matching the rune. You also gain 1 morale.

192.text: The sentient is placing and adjusting flags with precision, and they’re clearly pleased by the compliment. Gain ability [b]Item 1480[/b] and 1 morale.

193.text: You sketch out a few ideas of what you might make. Gain blueprint [b]Item 1297[/b].

194.text: You grab the sentient from the tornado, energy surging from them into you. “Thank you,” they say, taking their biological equivalent of deep breaths. “This duel has gone on much longer than I anticipated! I’m going to play dead until they leave.” Grateful for your aid, they offer either to teach you wind magic (gain spell [b]Item 1379[/b]) or to give you a powerful grenade (gain item [b]Item 860[/b]).

195.text: You sketch out a few ideas of what you might build. Gain blueprint [b]Item 1298[/b].

196.text: After patching a small portion of the shattered spaceship, you realize just how big of a task you’ve created for yourself. Gain destiny [b]Item 1605[/b] (place it in the center) and 1 boost. You may either stop or continue with a [0b955e]help-◆5-[b]REPAIR[/b][-] action to weld the pieces into something more cohesive yet still nonfunctional (then read the next result only):

choices.outcome: You step back and admire your work. This part of the spaceship is airtight, but the most difficult job remains. For the spaceship to be even semi-operational, you must rewire it and fix the power supply. Gain 1 morale and [0b955e]1 help[-]. You may either stop or continue with a [0b955e]help-◆7-[b]REPAIR[/b][-] action to obtain a partial spaceship (then read the next result):
The lights flicker on, and your heart sings as the ship hovers off the ground. Gain vehicle [b]Item 1434[/b].

197.action: [0b955e]ASSIST[-] the sentient in finding the perfect position for the flags
197.text: Your assistance proves to be a huge help for the sentient, who is able to gauge the perfect position for this and other nearby flags, instructing you to shift a little to the left or right while they hover at a short distance. “You have brought a great honor to my people,” they say. “I’m happy to reward you with your choice of the wind emblem or my service.” Gain item [b]Item 1239[/b] or sentient [b]Item 1307[/b]; also, if you have it, lose the wind curse.

198.action: [0b955e]AID[-] a sentient in need based on a plea illuminated on the orb’s surface
198.text: The outside of the orb includes requests for help from sentients in the area, each promising a generous reward. One such request is to overthrow a tyrant; the instructions say to meet up with a few energy sentients to the northeast of here. Gain 1 morale and 1 boost.

199.text: The sentient insists that they don’t need your help, encouraging you simply to enjoy the view of Moonstone Mountain to the north. But they seem to appreciate you handing them tools during the process of picking the lock—some treasure chests are traps, and they want to give this one their full attention. When the chest opens to reveal a large mace, they offer you the choice of becoming their apprentice (gain sentient [b]Item 1338[/b]) or gaining the weapon (gain item [b]Item 1036[/b]).

020.text: As you describe your vantage, the group feels a sense of camaraderie. Each player may gain 1 random skill. If the random skill you gain matches that of any other player, you gain 1 morale. If not, gain destiny [b]Item 1599[/b] (place it in the center). You may continue.

200.text: Refresh X challenge dice in your grid (you may not refresh dice placed during this action). Then, if there are no challenge dice in your grid, gain 1 health, and you may continue.

201.text: As if well-accustomed to receiving compliments from travelers, the sentient squares their shoulders and flies away. Gain 1 boost.

202.action: [0b955e]OFFER[-] to help the sentient with their job
202.text: The sentient scoffs at the offer—they’ve spent years training to maintain and repair runecasters, and you think you can just waltz in and help them? As if sensing your naivete, they explain that runecasters help sentients around the world to increase the efficiency of basic tasks. They demonstrate how to activate the nearby device and give you a map to find others like it. Gain item [b]Item 1255[/b]; the sentient highlights your current location (view page 12 in the Book of Vantages; you are in region F).

203.text: “Just doing my job,” the sentient replies, but you can tell from their posture that they appreciate the compliment. “Captives aren’t going to guard themselves!” they say with a wink. Gain 1 boost and continue.

204.text: The occupants appreciate your unsolicited aid and toss you some coins. Gain $5 and continue.

205.action: [0b955e]BREW[-] a mild tincture from the lotus roots
205.text: You grind the roots into a pulp with makeshift equivalents of a mortar and pestle—plus a hearty wad of saliva—resulting in a sparkling substance. Gain item [b]Item 867[/b].

206.action: [0b955e]ASSIST[-] a sentient heading toward the city
206.text: They’re struggling to carry two large paintings that they proudly stole and would like to present to the grand museum of Ingot Town. A little conflicted, you provide a steadying pair of second hands. Gain $2 and go to city [b]Location 522[/b].

207.text: He cheers and welcomes you to participate in the trial. Continue with the [fff349]take-[b]BYPASS[/b][-] action.

208.action: [0b955e]AID[-] a sentient in need based on a plea illuminated on the orb’s surface
208.text: The outside of the orb includes requests for help from sentients in the area, each promising a generous reward. One is to free a hostage just south of here. Gain 1 boost and quest [b]Item 1652[/b] (add it horizontally to your supply).

209.text: If you have flora or food, let the animal nibble on part of it, then gain animal [b]Item 828[/b]. If not, you gain back a little warmth thanks to the animal as it nuzzles against you (gain 1 health).

021.text: As you describe your vantage, the group feels a sense of camaraderie. Each player may gain 1 random skill. If the random skill you gain matches that of any other player, you gain 1 morale. If not, gain destiny [b]Item 1599[/b] (place it in the center). You may continue.

210.action: [0b955e]PRACTICE[-] evasion techniques around—but not too close—to the magnetic object

211.action: [0b955e]OFFER[-] to find a precious item for the sentient
211.text: “Thank you, little one. The item I covet is the Eye of the Ancient. I know exactly where it is—far northeast of here—but my attempts to acquire it have all failed.” Gain 1 boost and quest [b]Item 1658[/b] (add it horizontally to your supply).

212.text: Keeping a safe distance from the animal, you pluck a few petals from the nearby lotus. The scent seems to make the animal dizzy, and it topples onto its back and rolls around. Gain animal [b]Item 829[/b].

213.text: The flying sentient appreciates the offer, but they’re guarding something far too precious to let a stranger help. Instead they show you a clever way to craft a silly item from energy itself. Gain item [b]Item 1097[/b].

214.action: [0b955e]CRAFT[-] a simple stone item from the rubble along the path
214.text: Gain item [b]Item 1095[/b]. Up close, the cave doesn’t look as daunting as it did from a distance. If you dare, you may gain [a84fc0]1 look[-] and continue with the [a84fc0]look-[b]EXPLORE[/b][-] action.

215.text: It’s hard to understand their wild gesticulations, but they seem to want you to find an enchanted forest to the east of here—they even have a picture to share. Gain quest [b]Item 1700[/b] (add it horizontally to your supply).

216.text: The museum docent eagerly accepts your help, telling you to keep an eye on an important exhibit. Go to interior [b]Location 564[/b].

217.action: [0b955e]ASSEMBLE[-] a set of stone steps over the fence
217.text: Some other travelers applaud the effort and give you some spare snow gear in appreciation, saying you’ll need it in the cold north. Gain item [b]Item 928[/b]; you may go north to [b]Location 222[/b].

218.action: [0b955e]CRAFT[-] an advanced device from one of the lodestones
218.text: You pry off a floating shard, and with great ingenuity—if you may say so yourself—you craft a powerful pair of goggles. Gain item [b]Item 935[/b].

219.action: [0b955e]SHARE[-] your observations of potential threats with the sentry
219.text: Whether they’re true or false, you spin a web of stories for the sentry, informing them of what you’ve seen in the surrounding area. Gain $4 and continue.

022.text: You position a few icy stones in such a way that the multitude of red-hot lasers is reduced to a single beam, which you easily step over. Proceed deeper into the planet to cave [b]Location 082[/b].

220.text: Practice your ability to forage (gain ability [b]Item 1487[/b]) or cleave (gain ability [b]Item 1493[/b]). You may continue with an action matching that ability.

221.text: If you have flora or food, let the animal nibble on part of it, then gain animal [b]Item 808[/b]. If not, you gain back a little warmth thanks to the animal as it nuzzles against you (gain 1 health).

222.text: If you have flora or food, let the animal nibble on part of it, then gain animal [b]Item 810[/b]. If not, you gain back a little warmth thanks to the animal as it nuzzles against you (gain 1 health).

223.text: You trudge through the snowfall. Gain ability [b]Item 1496[/b].

224.text: You sketch out a few ideas of what you might make. Gain blueprint [b]Item 1297[/b].

225.action: [0b955e]OFFER[-] to assist the sentients in their journey
225.text: The campers are two siblings on a journey to find the source of the blight that has stricken so many in their village to the southwest, including their fathers. Gain $2 and quest [b]Item 1667[/b] (add it horizontally to your supply).

226.action: [0b955e]PRACTICE[-] how to descend safely and consistently
226.text: There’s a ledge just a few meters below you before a much longer descent, and it’s the perfect place to practice your skills. Gain ability [b]Item 1491[/b]; you may continue.

227.text: Nothing happens. The vehicle isn’t intelligent—it relies on a pilot to steer it. Gain 1 boost and continue.

228.text: You tell the sentient how you came to be on this planet. They encourage you to post your story on the message boards in the orb to the south; they offer to accompany you there. Gain sentient [b]Item 1325[/b].

229.text: You can’t imagine a better place to settle down, so you consider your options for lodging. Gain blueprint [b]Item 1295[/b]. You may lose 1 time to wait for the moon; if you do, gain lesson [b]Item 1432[/b].

023.text: As you describe your vantage, the group feels a sense of camaraderie. Each player may gain 1 random skill. If the random skill you gain matches that of any other player, you gain 1 morale. If not, gain destiny [b]Item 1599[/b] (place it in the center). You may continue.

230.action: [0b955e]BUILD[-] an agricultural establishment at the water’s edge
230.text: You sketch out a few ideas of what you might make. Gain blueprint [b]Item 1296[/b].

231.action: [0b955e]BREW[-] a potion from the nearby lotus in the hopes it will unlock the secrets of the gauntlet
231.text: You drink the potion; gain item [b]Item 867[/b]. A burst of clarity reveals that you must perform the [a84fc0]look-[b]SOLVE[/b][-] action to gain the gauntlet.

232.action: [0b955e]ASSIST[-] the light by dipping your hand into the water
232.text: There is an exchange of energy that you can barely explain. You simultaneously feel like a piece of yourself has entered the light and you feel like part of the sentient being that forms is part of you. Gain 2 health.

233.text: The judges cheer and welcome you to participate in the trial. Continue with the [a84fc0]look-[b]TRANSLATE[/b][-] action.

234.text: When they see that you mean them no harm, the trio hovers over to you and quickly adapt to your language. “We were once forced to provide energy for an evil tyrant to the northeast. Will you help us overthrow them?” Gain $2 and quest [b]Item 1647[/b] (add it horizontally to your supply).

235.text: The Traveler is grateful you replied to their signal. “By the way, it’s probably best to turn it off now… if, that is, you can find what’s left of my ship to the far southwest of here.” Gain mission [b]Item 1596[/b], then either keep it and lose your original mission or lose this new mission.

236.action: [0b955e]CRAFT[-] a dingsbums from the energy surging through the tower
236.text: As you try to weave the tower’s energy into something pleasant, you realize that you could instead manipulate the same energy to send a signal to your homeworld. You may either continue with the [fd8c46]engage-[b]TRANSMIT[/b][-] action with a cost reduced by 3 or use the energy to gain item [b]Item 1097[/b].

237.text: The sentient quickly picks up on your language and replicates it. “I’m reading messages from other geolocators in this orb, but no one seems to be able to find a place called Moonstone Mountain. Can you help?” Gain [a84fc0]1 look[-] and quest [b]Item 1678[/b] (add it horizontally to your supply).

238.action: [0b955e]ASSIST[-] a sentient heading toward the city
238.text: The sentient is carrying a bundle of paper lanterns, the kind designed to float on water. When some of the lanterns almost spill into the swamp, you catch them and return them to the sentient. In gratitude, the sentient leads you into the city before heading over to the funeral home. Gain $2 and go to city [b]Location 520[/b].

239.action: [0b955e]PRAISE[-] the craftsmanship of the building’s owner
239.text: You poke your head into the building, where a few ethereal sentients are exchanging pleasantries. Clearing your throat, you catch their attention, and you use the moment to compliment them on the many beautiful lanterns inside. The store owner beams— quite literally—and invites you inside. Gain ability [b]Item 1480[/b] and go to interior [b]Location 565[/b].

024.text: As you describe your vantage, the group feels a sense of camaraderie. Each player may gain 1 random skill. If the random skill you gain matches that of any other player, you gain 1 morale. If not, gain destiny [b]Item 1599[/b] (place it in the center). You may continue.

240.action: [0b955e]AID[-] a sentient in need based on a plea illuminated on the orb’s exterior
240.text: The outside of the orb includes requests for help from sentients in the area, each promising a generous reward. One such request is to cure a blight; the instructions say that sentients at a campsite south of here are seeking aid. Gain 1 morale and 1 boost.

241.text: With the energy of the purple crystal enhancing your senses, you practice the science of either careful, calculating study (gain ability [b]Item 1492[/b]) or deliberate extraction (gain ability [b]Item 1516[/b]). You may continue.

242.text: Without its tether, the elemental imprints onto you instead. Gain elemental [b]Item 1402[/b]; if you have it, lose the matching elemental curse.

243.text: A loose panel reveals that the levitation core of the runecaster is disconnected. While you have access to the inside, you pair the device to your augsuit. Gain item [b]Item 1028[/b].

244.text: You tap on the glass, and a luminous pink head emerges from within. You ask whether you can help in any way, but they explain that they’re just charging up the orb for other travelers to use. They appreciate the offer, though, and they warn you of the electric fence to the east. Gain 1 morale and 1 boost.

245.text: The plant lashes out at you, but you manage to harness its energy to create a simple dingsbums. Gain item [b]Item 1097[/b].

246.text: A pulse of light ripples outwards from the center seam of the runecaster. Each player gains 1 skill matching the rune. You also gain 1 morale. The Traveler advises you, “Similarly to how you can send a signal via runecasters like this, you can use towers to manipulate interstellar signals.” Gain 1 boost and destiny [b]Item 1598[/b] (place it in the center).

247.action: [0b955e]HONOR[-] the sentients as you seek an alliance between your world and theirs
247.text: They stop arguing and turn their full attention to you. You spend the next hour answering questions about your world, and you make significant progress toward diplomatic relations. Gain 1 morale and 1 boost.

248.action: [0b955e]BREW[-] a potion using the bark of the tree
248.text: The bark yields a greenish tincture. Gain item [b]Item 861[/b].

249.text: If you have flora or food, let the animal nibble on part of it, then gain animal [b]Item 823[/b]. If not, you gain a little strength thanks to the animal as it nuzzles against you (gain 1 health).

025.text: As you describe your vantage, the group feels a sense of camaraderie. Each player may gain 1 random skill. If the random skill you gain matches that of any other player, you gain 1 morale. If not, gain destiny [b]Item 1599[/b] (place it in the center). You may continue.

250.action: [0b955e]HONOR[-] whoever placed the box intentionally among the thorns by leaving the box alone
250.text: You leave the box alone, not letting your curiosity get the best of you. Gain 1 morale.

251.text: Some other travelers applaud the effort and give you a vented jacket in appreciation, saying you’ll need it to the north. Gain item [b]Item 967[/b]; you may continue.

252.text: You ask the sentient for permission to use an unwanted bone to craft a bauble, and they agree, offering you a few pointers along the way. Gain item [b]Item 1092[/b]; if you pay [fd8c46]2 engage[-], also gain sentient [b]Item 1331[/b].

253.action: [0b955e]CRAFT[-] a simple gold item from a loose intaglio on the chest
253.text: As you remove the golden decoration from the treasure chest, you realize that what’s inside the chest could be far more valuable than the simple trinket you intended to craft. You may either continue with the [fff349]take-[b]DISMANTLE[/b][-] action with a cost reduced by 3 or use the gold to craft a simple zamazingo (gain item [b]Item 1099[/b]).

254.action: [0b955e]BUILD[-] an agricultural business to enliven this desolate landscape
254.text: You sketch out a few ideas of what you might make. Gain blueprint [b]Item 1296[/b] and continue.

255.text: Your offer overjoys the sentients, and they say that it would be a pleasure to hunt by your side. After all, they typically hunt in groups of three. One of them scouts ahead while the other walks with you. Gain sentient [b]Item 1333[/b] and quest [b]Item 1649[/b] (add the quest horizontally to your supply).

256.action: [0b955e]CRAFT[-] a basic item from a bone
256.text: Your mind wanders as you carve away at the ivory, and you’re pleased to create a charming bauble. Gain item [b]Item 1092[/b].

257.text: Despite the danger presented by the animals and the apparent shame your assistance brings upon the sentient, you manage to break them free of the cage. They insist upon returning the favor. Gain sentient [b]Item 1354[/b].

258.action: [0b955e]REPAIR[-] a broken item for the sentient
258.text: The release mechanism is jammed in a bone-crafted harpoon, so you fix it and give it back to the sentient. They admit they’ve been having trouble selling a fishing instrument in the middle of the desert, so they give it to you in appreciation and recommend that you head southeast, where water is more abundant. Gain item [b]Item 959[/b] and 1 morale.

259.text: You encourage the animal to eat some of the nearby desert flora you pluck as you approach. The dry snout of the beast rubs against your hand like sandpaper. Gain animal [b]Item 824[/b].

026.text: As you describe your vantage, the group feels a sense of camaraderie. Each player may gain 1 random skill. If the random skill you gain matches that of any other player, you gain 1 morale. If not, gain destiny [b]Item 1599[/b] (place it in the center). You may continue.

260.text: If you have flora or food, let the animal nibble on part of it, then gain animal [b]Item 825[/b]. If not, you gain a warm fuzzy feeling thanks to the animal as it nuzzles against you (gain 1 morale).

261.text: The judges cheer and welcome you to participate in the trial. Continue with the [ec1c3b]overpower-[b]HUNT[/b][-] action.

262.action: [0b955e]ASSIST[-] a sentient heading toward the city
262.text: Fresh from a hunt, they’re juggling weapons and bones in both arms, and they appreciate your assistance. Gain $2 and go to city [b]Location 524[/b].

263.text: As you share some of your water, the entire plant uproots itself, emerging from the ground with eight legs and petals for a head. You stumble backwards, and to your surprise, the plant catches you and embraces you in a big hug. Gain flora [b]Item 1052[/b] and 1 morale.

264.action: [0b955e]HONOR[-] the previous occupants by staying away
264.text: As if the ruins recognize your restraint and respect, you feel a purifying wave wash over you. Lose 1 curse and gain 1 morale.

265.text: You cut the sentient free and force the bounty hunter to run away. Gain sentient [b]Item 1314[/b] and curse [b]Item 1392[/b].

266.action: [0b955e]PRACTICE[-] the dueling card and dice game everyone seems to be playing in the casino
266.text: Gain ability [b]Item 1499[/b] and 1 boost; you may continue.

267.text: The sentient pauses their work to thank you for the offer. They were expecting the aid of a leaf sentient from the south, but they never showed up. You’re put to work in the garden for a pittance. Gain ability [b]Item 1476[/b] and $2.

choices.outcome: You wrest the ambassador away from the prince’s grasp. As the sinew bully wanders off in search of easier targets, the leaf sentient expresses their deepest gratitude. Gain item [b]Item 1248[/b] (also, if you have it, lose the leaf curse).

You pin down the leaf sentient’s wings, leaving them to the whim of the prince. Eventually he tires of toying with his prey and decides to accompany you. Gain sentient [b]Item 1332[/b] and curse [b]Item 1388[/b].

269.action: [0b955e]PRACTICE[-] your skills under these unpredictable conditions
269.text: What better chance to hone your abilities? Practice your ability to evade (gain ability [b]Item 1485[/b]), balance (gain ability [b]Item 1501[/b]), or push (gain ability [b]Item 1502[/b]); you may continue.

027.text: You position a few shiny minerals in such a way that the multitude of red-hot lasers is reduced to a single beam, which you easily step over. Proceed deeper into the planet to cave [b]Location 087[/b].

270.action: [0b955e]CRAFT[-] a simple gold item from a loose intaglio on the chest
270.text: As you remove the golden decoration from the treasure chest, you realize that what’s inside the chest could be far more valuable than the simple trinket you intended to craft. You may either continue with the [fff349]take-[b]DISMANTLE[/b][-] action with a cost reduced by 3 or use the gold to craft a simple zamazingo (gain item [b]Item 1099[/b]).

271.action: [0b955e]RELAX[-] in the presence of such fine art
271.text: Refresh X challenge dice in your grid (you may not refresh dice placed during this action). Then, if there are no challenge dice in your grid, gain 1 health, and you may continue.

272.text: You sketch out a few ideas of what you might make. Gain blueprint [b]Item 1295[/b].

273.text: After patching a small portion of the shattered spaceship, you realize just how big of a task you’ve created for yourself. Gain destiny [b]Item 1605[/b] (place it in the center) and 1 boost. You may either stop or continue with a [0b955e]help-◆5-[b]REPAIR[/b][-] action to weld the pieces into something more cohesive yet still nonfunctional (then read the next result only):

choices.outcome: You step back and admire your work. This part of the spaceship is airtight, but the most difficult job remains. For the spaceship to be even semi-operational, you must rewire it and fix the power supply. Gain 1 morale and [0b955e]1 help[-]. You may either stop or continue with a [0b955e]help-◆7-[b]REPAIR[/b][-] action to obtain a partial spaceship (then read the next result):
The lights flicker on, and your heart sings as the ship hovers off the ground. Gain vehicle [b]Item 1434[/b].

274.text: The strange vegetation is just as much flora as it is bone. Craft either a simple bone item ([b]Item 1092[/b]) or flora item ([b]Item 1096[/b]).

275.action: [0b955e]BREW[-] a mild tincture from the lotus roots
275.text: You grind the roots into a pulp with makeshift equivalents of a mortar and pestle—plus a hearty wad of saliva—resulting in a sparkling substance. Gain item [b]Item 867[/b].

276.action: [0b955e]PRAISE[-] the rightmost sentient for their strategy
276.text: The gold sentient is hesitant to accept your compliment, but you convince them of your sincerity. After their game, they offer to coach you (gain sentient [b]Item 1322[/b]) or steer you toward an amazing landmark (gain [2694d0]2 move[-] and quest [b]Item 1630[/b]; add it horizontally to your supply).

277.text: The creature has been chained to this wall and trained to fight anything that tries to pass through. It deserves to be free, but it doesn’t know your intentions, and it struggles against your efforts. Finally you break through the chains. Gain animal [b]Item 836[/b].

278.action: [0b955e]HONOR[-] the purpose of the wall by moving elsewhere
278.text: You bow to the wall, then turn and walk away. Gain 1 morale and go either east to [b]Location 279[/b] or west to [b]Location 277[/b].

279.text: The sentient waves off your attempt to help them, explaining that the outside of orbs like this display requests for help from sentients in the area, each promising a generous reward. The sentient highlights a nearby request to assemble a broken bridge to the north. Gain 1 boost and quest [b]Item 1632[/b] (add it horizontally to your supply).

028.text: As you describe your vantage, the group feels a sense of camaraderie. Each player may gain 1 random skill. If the random skill you gain matches that of any other player, you gain 1 morale. If not, gain destiny [b]Item 1599[/b] (place it in the center). You may continue.

280.text: In a soft voice, the sentient reveals that they’ve never entirely felt at home in their body. They ask if you would consider venturing to the Memory Palace with them so they can feel what it’s like to occupy a different skin. Gain [2694d0]2 move[-] and quest [b]Item 1697[/b] (add it horizontally to your supply).

281.action: [0b955e]ASSEMBLE[-] a trap at the entrance to the building
281.text: You suspect that someone is inside the building, so you lay your trap and furtively wait a few minutes. Sure enough, a small sentient wanders out of the building directly into your cleverly concealed snare. On them you find a stolen talisman, which you return to the cathedral in the spirit of helping. The clerics inside bless you with the knowledge of basic magic. Gain lesson [b]Item 1424[/b] and 1 boost.

282.action: [0b955e]CRAFT[-] a basic item from a bone
282.text: Your mind wanders as you carve away at the ivory, and you’re pleased to create a charming bauble. Gain item [b]Item 1092[/b].

283.text: A pulse of light ripples outwards from the center seam of the runecaster. Each player gains 1 skill matching the rune. You also gain 1 morale.

284.text: It’s clear to you that this is a sacred place—not to mention one that is probably well-guarded. You bow deeply toward the crystal and step away. As you do, the three treasure chests nearby pop open, sharp-tooth guardians emerging from each. They line up in front of you… and return your bow. One of them hands you a beautiful bar of soap and gestures for you to leave. Gain item [b]Item 1207[/b].

285.text: After patching a small portion of the shattered spaceship, you realize just how big of a task you’ve created for yourself. Gain destiny [b]Item 1605[/b] (place it in the center) and 1 boost. You may either stop or continue with a [0b955e]help-◆5-[b]REPAIR[/b][-] action to weld the pieces into something more cohesive yet still nonfunctional (then read the next result only):

choices.outcome: You step back and admire your work. This part of the spaceship is airtight, but the most difficult job remains. For the spaceship to be even semi-operational, you must rewire it and fix the power supply. Gain 1 morale and [0b955e]1 help[-]. You may either stop or continue with a [0b955e]help-◆7-[b]REPAIR[/b][-] action to obtain a partial spaceship (then read the next result):
The lights flicker on, and your heart sings as the ship hovers off the ground. Gain vehicle [b]Item 1434[/b].

286.text: After a brief conference, the sentient agrees that it would be helpful for you to travel east, then north to find a special constellation. With a sprinkle of sand, you can see it in your mind’s eye. Gain 1 boost, [2694d0]1 move[-], and quest [b]Item 1651[/b] (add it horizontally to your supply).

287.action: [0b955e]HONOR[-] the sacred place by adhering to tradition and waiting for a memory
287.text: Gain 1 boost, then gain 1 random skill and read the matching result:

choices.outcome: You are a wind sentient dancing in the prairie with a new love, your senses heightened by a powerful elixir. Continue.
You are an energy sentient learning a new language for the first time, a foreign tongue opening your heart to other cultures. Continue.
You are a gold sentient playing Skirm with your child, reliving the joy of discovering your favorite game through their eyes. Continue.
You are a leaf sentient giving away your favorite pet to an elderly person, experiencing the pride of putting someone else’s need before your own. Continue.
You are a metal sentient stealing from the rich to give to the poor, delighting in the thrill of the heist. Continue.
You are a sinew sentient making your first kill, honoring the animal’s journey to the next world by burying its soulstone below it. Continue.

288.text: If you have flora or food, let the animal nibble on part of it, then gain animal [b]Item 834[/b]. If not, the animal tugs on your pants, leading you to the west (you may go west to [b]Location 287[/b]).

289.text: Some other travelers applaud the effort and give you a spare bedroll in appreciation, saying you’ll need it in the north. Gain item [b]Item 971[/b]; you may go north to [b]Location 294[/b].

029.text: You position a few iridescent rocks in such a way that the multitude of red-hot lasers is reduced to a single beam, which you easily step over. Proceed deeper into the planet to cave [b]Location 089[/b].

290.action: [0b955e]CRAFT[-] a basic item from a bone
290.text: Your mind wanders as you carve away at the ivory, and you’re pleased to create a charming bauble. Gain item [b]Item 1092[/b].

291.text: If you have flora or food, you may drop a piece of it into the pit:

choices.outcome: The entire pit closes and disappears under the sand. Gain 1 morale; you may go north to [b]Location 296[/b].
Nothing happens. Gain 1 boost and continue.

292.text: Inspired by the skull-and-crossbones warning, you refine your fighting prowess. Gain ability [b]Item 1504[/b].

293.action: [0b955e]BUILD[-] an agricultural structure next to the oasis
293.text: It seems like the perfect place for growth and prosperity, so you sketch out a few ideas of what you might make. Gain blueprint [b]Item 1296[/b].

294.text: The campers groggily emerge from their tents, surprised to see a friendly face instead of a bandit. They’re climbers heading to the Memory Palace to the southwest of here. In gratitude for your assistance, they give you a spare rope. Gain item [b]Item 902[/b].

295.text: The sentient appreciates your silent assistance. Gain item [b]Item 1258[/b] and $3; the sentient highlights your current location (view page 15 in the Book of Vantages; you are in region D).

296.text: Your feet sink into the fine-grained sand, making your walk more of a trudge. Gain ability [b]Item 1496[/b].
