297.text: As you describe your vantage, the group feels a sense of camaraderie. Each player may gain 1 random skill. If the random skill you gain matches that of any other player, you gain 1 morale. If not, gain destiny [b]Item 1599[/b] (place it in the center).

298.text: You trek a large circle around the levitating lorestones. Gain ability [b]Item 1505[/b].

299.action: [0b955e]CRAFT[-] a dingsbums from the energy surging through the tower
299.text: As you try to weave the tower’s energy into something pleasant, you realize that you could instead manipulate the same energy to send a signal to your homeworld. You may either continue with the [fd8c46]engage-[b]TRANSMIT[/b][-] action with a cost reduced by 3 or use the energy to gain item [b]Item 1097[/b].

030.text: As you describe your vantage, the group feels a sense of camaraderie. Each player may gain 1 random skill. If the random skill you gain matches that of any other player, you gain 1 morale. If not, gain destiny [b]Item 1599[/b] (place it in the center). You may continue.

300.text: Your ability to heal the creature is greatly hindered by its sheer unwillingness to allow you within its circle of trust. Roll 6 skill dice and gain all [2694d0]move[-] results. Lose 1 health unless you pay [2694d0]1 move[-]. You finally manage to remove a large thorn from the animal’s head. Gain animal [b]Item 841[/b].

301.action: [0b955e]HONOR[-] the creature by kneeling before it
301.text: The sentient interprets your gesture as an invitation to glide over to you, and you feel a slight tug from within your chest. It leaves you instantly tired, but the sentient glows brighter than before. “Thank you, groundwalker,” they say. “I recognize your language from a vessel I’ve seen in pieces around the world. You’ll find one piece a ways north of here, and another to the southwest. Travel well!” Gain 1 morale and destiny [b]Item 1605[/b] (place it in the center).

302.text: Refresh X challenge dice in your grid (you may not refresh dice placed during this action). Then, if there are no challenge dice in your grid, gain 1 health, and you may continue.

303.text: You kneel before the largest stone and touch your forehead to the circle’s center. Three distinct icons fill your mind’s eye. You may choose to focus on one of the three. If you choose the green icon, gain spell [b]Item 1236[/b]. If you choose the pink icon, gain spell [b]Item 1237[/b]. If you choose the blue icon, gain spell [b]Item 1238[/b].

304.action: [0b955e]ASSIST[-] the one-eyed guard as they fire shots at the approaching pirate ship
304.text: The ship steers away. The guard slaps you on the back and offers you some hardtack and a glider in gratitude. Gain vehicle [b]Item 957[/b] and 1 health.

305.action: [0b955e]BREW[-] an adhesive from the flowers dotting the shoreline
305.text: The longer the flowers brew, the stickier they become. Gain item [b]Item 866[/b] and continue.

306.text: It’s clear to you that this is a sacred place—not to mention one that is probably well-guarded. You bow deeply toward the shard and step away. As you do, the five floating islands shift position, aligning in such a way as to provide stepping stones for you to reach the shard. You may gain item [b]Item 1216[/b].

307.action: [0b955e]CRAFT[-] a basic item from a bone
307.text: Your mind wanders as you carve away at the ivory, and you’re pleased to create a charming bauble. Gain item [b]Item 1092[/b].

308.text: You gently remove the source of the creature’s suffering, a large fishhook. You wash the wound and dress it, and already you can see color returning to the animal’s gills. Gain animal [b]Item 848[/b].

309.text: You unbind the flying sentient and fend off any further advances from the pirates. As soon as you release the captive, the entire ship crashes into the shallows, you along with it. Lose 1 health and gain sentient [b]Item 1305[/b].

031.text: As you describe your vantage, the group feels a sense of camaraderie. Each player may gain 1 random skill. If the random skill you gain matches that of any other player, you gain 1 morale. If not, gain destiny [b]Item 1599[/b] (place it in the center). You may continue.

310.action: [0b955e]PLACE[-] a crystal at the end of the rainbow

choices.option: If you don’t have a crystal or don’t want to lose a crystal
choices.outcome: Gain 1 boost; you may continue.

choices.option: If you have a crystal and choose to lose it
choices.outcome: As you place the crystal at the end of the rainbow, it dissolves into the rainbow. In its place is a ring. Gain an item based on the color of the crystal you placed ([2694d0]blue[-]: [b]Item 991[/b]; [a84fc0]purple[-]: [b]Item 995[/b]; [fd8c46]orange[-]: [b]Item 993[/b]; [0b955e]green[-]: [b]Item 994[/b]; [fff349]yellow[-]: [b]Item 990[/b]; [ec1c3b]red[-]: [b]Item 992[/b]).

311.text: After you assemble the necessary supplies, you realize that the path is still fully functional—it’s designed to lead underwater. You follow the steps until you’re fully submerged. Choose one:

choices.option: Suffer 1 hypoxia damage to proceed even deeper
choices.outcome: After inhaling too much water, you emerge dripping wet in an underground cave. Go to cave [b]Location 089[/b].
Gain 1 boost and continue.

312.text: In appreciation of your unsolicited effort, the owner gives you a big hug and a few coins. Gain $2 and 1 morale.

313.text: If you have flora or food, let the animal nibble on part of it, then gain animal [b]Item 816[/b]. If not, the bird’s head darts into the water and emerges with a fish that it chars with a spurt of fire before offering it to you (gain 1 morale and 1 health).

314.text: The owner emerges from a nearby cave and thanks you for the unsolicited aid. They offer to guide you past the cave barrier, but they warn you of the toxic fumes found within the cave and offer to sell you a mask (pay $2 to gain item [b]Item 964[/b]). You may then either go to cave [b]Location 097[/b] or gain 1 morale.

315.text: It’s such a beautiful grove, so you take a few minutes to leave it even nicer than when you arrived. A grateful sentient notices the effort and gives you a snare to trap any vermin that might nibble on these plants. Gain item [b]Item 947[/b].

316.text: If you have flora or food, let the animal nibble on part of it, then gain animal [b]Item 843[/b]. If not, the animal seems to recognize your good intentions, and it leads you toward the building to the north (you may go to [b]Location 321[/b]).

317.text: Through a combination of making yourself big and hiding the animal, you save it from a persistent predator. The animal clicks in appreciation and stays by your side. Gain animal [b]Item 851[/b] and 1 morale.

318.action: [0b955e]HONOR[-] the artifact by offering a cultural exchange
318.text: The nearby sentients are amazed to see an alien like you in their midst. They admire your augsuit and present you with a precious artifact. If you pay 3 boost, you clean, mend, and refresh the garment until it shines in the sunlight; gain item [b]Item 1008[/b] and perform no other location actions here. If not, the mystery of the artifact remains unsolved, and it vanishes from your grasp; gain 1 boost.

319.text: If you have flora or food, let the animal nibble on part of it, then gain animal [b]Item 817[/b]. If not, you feel a sense of comfort as the animal relaxes in your arms before returning to its task (gain 1 morale).

032.text: As you describe your vantage, the group feels a sense of camaraderie. Each player may gain 1 random skill. If the random skill you gain matches that of any other player, you gain 1 morale. If not, gain destiny [b]Item 1599[/b] (place it in the center). You may continue.

320.action: [0b955e]CRAFT[-] a dingsbums from the energy surging through the tower
320.text: As you try to weave the tower’s energy into something pleasant, you realize that you could instead manipulate the same energy to send a signal to your homeworld. You may either continue with the [fd8c46]engage-[b]TRANSMIT[/b][-] action with a cost reduced by 3 or use the energy to gain item [b]Item 1097[/b].

321.text: The sentient chuckles at your adorable offer, pats you on the head, and gestures for you to join them inside. Go to interior [b]Location 600[/b].

322.text: The sentient couldn’t be happier, and they run over and give you a big hug. Tears come to their eyes when they talk about how hard they worked on this project, even as other students at the Academy were making fun of them for not focusing on magic. Gain 1 morale and 1 boost.

323.action: [0b955e]TEACH[-] the class an unsolicited lesson about your area of expertise
323.text: The instructor does not appreciate the interruption, but they let you talk for a few moments. They recommend that you share more of your insights in the academy to the west, and they cast a healing spell on you to aid you in your journey. Gain $2 and 2 health.

324.text: The creature waits patiently as you examine it for signs of injury, and it isn’t long before you find a metal shard wedged deep in its leg. You remove it and bandage the wound. Gain animal [b]Item 822[/b].

325.text: You gently unwind the web, and the scared animal buries its head into your shoulder as soon as it’s free. Gain animal [b]Item 817[/b].

326.text: If you have flora or food, a spindle of gold silk snatches it; gain animal [b]Item 819[/b]. If not, it playfully rolls a ball of gold from the river over to you; gain item [b]Item 1185[/b].

327.action: [0b955e]CRAFT[-] a simple gold item from a loose intaglio on the chest
327.text: You use the gold to craft a simple zamazingo (gain item [b]Item 1099[/b]).

328.text: The sentient brags that they’re the best watchman at this pit stop for travelers… but they wouldn’t mind a break. They offer you their hourly earnings if you stay here for a bit. Gain $4.

329.text: Despite their weakened, disconnected state, they struggle against your attempts to heal them as if it is some great dishonor. In their shame they abandon their quest. Gain quest [b]Item 1670[/b] (add it horizontally to your supply). Then roll 6 skill dice and gain all [fd8c46]engage[-] results. You can convince the sentient to stay with you if you pay [fd8c46]1 engage[-] (if so, gain sentient [b]Item 1313[/b]).

033.text: As you describe your vantage, the group feels a sense of camaraderie. Each player may gain 1 random skill. If the random skill you gain matches that of any other player, you gain 1 morale. If not, gain destiny [b]Item 1599[/b] (place it in the center). You may continue.

330.text: The Traveler ponders this for a second before replying. “I don’t need help, but I’m fairly confident that any gold sentient would like to know about this fresh husk. They’ll want to feel like they discovered it themselves. Can you lead them here? Gold sentients live to the east.” Gain 1 boost and quest [b]Item 1661[/b] (add it horizontally to your supply). You may continue.

331.text: It only takes a few petals for you to create a pleasant novelty. Gain either a basic leaf novelty ([b]Item 1096[/b]) or a basic gold zamazingo ([b]Item 1099[/b]).

332.action: [0b955e]ASSIST[-] a sentient heading toward the village
332.text: The sentient appears to be in a rush, a bundle shifting under their arms. You agree to accompany them as they make their way to a safehouse in the village. Gain $2 and go to city [b]Location 530[/b].

333.action: [0b955e]REPAIR[-] some fraying cords anchoring the shop to the edge of the gusty plateau
333.text: The owner is grateful for the help, and they toss you some coins in appreciation, encouraging you to come inside to spend them. Gain $2 and go to interior [b]Location 568[/b].

334.text: You carefully reassemble the sentient’s exoskeleton. As you do, the gold fluid flows against gravity and re-forms into something resembling a living fountain. Gain sentient [b]Item 1321[/b].

335.action: [0b955e]VOLUNTEER[-] to transport a package to the base of the valley
335.text: One of the peddlers is hoping to save themselves a trip to the northern basin. Choose one:

choices.option: Accept a package and a tip from the peddler, then head north
choices.outcome: The peddler hands you a big box before lowering you on a ramshackle pulley. Gain item [b]Item 1034[/b] and $1, then go north to [b]Location 340[/b].

choices.option: Tell the peddler that you’re not interested in going north right now
choices.outcome: The peddler mumbles something about how you shouldn’t offer to volunteer unless you actually want to help. Gain 1 boost and continue.

336.action: [0b955e]ASSEMBLE[-] a crude bridge across the canyon in front of you
336.text: Members of the caravan applaud the effort and give you some coins and a spare hydrasuit in gratitude, saying you’ll need the garment both in the hot climate to the distant south and west and in the ocean to the north. Gain item [b]Item 965[/b] and $3; you may go north to [b]Location 341[/b].

337.action: [0b955e]UPGRADE[-] the rope bridge to better handle the weight of the transport
337.text: The driver admits they’re always nervous about crossing such a basic bridge, and they pay you in praise and coins. Gain $5 and 1 morale; you may go north to [b]Location 342[/b].

338.action: [0b955e]ASSIST[-] an incoming delivery service heading into the resort

choices.option: Take the time to complete the delivery before slipping away within the resort
choices.outcome: Lose 1 time and gain $3; go to interior [b]Location 570[/b].

choices.option: After you enter the resort, dash into a side room when no one is looking
choices.outcome: Go to interior [b]Location 570[/b].

339.action: [0b955e]HONOR[-] the ritual by offering a cultural exchange
339.text: The sentients pause their battle to see an alien like you in their midst. They admire your augsuit and present you with a precious artifact. If you pay 3 boost, you negotiate for the artifact; gain item [b]Item 999[/b] and perform no other location actions here. If not, the mystery of the artifact remains unsolved, and it vanishes from your grasp; gain 1 boost.

034.text: As you describe your vantage, the group feels a sense of camaraderie. Each player may gain 1 random skill. If the random skill you gain matches that of any other player, you gain 1 morale. If not, gain destiny [b]Item 1599[/b] (place it in the center). You may continue.

340.text: In appreciation of you fixing their slowly sinking sailboat, the owner gives you a big hug. They say that you can seek serenity to the west at the horn rocks (gain [2694d0]1 move[-] and quest [b]Item 1676[/b]; add it horizontally to your supply) or gain one of the contents of the nearby treasure chest they recently refilled (gain item [b]Item 1151[/b]).

341.text: The judges cheer and welcome you to participate in the trial. Continue with the [fd8c46]engage-[b]TRADE[/b][-] action.

342.action: [0b955e]ASSIST[-] a sentient heading toward the city
342.text: The sentient is excited to haggle at the street market, and they share some tips and tricks for getting the best price. Gain ability [b]Item 1479[/b] and go to city [b]Location 529[/b].

343.action: [0b955e]BUILD[-] a business on the river bank
343.text: You sketch out a few ideas of what you might make. Gain blueprint [b]Item 1298[/b].

344.text: While functional for flat-bottom boats, the dock is too close to the shoreline, causing larger boats to get stuck in the muddy shallows. In appreciation of your unsolicited effort, the locals give you a gift to aid in adventures to the north. Gain item [b]Item 964[/b].

345.text: The beast is in poor form, but with the hunters gone, you patch it up. It’s still scared of you, but you feel a bond begin to grow. Gain animal [b]Item 836[/b].

346.action: [0b955e]CRAFT[-] an item from the skeleton to help you access the tower
346.text: You use some of the sharper bones to craft a useful piece of gear. Gain item [b]Item 914[/b] and continue.

347.action: [0b955e]BREW[-] a mild tincture from the lotus roots
347.text: You grind the roots into a pulp with makeshift equivalents of a mortar and pestle—plus a hearty wad of saliva—resulting in a sparkling substance. Gain item [b]Item 867[/b].

348.text: A pulse of light ripples outwards from the center seam of the runecaster. Each player gains 1 skill matching the rune. You also gain 1 morale.

349.action: [0b955e]CRAFT[-] a dingsbums from the energy surging through the tower
349.text: You weave the tower’s energy into something pleasant. Gain item [b]Item 1097[/b].

035.text: As you describe your vantage, the group feels a sense of camaraderie. Each player may gain 1 random skill. If the random skill you gain matches that of any other player, you gain 1 morale. If not, gain destiny [b]Item 1599[/b] (place it in the center). You may continue.

350.action: [0b955e]CRAFT[-] a simple stone item from the rubble at the mouth of the cave
350.text: Gain item [b]Item 1095[/b]. Up close, the cave doesn’t look as daunting as it did from a distance. If you dare, you may gain [a84fc0]1 look[-] and continue with the [a84fc0]look-[b]EXPLORE[/b][-] action.

351.action: [0b955e]CRAFT[-] a dingsbums from the energy surging through the tower
351.text: As you try to weave the tower’s energy into something pleasant, you realize that you could instead manipulate the same energy to send a signal to your homeworld. You may either continue with the [fd8c46]engage-[b]TRANSMIT[/b][-] action with a cost reduced by 3 or use the energy to gain item [b]Item 1097[/b].

352.text: They toss a net-woven bag at you, and soon they’re filling it with fish. When they’re done, they say that you’re welcome to keep either the net (gain item [b]Item 911[/b]) or some fresh fish (gain 1 morale and 1 health).

353.action: [0b955e]UPGRADE[-] the tower to be fully functional
353.text: Circuit sentients cheer as snow generated by the tower begins to coat the entire area, though the wood sentients aren’t happy about it. Gain item [b]Item 1240[/b] and curse [b]Item 1386[/b]; also, if you have it, lose the circuit curse.

354.text: It only takes a few petals for you to create a pleasant novelty. Gain item [b]Item 1096[/b].

355.text: After patching a small portion of the shattered spaceship, you realize just how big of a task you’ve created for yourself. Gain destiny [b]Item 1605[/b] (place it in the center) and 1 boost. You may either stop or continue with a [0b955e]help-◆5-[b]REPAIR[/b][-] action to weld the pieces into something more cohesive yet still nonfunctional (then read the next result only):

choices.outcome: You step back and admire your work. This part of the spaceship is airtight, but the most difficult job remains. For the spaceship to be even semi-operational, you must rewire it and fix the power supply. Gain 1 morale and [0b955e]1 help[-]. You may either stop or continue with a [0b955e]help-◆7-[b]REPAIR[/b][-] action to obtain a partial spaceship (then read the next result):
The lights flicker on, and your heart sings as the ship hovers off the ground. Gain vehicle [b]Item 1434[/b].

356.action: [0b955e]RELAX[-] to the pleasant sound of birds and the soothingly spinning water
356.text: After a few minutes of meditation, you realize that all of the birds have disappeared from the sky, yet a few feathers trickle on the breeze above the water. Refresh X challenge dice in your grid (you may not refresh dice placed during this action). Then, if there are no challenge dice in your grid, gain 1 health, and you may continue.

357.text: As you pull a sentient from the burning building, they shake loose of your grip and shout at you in dismay. You soon learn that the flying creatures are waterfighters—they keep deadly tides at bay from the fire sentient’s house. Gain 1 boost.

358.action: [0b955e]HONOR[-] the sentient by offering your aid
358.text: The leader appreciates your generous gesture, explaining that they need an outsider to release the sinew elemental to the southwest. Gain [0b955e]1 help[-] and quest [b]Item 1633[/b] (add it horizontally to your supply).

359.text: The sentient has been here for days without a bite, so they appreciate the help. They ask if you have any flora or food to use as bait. If you do, you may pay a token from a flora or food card as bait to gain 1 morale and 1 health. Otherwise, gain 1 boost and continue.

036.text: As you describe your vantage, the group feels a sense of camaraderie. Each player may gain 1 random skill. If the random skill you gain matches that of any other player, you gain 1 morale. If not, gain destiny [b]Item 1599[/b] (place it in the center). You may continue.

360.text: You sketch out a few ideas of what you might make. Gain blueprint [b]Item 1294[/b].

361.text: A pulse of light ripples outwards from the center seam of the runecaster. Each player gains 1 skill matching the rune. You also gain 1 morale.

362.text: It only takes a few petals for you to create a pleasant novelty. Gain item [b]Item 1096[/b].

363.text: As you describe your vantage, the group feels a sense of camaraderie. Each player may gain 1 random skill. If the random skill you gain matches that of any other player, you gain 1 morale. If not, gain destiny [b]Item 1599[/b] (place it in the center).

364.text: A loose panel reveals that the levitation core of the runecaster is disconnected. While you have access to the inside, you pair the device to your augsuit. Gain item [b]Item 1029[/b].

365.text: For a weak swimmer like you, there’s no environment better suited for improving your abilities. Gain either the swim ability ([b]Item 1460[/b]) or the wade ability ([b]Item 1489[/b]).

366.action: [0b955e]RELEASE[-] a fish from the line, careful not to injure it any further
366.text: The fish, freed from its line, darts away in fear before returning to nuzzle against you in appreciation. As it swims away, you find that you have some control over the water that surrounds you. Gain spell [b]Item 1380[/b].

367.action: [0b955e]CRAFT[-] a simple gold item from a loose intaglio on the chest
367.text: As you remove the golden decoration from the treasure chest, you realize that what’s inside the chest could be far more valuable than the simple trinket you intended to craft. You may either continue with the [fff349]take-[b]DISMANTLE[/b][-] action with a cost reduced by 3 or use the gold to craft a simple zamazingo (gain item [b]Item 1099[/b]).

368.action: [0b955e]RELAX[-] to the pleasant sound of the waterfalls to the east
368.text: Refresh X challenge dice in your grid (you may not refresh dice placed during this action). Then, if there are no challenge dice in your grid, gain 1 health, and you may continue.

369.text: Without its tether, the elemental imprints onto you instead. Gain elemental [b]Item 1407[/b]; if you have it, lose the matching elemental curse.

037.text: As you describe your vantage, the group feels a sense of camaraderie. Each player may gain 1 random skill. If the random skill you gain matches that of any other player, you gain 1 morale. If not, gain destiny [b]Item 1599[/b] (place it in the center). You may continue.

370.text: As you describe your vantage, the group feels a sense of camaraderie. Each player may gain 1 random skill. If the random skill you gain matches that of any other player, you gain 1 morale. If not, gain destiny [b]Item 1599[/b] (place it in the center).

371.text: It only takes a few petals for you to create a pleasant novelty. Gain item [b]Item 1096[/b].

372.text: Some other travelers applaud the effort and give you a pair of flippers in appreciation, saying you’ll need them in the north. Gain item [b]Item 927[/b]; you may go north to [b]Location 302[/b].

373.action: [0b955e]NURTURE[-] some of the vegetation growing from the animal’s spine
373.text: Some petals are looking a little wilted and tangled, so you tend to them while the animal chortles appreciatively. Gain animal [b]Item 841[/b].

374.text: If you have flora or food, let the animal nibble on part of it, then gain animal [b]Item 838[/b]. If not, the animal is delighted to offer you a handful of sand (gain item [b]Item 1194[/b]).

375.text: In appreciation of your unsolicited effort, the owner gives you a big hug and a few coins. Gain $2 and 1 morale.

376.action: [0b955e]VOLUNTEER[-] your services to the sentient in the building
376.text: The hatchery owner says that their job is mostly one of patient waiting and keeping the kiln warm, but they appreciate the gesture. They confide that they’re hoping to expand their services beyond just hatching eggs, and they’re experimenting with explosives. Share your knowledge of detonators with them to gain $5 and continue.

377.text: It only takes a few petals for you to create a pleasant novelty. Gain item [b]Item 1101[/b].

378.text: The sentients whoop with glee and invite you to join them on the ledge for a few minutes. They treat you to some snacks and teach you some trade secrets. Gain ability [b]Item 1479[/b] and 1 health.

379.action: [0b955e]CRAFT[-] a simple lava item without burning yourself
379.text: You use some porous rocks to shape the lava into a basic chisme. Gain item [b]Item 1101[/b].

038.text: As you describe your vantage, the group feels a sense of camaraderie. Each player may gain 1 random skill. If the random skill you gain matches that of any other player, you gain 1 morale. If not, gain destiny [b]Item 1599[/b] (place it in the center). You may continue.

380.text: You carefully remove a knife from beneath the turtle’s shell and provide care to the extraction point. Its movements are tentative, but the creature should fully recover. Gain either the knife (item [b]Item 1209[/b]) or animal [b]Item 813[/b] (who is terrified of the knife).

381.action: [0b955e]HEAL[-] a wound on the turtle’s webbed feet
381.text: The turtle looks away while you stitch and mend the wound—the animal probably caught it on a piece of coral. In appreciation of your aid, the turtle offers you its service as a taxi. Gain vehicle [b]Item 1013[/b] with 2 boost on it.

382.text: You seal the gap in the boulder with pebbles and mud, marveling both at the void and the rock’s apparent ability to mend itself. Gain 1 boost and continue.

383.text: The sentient watches curiously as you climb into the hammock. Refresh X challenge dice in your grid (you may not refresh dice placed during this action). Then, if there are no challenge dice in your grid, gain 1 health, and you may continue.

384.action: [0b955e]CRAFT[-] a simple gold item from a loose intaglio on the chest
384.text: As you remove the golden decoration from the treasure chest, you realize that what’s inside the chest could be far more valuable than the simple trinket you intended to craft. You may either continue with the [fff349]take-[b]DISMANTLE[/b][-] action with a cost reduced by 3 or use the gold to craft a simple zamazingo (gain item [b]Item 1099[/b]).

385.action: [0b955e]HONOR[-] the previous occupants by staying away
385.text: As if the ruins recognize your restraint and respect, you feel a purifying wave wash over you. Lose 1 curse and gain 1 morale.

386.action: [0b955e]BREW[-] a mild tincture from the lotus roots
386.text: You grind the roots into a pulp with makeshift equivalents of a mortar and pestle— plus a hearty wad of saliva—resulting in a sparkling substance. Gain item [b]Item 867[/b].

387.text: You sketch out a few ideas of what you might make, including a mill and stables. Gain blueprint [b]Item 1296[/b].

388.action: [0b955e]ASSIST[-] the guards with a menial task to earn access to the bridge
388.text: The guards ask you to move a series of rocks from one pile to another. It’s mindless, but they seem satisfied with your work. They give you $2 and let you pass (you may go to [b]Location 780[/b]).

389.text: It only takes a few petals for you to create a pleasant novelty. Gain item [b]Item 1096[/b].

039.text: As you describe your vantage, the group feels a sense of camaraderie. Each player may gain 1 random skill. If the random skill you gain matches that of any other player, you gain 1 morale. If not, gain destiny [b]Item 1599[/b] (place it in the center). You may continue.

390.text: As you describe your vantage, the group feels a sense of camaraderie. Each player may gain 1 random skill. If the random skill you gain matches that of any other player, you gain 1 morale. If not, gain destiny [b]Item 1599[/b] (place it in the center).

391.action: [0b955e]PRACTICE[-] your skills on this beautiful day
391.text: The practice pays off. Gain either the scale ability ([b]Item 1503[/b]) or the dig ability ([b]Item 1509[/b]). You may continue.

392.text: The berries make for a fine brewing ingredient. Gain item [b]Item 864[/b].

393.text: Without its tether, the metal elemental imprints onto you instead. Gain elemental [b]Item 1408[/b]; if you have it, lose the matching elemental curse.

394.text: After patching a small portion of the shattered spaceship, you realize just how big of a task you’ve created for yourself. Gain destiny [b]Item 1605[/b] (place it in the center) and 1 boost. You may either stop or continue with a [0b955e]help-◆5-[b]REPAIR[/b][-] action to weld the pieces into something more cohesive yet still nonfunctional (then read the next result only):

choices.outcome: You step back and admire your work. This part of the spaceship is airtight, but the most difficult job remains. For the spaceship to be even semi-operational, you must rewire it and fix the power supply. Gain 1 morale and [0b955e]1 help[-]. You may either stop or continue with a [0b955e]help-◆7-[b]REPAIR[/b][-] action to obtain a partial spaceship (then read the next result):
The lights flicker on, and your heart sings as the ship hovers off the ground. Gain vehicle [b]Item 1434[/b].

395.action: [0b955e]ASSEMBLE[-] a north-south ropeline to help travelers pull themselves past the repelling magnets
395.text: The assembly process takes some time, effort, and ingenuity, but the end result creates a viable path past the magnets. Some sentients cheer you and toss you some coins. Gain $3 and 1 morale; you may go north to [b]Location 396[/b].

396.action: [0b955e]TEACH[-] the building’s occupants about the stars
396.text: The occupants seem keenly interested in this information and ask a number of questions about your home planet’s natural resources while feeding you a local delicacy. Gain $5 and 1 health; you may go to interior [b]Location 572[/b].

397.action: [0b955e]BREW[-] a mild tincture from the lotus roots
397.text: You grind the roots into a pulp with makeshift equivalents of a mortar and pestle—plus a hearty wad of saliva—resulting in a sparkling substance. Gain item [b]Item 867[/b].

398.text: You sketch out a few ideas of what you might make. Gain blueprint [b]Item 1294[/b].

399.text: Refresh X challenge dice in your grid (you may not refresh dice placed during this action). Then, if there are no challenge dice in your grid, gain 1 health, and you may continue.

040.text: Something this beautiful needs to be shared with others, not hidden in the depths of the world. You blink, and when your eyes open, you’re back on the surface with the crystal in your hands. Gain item [b]Item 1000[/b] and go to [b]Location 157[/b]; if you have a previous location card for reference, return it to the box.

400.action: [0b955e]CRAFT[-] a nani nani from some circuitry you rip off the nearby tower
400.text: You find solace in the tinkering process, and you’re delighted by the creative— albeit useless—result. Gain item [b]Item 1098[/b].

401.action: [0b955e]CRAFT[-] a nani nani from some circuitry you rip off the nearby device
401.text: You find solace in the tinkering process, and you’re delighted by the creative— albeit useless—result. Gain item [b]Item 1098[/b].

402.text: The felled tree in front of you is dry enough that it will hold a flame. Gain item [b]Item 1084[/b].

403.action: [0b955e]REPAIR[-] some broken links in the fence
403.text: You respect boundaries, and there must be a good reason for the fence. So you touch up a few spots here and there, carefully avoiding the electric elements. Some sentients notice the effort and toss you some coins. Gain $4 and 1 morale.

404.action: [0b955e]BUILD[-] a structure from the framework of the ruins
404.text: The core foundation of the structure is still solid despite the corrosion from the salty sea below. You modernize the structure to ensure its longevity. Gain structure [b]Item 1292[/b].

405.text: A loose panel reveals that the levitation core of the runecaster is disconnected. While you have access to the inside, you pair the device to your augsuit. Gain item [b]Item 1030[/b].

406.text: The tiny creature is absolutely terrified, and it runs around the island avoiding you. You wait patiently until it decides to approach you. Gain animal [b]Item 834[/b].

407.action: [0b955e]CRAFT[-] a dingsbums from the energy surging through the tower
407.text: As you try to weave the tower’s energy into something pleasant, you realize that you could instead manipulate the same energy to send a signal to your homeworld. You may either continue with the [fd8c46]engage-[b]TRANSMIT[/b][-] action with a cost reduced by 3 or use the energy to gain item [b]Item 1097[/b].

408.text: The doorman is suspicious of your intentions, but after the first hour you seem to have gained some trust, as they hand you a pair of goggles and ask you to watch out for metal sentients. Gain item [b]Item 935[/b].

409.text: Standing between the spires, you feel a heightened sense of healing power. It surges from you, reaching your crew in the far reaches of the world. Each other player gains 2 health; you gain 1 morale and may look at each other player’s location. You may continue.

041.action: [0b955e]OFFER[-] to help at the assassin’s guild
041.text: A dagger whizzes past your head as you walk into the assassin’s guild. A small but deadly sentient giggles and invites you to join them for a drink. Choose one:

choices.option: Praise the sentient for their ability to control metal with such accuracy
choices.outcome: Gain spell [b]Item 1375[/b].

choices.option: Offer to handle a contract job
choices.outcome: Gain quest [b]Item 1635[/b] (add it horizontally to your supply).
Gain item [b]Item 1231[/b].

choices.option: Build a new life for yourself in the city
choices.outcome: Seeking a job, you ask the sentient whether they know of any opportunities for employment here. The market is hiring; gain structure [b]Item 1284[/b].

410.text: The occupants appreciate your unsolicited aid and toss you some coins. Gain $5.

411.text: Seeing other sentients reverently walk up to the stone and touch it, you do the same. An image of 9 runes fills your mind and then fades away. You feel a little lighter, but you also sense that you’re missing something. Gain 1 morale and continue.

412.text: As you describe your vantage, the group feels a sense of camaraderie. Each player may gain 1 random skill. If the random skill you gain matches that of any other player, you gain 1 morale. If not, gain destiny [b]Item 1599[/b] (place it in the center).

413.action: [0b955e]BREW[-] a mild tincture from the lotus roots
413.text: You grind the roots into a pulp with makeshift equivalents of a mortar and pestle—plus a hearty wad of saliva—resulting in a sparkling substance. Gain item [b]Item 867[/b].

414.text: The structure is solid, but it needs a lot of work to regain its former glory. Gain structure [b]Item 1286[/b].

415.text: A pulse of light ripples outwards from the center seam of the runecaster. Each player gains 1 skill matching the rune. You also gain 1 morale.

416.action: [0b955e]CRAFT[-] a simple gold item from a loose intaglio on the chest
416.text: As you remove the golden decoration from the treasure chest, you realize that what’s inside the chest could be far more valuable than the simple trinket you intended to craft. You may either continue with the [fff349]take-[b]DISMANTLE[/b][-] action with a cost reduced by 3 or use the gold to craft a simple zamazingo (gain item [b]Item 1099[/b]).

417.text: The sentient introduces themselves as a scavenger, and they admit that their ability to find interesting items isn’t matched by their ability to sell them, and they could use some help in the underground markets of the City of Shadows. Gain sentient [b]Item 1318[/b] and $2.

418.action: [0b955e]CRAFT[-] a basic item from a bone
418.text: Your mind wanders as you carve away at the ivory, and you’re pleased to create a charming bauble. Gain item [b]Item 1092[/b].

419.action: [0b955e]CRAFT[-] a dingsbums from the energy surging through the tower
419.text: As you try to weave the tower’s energy into something pleasant, you realize that you could instead manipulate the same energy to send a signal to your homeworld. You may either continue with the [fd8c46]engage-[b]TRANSMIT[/b][-] action with a cost reduced by 3 or use the energy to gain item [b]Item 1097[/b].

042.text: The issue seems to be more about the remote camera than the monitor or the local mainframe. You rewind the footage until it reveals an image of a sandstone room filled with precious objects, one of them an ornate blue ring. Suddenly the entire back wall of the room is reduced to rubble by a massive animal, a centipede with teeth the size of your forearm. The last thing you see before the footage ends is the beast swallowing the contents of the room. You hear a gasp behind you—the watchman has returned, and they are deeply embarrassed by the secret you’ve discovered. They plead for your help in recovering the ring. Gain sentient [b]Item 1323[/b] and quest [b]Item 1704[/b] (add the quest horizontally to your supply). Then exit to city [b]Location 041[/b].

420.text: If you have flora or food, let the animal nibble on part of it, then gain animal [b]Item 810[/b]. If not, you gain a little warmth thanks to the animal as it nuzzles against you (gain 1 health).

421.text: You cobble together a brace to stabilize its injured leg, and it rewards you with a sloppy lick to the face. It’s more than just a sign of affection; the animal imparts a deeper understanding of those like it. Gain lesson [b]Item 1422[/b].

422.text: Inspired by the rune, you decide to hone your observational skills. Gain ability [b]Item 1497[/b]; you may continue.

423.action: [0b955e]BUILD[-] a business at the confluence using the established foundation
423.text: You sketch out a few ideas of what you might make. Gain blueprint [b]Item 1294[/b].

424.action: [0b955e]CRAFT[-] a basic item using some loose circuitry
424.text: You fiddle with it for a few minutes and end up with item [b]Item 1098[/b]. The machine won’t respond to you afterward.

425.text: A pulse of light ripples outwards from the center seam of the runecaster. Each player gains 1 skill matching the rune. You also gain 1 morale.

426.text: If you have flora or food, let the animal nibble on part of it, then gain animal [b]Item 855[/b]. If not, you gain a little health thanks to the fresh seaweed the animal deposits in your palm (gain 1 health).

427.text: You tap on the flora, and the sentient pops their head out. Share your recent travels with them. They etch some notes on their arm and thank you with a local flower. Gain flora [b]Item 1066[/b]; you may continue.

428.text: It only takes a few petals for you to create a pleasant novelty. Gain item [b]Item 1096[/b].

429.text: As you describe your vantage, the group feels a sense of camaraderie. Each player may gain 1 random skill. If the random skill you gain matches that of any other player, you gain 1 morale. If not, gain destiny [b]Item 1599[/b] (place it in the center).

043.action: [0b955e]FEED[-] treats to one of the worms
043.text: If you have flora or food, let the animal nibble on part of it, then gain animal [b]Item 832[/b]. If not, the animal nuzzles against you (gain 1 morale).

430.action: [0b955e]PRACTICE[-] evasion techniques around—but not too close—to the sea spouts
430.text: Practice your ability to swim (gain ability [b]Item 1460[/b]), navigate (gain ability [b]Item 1464[/b]), dodge (gain ability [b]Item 1466[/b]), or evade (gain ability [b]Item 1485[/b]). You may continue.

431.text: Without its tether, the elemental imprints onto you instead. Gain elemental [b]Item 1398[/b]; if you have it, lose the matching elemental curse.

432.action: [0b955e]CRAFT[-] a simple gold item from a loose intaglio on the chest
432.text: As you remove the golden decoration from the treasure chest, you realize that what’s inside the chest could be far more valuable than the simple trinket you intended to craft. You may either continue with the [fff349]take-[b]DISMANTLE[/b][-] action with a cost reduced by 3 or use the gold to craft a simple zamazingo (gain item [b]Item 1099[/b]).

433.text: In appreciation of your unsolicited effort, the owner gives you a big hug and a few coins. Gain $2 and 1 morale.

434.text: Refresh X challenge dice in your grid (you may not refresh dice placed during this action). Then, if there are no challenge dice in your grid, gain 1 health, and you may continue.

435.action: [0b955e]ASSEMBLE[-] a proper bridge across the gap
435.text: You can’t imagine these stepping stones meeting safety standards on any planet, so you connect them with boards and a proper guardrail. Several sentients with younglings thank you by gifting you a spring trap, which they say might be useful for catching critters to the northeast. Gain item [b]Item 926[/b]; you may go east to [b]Location 734[/b].

436.text: A loose panel reveals that the levitation core of the runecaster is disconnected. While you have access to the inside, you pair the device to your augsuit. Gain item [b]Item 1028[/b].

437.text: You wade over to the animals. They’re startled to see you emerge from the surf, but they timidly crawl onto your back so you can deliver them safely to shore. The mother deposits a blue crystal at your feet in appreciation. Gain item [b]Item 1160[/b].

438.text: While they’re eager for help, they admit that they don’t really need help—their boat is in good shape and they have nowhere in particular to go. If you’re willing to row with them, they can steer you to an amulet they saw in the west (go to [b]Location 153[/b]); if not, they give you a coin and wish you the best (gain $1).

439.text: The sentient murmurs in appreciation. “Please look at the book to solve the puzzle.” Gain [a84fc0]1 look[-].

044.text: As the hulking creature roars, you realize that it’s a roar of pain and anguish, not hunger. A pikestaff is wedged deep between its scales. You remove it, and the sand centipede gives you a terrifying kiss before retreating down the dark tunnel. Gain item [b]Item 1210[/b] and 1 morale.

440.action: [0b955e]FEED[-] the animals in the hopes they will forge something for you
440.text: If you have flora or food, let the animal nibble on part of it, then gain destiny [b]Item 1607[/b] (place it in the center). If not, gain 1 boost.

441.text: With the tower in the distance, honing your ability to ascend structures seems like a good idea. Gain ability [b]Item 1503[/b].

442.action: [0b955e]CRAFT[-] a dingsbums from the energy surging through the tower
442.text: As you try to weave the tower’s energy into something pleasant, you realize that you could instead manipulate the same energy to send a signal to your homeworld. You may either continue with the [fd8c46]engage-[b]TRANSMIT[/b][-] action with a cost reduced by 3 or use the energy to gain item [b]Item 1097[/b].

443.text: The beast is clearly suffering; not physically, but emotionally. It keeps spinning around, smelling the air as if trying to locate someone important to it. Gain animal [b]Item 817[/b] and 1 boost.

444.text: The creature’s biology is a mystery to you, but with trial and error you find a path to health. Gain animal [b]Item 819[/b] and 1 morale.

445.text: The Traveler is grateful for your offer. “There are many wonders of this world—one not far west of here, in fact—that I’m grateful for having experienced. Yet I still long for my real home, my planet, my original friends and family. I’ve always fancied that there is some way to return to that time and place.” Gain 1 boost and destiny [b]Item 1608[/b] (place it in the center); you may continue.

446.text: Without its tether, the elemental imprints onto you instead. Gain elemental [b]Item 1401[/b]; if you have it, lose the matching elemental curse.

447.action: [0b955e]RELAX[-] to the pleasant sound of the gentle waves
447.text: Refresh X challenge dice in your grid (you may not refresh dice placed during this action). Then, if there are no challenge dice in your grid, gain 1 health, and you may continue.

448.action: [0b955e]CRAFT[-] a simple gold item from a loose intaglio on the chest
448.text: As you remove the golden decoration from the treasure chest, you realize that what’s inside the chest could be far more valuable than the simple trinket you intended to craft. You may either continue with the [fff349]take-[b]DISMANTLE[/b][-] action with a cost reduced by 3 or use the gold to craft a simple zamazingo (gain item [b]Item 1099[/b]).

449.text: The wood sentient is busy looking out for invaders, so they ask if you would venture to the northwest to rescue a friend from unfair imprisonment. Gain $2 and quest [b]Item 1639[/b] (add it horizontally to your supply).

045.text: With all your strength, you pull the sentient from the beast and wait for their eternal gratitude. Instead, they shout at you for separating them from their steed. You don’t understand the entire tirade, but you catch something about the taxi service they provide. You offer to help them find another sand centipede, and they begrudgingly agree. Gain sentient [b]Item 1340[/b].

450.action: [0b955e]RELAX[-] to the pleasant sound of the wind whistling through the forest
450.text: Refresh X challenge dice in your grid (you may not refresh dice placed during this action). Then, if there are no challenge dice in your grid, gain 1 health, and you may continue.

451.text: The smaller of the two insist that they don’t “need” help, but the bigger one waves you forward. Gain quest [b]Item 1642[/b] (add it horizontally to your supply).

452.action: [0b955e]BREW[-] a mild tincture from the lotus roots
452.text: You grind the roots into a pulp with makeshift equivalents of a mortar and pestle—plus a hearty wad of saliva—resulting in a sparkling substance. Gain item [b]Item 867[/b].

453.action: [0b955e]REPAIR[-] a creaky hinge on the front door
453.text: The grateful sentients apologize for the rust and welcome you inside to dry off by the fire and sip on a warm cup of tea while they work the forge. Gain 1 morale and go to interior [b]Location 574[/b].

454.text: A pulse of light ripples outwards from the center seam of the runecaster. Each player gains 1 skill matching the rune. You also gain 1 morale.

455.action: [0b955e]SHARE[-] some stories from your travels with the gatekeeper
455.text: Their face lights up at the offer, and after enjoying your company for a few minutes, they wave you through into the city (go northeast to [b]Location 762[/b]). If you spend extra time with them (pay 1 boost), they also give you a harpoon bow they recently confiscated (gain item [b]Item 960[/b]).

456.action: [0b955e]ASSIST[-] the sentients with cargo they’re unloading
456.text: From the vast variety of goods in the crates, you realize that these are pirates. They appreciate the extra set of hands, and they tip you well. Gain $5.

457.action: [0b955e]CRAFT[-] a simple gold item from a loose intaglio on the chest
457.text: As you remove the golden decoration from the treasure chest, you realize that what’s inside the chest could be far more valuable than the simple trinket you intended to craft. You may either continue with the [fff349]take-[b]DISMANTLE[/b][-] action with a cost reduced by 3 or use the gold to craft a simple zamazingo (gain item [b]Item 1099[/b]).

458.action: [0b955e]CRAFT[-] a dingsbums from the energy surging through the tower
458.text: As you try to weave the tower’s energy into something pleasant, you realize that you could instead manipulate the same energy to send a signal to your homeworld. You may either continue with the [fd8c46]engage-[b]TRANSMIT[/b][-] action with a cost reduced by 3 or use the energy to gain item [b]Item 1097[/b].

459.text: After patching a small portion of the shattered spaceship, you realize just how big of a task you’ve created for yourself. Gain destiny [b]Item 1605[/b] (place it in the center) and 1 boost. You may either stop or continue with a [0b955e]help-◆5-[b]REPAIR[/b][-] action to weld the pieces into something more cohesive yet still nonfunctional (then read the next result only):

choices.outcome: You step back and admire your work. This part of the spaceship is airtight, but the most difficult job remains. For the spaceship to be even semi-operational, you must rewire it and fix the power supply. Gain 1 morale and [0b955e]1 help[-]. You may either stop or continue with a [0b955e]help-◆7-[b]REPAIR[/b][-] action to obtain a partial spaceship (then read the next result):
The lights flicker on, and your heart sings as the ship hovers off the ground. Gain vehicle [b]Item 1434[/b].

046.text: Refresh X challenge dice in your grid (you may not refresh dice placed during this action). Then, if there are no challenge dice in your grid, gain 1 health, and you may continue.

460.text: The shipwrights find it curious that you would voluntarily help them, but they’re happy for the extra set of hands. The sentient in charge offers some pointers about improving a simple boat into a fine vessel. Gain ability [b]Item 1506[/b] and continue.

461.text: The creature whimpers as you bind its broken wing. It tests the binding and is delighted by the effect. Gain animal [b]Item 823[/b].

462.text: The sentient, a great warrior among their people, is planning to attack the wind elemental to the north. You may either gain sentient [b]Item 1311[/b] or pair the nearby runecaster to you with their help (gain item [b]Item 1027[/b]).

463.text: Without its tether, the elemental imprints onto you instead. Gain elemental [b]Item 1397[/b]; if you have it, lose the matching elemental curse.

464.text: Gain $1 per boost on your character and $1 per map you have. One of the cartographers sheepishly reveals that they have never ventured under the surface of the ocean to the south, and they ask you to chart the hidden wonders beneath the waves. Gain quest [b]Item 1631[/b] (add it horizontally to your supply).

465.text: You have a keen eye for poison and disease, and it’s clear that this glowing bog is the source. Careful to avoid contact with the green goopy substance, you create a counteragent to sprinkle over the grass. No one sees you working into the night, but you know you’ve done a good deed. Gain 1 morale; you may go north to [b]Location 466[/b].

466.action: [0b955e]CRAFT[-] a flash bomb to throw through the gap
466.text: Working on a hunch, you create a rudimentary flash bomb, cover your eyes, and toss it through the gap. You hear cries of shock and dismay from the other side, and you stroll right past a pair of bandits, one of whom drops a knife. Gain item [b]Item 1209[/b] and go north to [b]Location 467[/b].

467.action: [0b955e]CRAFT[-] a simple gold item from a loose intaglio on the chest
467.text: As you remove the golden decoration from the treasure chest, you realize that what’s inside the chest could be far more valuable than the simple trinket you intended to craft. You may either continue with the [fff349]take-[b]DISARM[/b][-] action with a cost reduced by 3 or use the gold to craft a simple zamazingo (gain item [b]Item 1099[/b]).

468.action: [0b955e]CRAFT[-] a curio from the easily pliable roots of a nearby tree
468.text: Your mind wanders as you carve, and you’re surprised to see what your subconscious creates. Gain item [b]Item 1094[/b].

469.text: A pulse of light ripples outwards from the center seam of the runecaster. Each player gains 1 skill matching the rune. You also gain 1 morale.

047.text: When the sand centipede finally loses the struggle, the hunters clasp you on the shoulder in appreciation. Gain $3. They invite you to attempt the Trial of the Hunt, and they offer to take you there now. If you accept, go to [b]Location 261[/b] (you may perform the [ec1c3b]overpower-[b]HUNT[/b][-] action there on a future turn); otherwise, stay here and gain 1 boost.

470.text: If you have flora or food, let the animal nibble on part of it, then gain animal [b]Item 821[/b]. If not, the animal signals that the water is safe to drink (gain 1 health).

471.action: [0b955e]CRAFT[-] a simple gold item from a loose intaglio on the chest
471.text: As you remove the golden decoration from the treasure chest, you realize that what’s inside the chest could be far more valuable than the simple trinket you intended to craft. You may either continue with the [fff349]take-[b]DISMANTLE[/b][-] action with a cost reduced by 3 or use the gold to craft a simple zamazingo (gain item [b]Item 1099[/b]).

472.text: Refresh X challenge dice in your grid (you may not refresh dice placed during this action). Then, if there are no challenge dice in your grid, gain 1 health, and you may continue.

473.action: [0b955e]ASSIST[-] a sentient heading toward the city
473.text: Perched on the sentient’s shoulders are several colorful animals demanding attention. Gain $4 and go to city [b]Location 526[/b].

474.text: A pulse of light ripples outwards from the center seam of the runecaster. Each player gains 1 skill matching the rune. You also gain 1 morale.

475.text: If you have flora or food, let the animal nibble on part of it, then gain animal [b]Item 831[/b]. If not, the animal shows you some delicious berries in the brush (gain 1 health).

476.action: [0b955e]OFFER[-] to help the occupant of the building
476.text: The sentient stoutly refuses any assistance… yet they mention offhand that it would be nice if somehow the elemental to the west were no longer a burden upon their people. To demonstrate their selflessness, they teach you some basic magic. Gain lesson [b]Item 1419[/b] and $2.

477.text: The Traveler shakes their head. “It is too much to ask. Too dangerous—even more dangerous than the Tidewatch that patrols these seas and monitors maritime trade. But you’re welcome to visit my forever home to the northwest and send a rescue signal.” Gain 2 boost and destiny [b]Item 1598[/b] (place it in the center).

478.text: A pulse of light ripples outwards from the center seam of the runecaster. Each player gains 1 skill matching the rune. You also gain 1 morale.

479.text: The sentient sees what you’re doing, sighs deeply, and explains that some pirates have been trying to steal the Pearl of the Island in the northwest. You can either volunteer to handle the problem yourself (gain quest [b]Item 1681[/b]; add it horizontally to your supply) or join the sentient (gain sentient [b]Item 1358[/b]).

048.action: [0b955e]ASSEMBLE[-] a staircase leading to the ceiling of the cavern, far above the animal in case it returns
048.text: As you admire the view from your newly created perch, you notice a bright light beaming through the sediment. You peer inside to see a stunning crystal. Gain ability [b]Item 1506[/b] and go deeper into the planet to cave [b]Location 040[/b].

480.text: While treading water, you manage to treat the raw scales on the animal to let the healing process begin. The animal nuzzles against you in appreciation. Gain animal [b]Item 848[/b].

481.text: Practice your ability to dodge (gain ability [b]Item 1466[/b]), leap (gain ability [b]Item 1486[/b]), or wade (gain ability [b]Item 1489[/b]). You may continue.

482.text: You lead the sentients from rock to rock until they’re safely ashore. Yet they have nowhere to go—their homes are destroyed. They beg you to stay and rebuild with them. If you accept, gain item [b]Item 1295[/b]. Otherwise, gain $2 and 1 morale.

483.text: The poor critter is terrified of the water, so you roll some rocks between it and the shoreline, and it tentatively crosses the divide and collapses against you. Gain animal [b]Item 829[/b].

484.action: [0b955e]CRAFT[-] a dingsbums from the energy surging through the tower
484.text: As you try to weave the tower’s energy into something pleasant, you realize that you could instead manipulate the same energy to send a signal to your homeworld. You may either continue with the [fd8c46]engage-[b]TRANSMIT[/b][-] action with a cost reduced by 3 or use the energy to gain item [b]Item 1097[/b].

485.action: [0b955e]CRAFT[-] a simple gold item from a loose intaglio on the chest
485.text: As you remove the golden decoration from the treasure chest, you realize that what’s inside the chest could be far more valuable than the simple trinket you intended to craft. You may either continue with the [fff349]take-[b]DISMANTLE[/b][-] action with a cost reduced by 3 or use the gold to craft a simple zamazingo (gain item [b]Item 1099[/b]).

486.text: As you describe your vantage, the group feels a sense of camaraderie. Each player may gain 1 random skill. If the random skill you gain matches that of any other player, you gain 1 morale. If not, gain destiny [b]Item 1599[/b] (place it in the center).

487.text: Some other travelers applaud the effort and give you a spare robe in appreciation, saying you’ll need it in the desert. Gain item [b]Item 966[/b] and 1 boost; you may go north to [b]Location 276[/b].

488.action: [0b955e]CRAFT[-] a simple gold item from a loose intaglio on the chest
488.text: As you remove the golden decoration from the treasure chest, you realize that what’s inside the chest could be far more valuable than the simple trinket you intended to craft. You may either continue with the [fff349]take-[b]DISMANTLE[/b][-] action with a cost reduced by 3 or use the gold to craft a simple zamazingo (gain item [b]Item 1099[/b]).

489.text: A winged creature is eager for something different than its normal diet. If you have flora or food, let the animal nibble on part of it, then gain animal [b]Item 826[/b]. If not, you recover a little from the sun thanks to the animal as it beats its wings near you (gain 1 health).

049.action: [0b955e]CRAFT[-] an object from one of the spikes
049.text: As soon as you start to chisel away at one of the spikes, the entire cave rotates 180 degrees, sending you sprawling onto another spike. Lose 1 health and continue.

490.action: [0b955e]BREW[-] a mild tincture from the lotus roots
490.text: You grind the roots into a pulp with makeshift equivalents of a mortar and pestle—plus a hearty wad of saliva—resulting in a sparkling substance. Gain item [b]Item 867[/b].

Gain destiny [b]Item 1605[/b] (place it in the center) and 1 boost. You may either stop or continue with a [0b955e]help-◆7-[b]REPAIR[/b][-] action to obtain a partial spaceship (then read the next result):
The lights flicker on, and your heart sings as the ship hovers off the ground. Gain vehicle [b]Item 1434[/b].

492.text: Digging through the snow, you find a discarded and disassembled sled. You patch it up and are ready to slide down the snowy hillside. Gain vehicle [b]Item 931[/b].

493.text: If you have flora or food, let the animal nibble on part of it, then gain animal [b]Item 822[/b]. If not, you’re still pleased by the encounter; either lose 1 curse or gain 1 morale.

494.action: [0b955e]CRAFT[-] a simple gold item from a loose intaglio on the chest
494.text: As you remove the golden decoration from the treasure chest, you realize that what’s inside the chest could be far more valuable than the simple trinket you intended to craft. You may either continue with the [fff349]take-[b]DISMANTLE[/b][-] action with a cost reduced by 3 or use the gold to craft a simple zamazingo (gain item [b]Item 1099[/b]).

495.text: Some other travelers applaud the effort and give you a spare fish trap in appreciation, saying you’ll need it in the north. Gain item [b]Item 912[/b]; you may go north to [b]Location 354[/b] or east to [b]Location 496[/b].

496.action: [0b955e]BREW[-] a mild tincture from the lotus roots
496.text: You grind the roots into a pulp with makeshift equivalents of a mortar and pestle—plus a hearty wad of saliva—resulting in a sparkling substance. Gain item [b]Item 867[/b].

497.text: The workers are grateful for the extra pair of hands, and afterward they reward you with a pair of flippers and some coins. Gain item [b]Item 927[/b] and $2.

498.text: Without its tether, the elemental imprints onto you instead. Gain elemental [b]Item 1403[/b]; if you have it, lose the matching elemental curse.

499.action: [0b955e]OFFER[-] your assistance to the nearest house’s inhabitants
499.text: An emaciated sentient appears at the door, trembling from malnutrition. They give you the last of their limited funds to save them. Gain $1 and quest [b]Item 1664[/b] (add it horizontally to your supply).

050.text: As you describe your vantage, the group feels a sense of camaraderie. Each player may gain 1 random skill. If the random skill you gain matches that of any other player, you gain 1 morale. If not, gain destiny [b]Item 1599[/b] (place it in the center). You may continue.

500.action: [0b955e]CRAFT[-] a dingsbums from the energy surging through the tower
500.text: The lava scalds your feet as you make your way over to the tower; suffer 1 heat damage. As you try to weave the tower’s energy into something pleasant, you realize that you could instead manipulate the same energy to send a signal to your homeworld. You may either continue with the [fd8c46]engage-[b]TRANSMIT[/b][-] action with a cost reduced by 3 or use the energy to gain item [b]Item 1097[/b].

501.text: Reaching the device requires you to move across a lava field; suffer 1 heat damage. A loose panel reveals that parts of the device have melted together. While you have access to the inside, you pair the device to your augsuit. Gain item [b]Item 1031[/b].

502.action: [0b955e]CRAFT[-] a simple gold item from a loose intaglio on the chest
502.text: As you remove the golden decoration from the treasure chest, you realize that what’s inside the chest could be far more valuable than the simple trinket you intended to craft. You may either continue with the [fff349]take-[b]DISMANTLE[/b][-] action with a cost reduced by 3 or use the gold to craft a simple zamazingo (gain item [b]Item 1099[/b]).

503.action: [0b955e]AID[-] a sentient in need based on a plea illuminated on the orb’s surface
503.text: The outside of the orb includes requests for help from sentients in the area, each promising a generous reward. One such request is to locate the horn rocks; the instructions say that the rocks are somewhere to the west of here. Gain 1 boost and quest [b]Item 1676[/b] (add it horizontally to your supply).

504.text: You feel a supernatural strength as you rush to the aid of the sailboat. You’re too late to save their vessel, which the aggressive sky ship has already capsized, but you safely guide the small crew to shore. One of them, a small wood sentient, pledges to repay the favor. Gain sentient [b]Item 1360[/b].

505.text: The sentient seems content to just hang out in the water, but eventually they admit that they wish they could go to the legendary island to the north. Gain quest [b]Item 1686[/b] (add it horizontally to your supply). If you have a vehicle, also gain sentient [b]Item 1320[/b].

506.action: [0b955e]CRAFT[-] a dingsbums from the energy surging through the tower
506.text: As you try to weave the tower’s energy into something pleasant, you realize that you could instead manipulate the same energy to send a signal to your homeworld. You may either continue with the [fd8c46]engage-[b]TRANSMIT[/b][-] action with a cost reduced by 3 or use the energy to gain item [b]Item 1097[/b].

507.text: Using some driftwood and a buoyant animal husk, you cobble together a crude rowboat. Gain vehicle [b]Item 1014[/b].

508.text: In the thrill of the hunt, the poachers don’t notice you sabotaging their vessels, which start to sink. The animal sees the waterlogging and splashes water to accelerate the process. Defeated, the poachers salvage their possessions and head to shore while the animal expresses its gratitude. Gain animal [b]Item 847[/b].

509.text: After patching a small portion of the shattered spaceship, you realize just how big of a task you’ve created for yourself. Gain destiny [b]Item 1605[/b] (place it in the center) and 1 boost. You may either stop or continue with a [0b955e]help-◆5-[b]REPAIR[/b][-] action to weld the pieces into something more cohesive yet still nonfunctional (then read the next result only):

choices.outcome: You step back and admire your work. This part of the spaceship is airtight, but the most difficult job remains. For the spaceship to be even semi-operational, you must rewire it and fix the power supply. Gain 1 morale and [0b955e]1 help[-]. You may either stop or continue with a [0b955e]help-◆7-[b]REPAIR[/b][-] action to obtain a partial spaceship (then read the next result):
The lights flicker on, and your heart sings as the ship hovers off the ground. Gain vehicle [b]Item 1434[/b].

510.text: The sentient stoutly refuses any assistance… yet they mention offhand that it would be nice if somehow the elemental to the west were no longer a burden upon their people. To demonstrate their selflessness, they teach you some basic magic. Gain lesson [b]Item 1419[/b] (or $3 if you already have this lesson), then exit to [b]Location 476[/b].

511.action: [0b955e]REPAIR[-] some damage to the small tree
511.text: In its haste to disappear, the creature snapped several branches from the fledgling tree. You bind and set them. Gain 1 morale and continue with the [a84fc0]look-[b]SOLVE[/b][-] action with a cost reduced by 1.

512.action: [0b955e]HONOR[-] the sanctity of the lorestone island
512.text: It’s clear to you that this is a sacred place, so you bow deeply toward the lorestones and step away. As you do, the tide lifts you forward, guided by some unseen force. Gain 1 morale and go north to [b]Location 514[/b].

513.text: As you free the sentient, they warn you to back away. Choose one:

choices.outcome: The sentient sends a surge of energy through the area. Suffer 1 heat damage and gain sentient [b]Item 1327[/b].
The sentient appreciates your restraint, and they impart some knowledge upon you. Gain lesson [b]Item 1427[/b].

514.action: [0b955e]PLACE[-] an item within the pool at the center of the island (lose 1 item)
514.text: As the item leaves your hands, the amulet hovering above the pool falls into your open palm. Your item has replaced it. Gain item [b]Item 1035[/b].

515.action: [0b955e]BUILD[-] an agricultural establishment at the mouth of the time rift
515.text: You sketch out a few ideas of what you might make. Gain blueprint [b]Item 1296[/b].

516.action: [0b955e]CRAFT[-] a wooden token from a fallen branch
516.text: You craft a simple wooden curio. Gain item [b]Item 1094[/b].

517.text: The old sentient takes a bow and brags about the overclocked engines. They ask whether you wouldn’t mind dropping them off back in the past. Gain vehicle [b]Item 1033[/b] and sentient [b]Item 1316[/b].

518.action: [0b955e]OFFER[-] your assistance at the seed market
518.text: The market is well stocked with a variety of seeds, though you have no idea what plants they’ll grow into. Choose one:

choices.option: Give up something to gain a seed
choices.outcome: Lose 1 card with a value of at least $2 from your grid or reserve to gain item [b]Item 1021[/b].

choices.option: Give up something to gain a flower
choices.outcome: Lose 1 card with a value of at least $2 from your grid or reserve to gain flora [b]Item 1052[/b].

choices.option: Build a new life for yourself in the city
choices.outcome: Seeking a job, you ask around for employment opportunities. The cartographer ([b]Item 1270[/b]), windmill ([b]Item 1273[/b]), and theater ([b]Item 1276[/b]) are hiring; gain one of them.

519.action: [0b955e]OFFER[-] your assistance to the local tailor
519.text: The tailor barely looks up as they carefully chisel away at a wood sentient’s face. Choose one:

choices.option: Honor the process by giving them privacy
choices.outcome: Gain 2 morale.

choices.option: Quietly study the importance of masks in wood culture
choices.outcome: You learn that wood sentients can have elements of their personalities adjusted by expert tailors. Gain 2 boost.

choices.option: Build a new life for yourself in the city
choices.outcome: Seeking a job, you ask the tailor whether there are any employment opportunities. The tailor is hiring; gain structure [b]Item 1278[/b].

520.action: [0b955e]OFFER[-] your assistance at the entropy center
520.text: You’re ushered into the entropy center, where an animal is strapped to an altar. Choose one:

choices.outcome: Gain animal [b]Item 843[/b].

choices.option: Honor the ritual from a safe distance
choices.outcome: Lose 1 morale as the ritualist kills the animal in front of your eyes. Thanks to some sort of sorcery, a pink spirit rises from the animal’s carcass. An energy sentient leans over to you, whispering in awe about how animals have souls too. Gain sentient [b]Item 1328[/b].

choices.option: Build a new life for yourself in the city by getting a job here
choices.outcome: The entropy center itself isn’t hiring, but the barn that supplies the entropy center is looking for a new manager. Gain structure [b]Item 1266[/b].

521.action: [0b955e]OFFER[-] your assistance at a tech upgrade shop
521.text: The tech upgrade shop is fully automated, so all you need to do is push a few buttons and place an item on the conveyor. Choose one:

choices.outcome: Gain the result of crafting or upgrading an item in your grid.

Replace your character with the corresponding card ([2694d0]captain[-]: [b]Item 1447[/b]; [a84fc0]navigator[-]: [b]Item 1448[/b]; [fd8c46]scholar[-]: [b]Item 1449[/b]; [0b955e]medic[-]: [b]Item 1450[/b]; [fff349]engineer[-]: [b]Item 1451[/b]; [ec1c3b]marine[-]: [b]Item 1452[/b]); transfer all boost from your original character onto the new card. If you already have your power armor, instead gain 3 boost.

choices.option: Build a new life for yourself in the city
choices.outcome: Seeking a job, you ask around for employment opportunities. The mine that supplies the crystal shop is hiring; gain structure [b]Item 1287[/b].

522.action: [0b955e]OFFER[-] your assistance at the thieves’ den
522.text: A silence falls over the thieves’ den as you enter, but you’re soon welcomed like an old friend. Choose one:

choices.option: Offer to procure a precious artifact
choices.outcome: Gain 1 health and quest [b]Item 1640[/b] (add it horizontally to your supply).

choices.option: Learn how to open a lock more efficiently
choices.outcome: Gain ability [b]Item 1471[/b].

choices.option: Build a new life for yourself in the city
choices.outcome: Seeking a job, you ask around for employment opportunities. A local school is hiring; gain structure [b]Item 1280[/b].

523.action: [0b955e]OFFER[-] your assistance at a local hospital
523.text: It’s a quiet day at the local hospital. Choose one:

choices.outcome: Gain 2 health.
Gain 2 morale.

choices.option: Build a new life for yourself in the city
choices.outcome: Seeking a job, you ask around the hospital to see if anyone has employment opportunities. The tavern is hiring someone to fill in for the bedridden owner; gain structure [b]Item 1277[/b].

524.action: [0b955e]BUILD[-] a new life for yourself in the city
524.text: Seeking a job, you ask around for employment opportunities. A local school is hiring; gain structure [b]Item 1280[/b].

525.text: A batch of giant eggs stays warm at the hatchery. Choose one:

choices.outcome: Gain item [b]Item 978[/b].

choices.option: Offer to care for a newly hatched creature
choices.outcome: Gain animal [b]Item 814[/b].

choices.option: Build a new life for yourself in the city
choices.outcome: Seeking a job, you ask around for employment opportunities. The blacksmith ([b]Item 1269[/b]) and the hatchery ([b]Item 1285[/b]) are hiring; gain one of them.

526.text: The smell of the apothecary evokes memories of your mother’s herb cabinet. Choose one:

choices.outcome: Gain 2 health.
Gain flora [b]Item 1073[/b].

choices.option: Build a new life for yourself in the city
choices.outcome: Seeking a job, you ask around for employment opportunities. The apothecary is hiring; gain structure [b]Item 1268[/b].

527.text: A few islanders relax in a winery as a musician strums an instrument. Choose one:

choices.outcome: Refresh X challenge dice in your grid (you may not refresh dice placed during this action). Then, if there are no challenge dice in your grid, gain 1 health, and you may continue.

choices.option: Honor the sentients with a song
choices.outcome: Gain $X.

choices.option: Build a new life for yourself in the city
choices.outcome: Seeking a job, you ask the other islanders whether there are any local employment opportunities. The winery is hiring; gain structure [b]Item 1272[/b].

528.action: [0b955e]OFFER[-] your assistance at the recruiting booth
528.text: The officer on duty at the recruiting booth asks if you’re here to join the coast guard or the navy. Choose one:

choices.outcome: Gain $2.
Gain $4 and 2 boost.

choices.option: Build a new life for yourself in the city
choices.outcome: Seeking a job, you ask about local employment opportunities. The officer tells you that there aren’t jobs underwater for landwalkers like you, but you’re welcome to take up residence at the air supply dome. Gain structure [b]Item 1290[/b].

529.text: Gold sentients run the embassy, but you see many types of sentients here. Choose one:

choices.outcome: Gain ability [b]Item 1463[/b].

choices.option: Persuade the gold sentients to join an alliance with humans like you
choices.outcome: Gain item [b]Item 1242[/b] (also, if you have it, lose the gold curse).

choices.option: Build a new life for yourself in the city
choices.outcome: Seeking a job, you ask around for employment opportunities. The embassy is hiring; gain structure [b]Item 1274[/b].

530.action: [0b955e]BUILD[-] a new life for yourself in the city
530.text: Seeking a job, you ask around for employment opportunities. The casino is hiring; gain structure [b]Item 1271[/b].

531.text: A talented glassblower is putting on a show for the customers. They wave you over after the others leave. Choose one:

choices.outcome: The sentient explains that the orbs are designed as universal locators and messaging boards. Gain 1 morale and 1 boost.

choices.option: Assist the glassblower with a project
choices.outcome: Gain $3 and 1 boost.

choices.option: Build a new life for yourself in the city
choices.outcome: Seeking a job, you ask about employment opportunities. The glassblower isn’t hiring, but they have a connection at the training grounds. Gain structure [b]Item 1293[/b].

541.action: [0b955e]ASSEMBLE[-] a building from the ruins, restoring them to their former glory (you may pay a local sentient $X to decrease this cost by X)
541.text: The abundance of raw supplies in the area speeds the restoration process, and you marvel as a castle rises from the ruins. Exit to [b]Location 135[/b], then gain structure [b]Item 1265[/b].

542.action: [0b955e]ASSEMBLE[-] a building from the ruins, restoring them to their former glory (you may pay a local sentient $X to decrease this cost by X)
542.text: The abundance of raw supplies in the area speeds the restoration process, and you marvel as a windmill rises from the ruins. Exit to [b]Location 185[/b], then gain structure [b]Item 1273[/b].

543.action: [0b955e]ASSEMBLE[-] a building from the ruins, restoring them to their former glory (you may pay a local sentient $X to decrease this cost by X)
543.text: The abundance of raw supplies in the area speeds the restoration process, and you marvel as a smithy rises from the ruins. Exit to [b]Location 264[/b], then gain structure [b]Item 1269[/b].

544.action: [0b955e]ASSEMBLE[-] a building from the ruins, restoring them to their former glory (you may pay a local sentient $X to decrease this cost by X)
544.text: The abundance of raw supplies in the area speeds the restoration process, and you marvel as a cottage rises from the ruins. Exit to [b]Location 385[/b], then gain structure [b]Item 1289[/b].

545.action: [0b955e]ASSEMBLE[-] a building from the ruins, restoring them to their former glory (you may pay a local sentient $X to decrease this cost by X)
545.text: The abundance of raw supplies in the area speeds the restoration process, and you marvel as a modern outpost rises from the ruins. Exit to [b]Location 404[/b], then gain structure [b]Item 1292[/b].

546.action: [0b955e]ASSEMBLE[-] a building from the ruins, restoring them to their former glory (you may pay a local sentient $X to decrease this cost by X)
546.text: The abundance of raw supplies in the area speeds the restoration process, and you marvel as an embassy rises from the ruins. Exit to [b]Location 694[/b], then gain structure [b]Item 1274[/b].

547.action: [0b955e]ASSEMBLE[-] a building from the ruins, restoring them to their former glory (you may pay a local sentient $X to decrease this cost by X)
547.text: The abundance of raw supplies in the area speeds the restoration process, and you marvel as a school rises from the ruins. Exit to [b]Location 711[/b], then gain structure [b]Item 1280[/b].

548.action: [0b955e]ASSEMBLE[-] a building from the ruins, restoring them to their former glory (you may pay a local sentient $X to decrease this cost by X)
548.text: The abundance of raw supplies in the area speeds the restoration process, and you marvel as an apothecary rises from the ruins. Exit to [b]Location 784[/b], then gain structure [b]Item 1268[/b].

549.action: [0b955e]PURIFY[-] the stinky tent, tidying up the mess
549.text: The animals seem happy to find their tent far cleaner and better organized than when they left it, and they offer you a satchel in appreciation. Gain item [b]Item 1230[/b] and politely exit to [b]Location 103[/b].

055.text: As soon as you reach the sentient, you realize it was a mistake. They outweigh you several times over, and they are already deep in a state of panic. Roll 2 skill dice. If either result is [fd8c46]engage[-] or [ec1c3b]overpower[-], you manage to secure the sentient (gain sentient [b]Item 1324[/b]). Otherwise, gain 1 of the skill results. Either way, then roll a skill die and go to where the tides take you: [2694d0]move[-] ([b]Location 054[/b]); [a84fc0]look[-] ([b]Location 051[/b]); [fd8c46]engage[-] ([b]Location 479[/b]); [0b955e]help[-] ([b]Location 450[/b]); [fff349]take[-] ([b]Location 365[/b]); [ec1c3b]overpower[-] ([b]Location 427[/b]).

550.action: [0b955e]PURIFY[-] the stinky tent, tidying up the mess
550.text: The occupant returns to find their tent far cleaner and better organized than when they left it, and they offer you a satchel in appreciation. Gain item [b]Item 1230[/b] and politely exit to [b]Location 131[/b].

551.action: [0b955e]PURIFY[-] the stinky tent, tidying up the mess
551.text: The occupants return to find their tent far cleaner and better organized than when they left it, and they offer you a satchel in appreciation. Gain item [b]Item 1230[/b] and politely exit to [b]Location 225[/b].

552.action: [0b955e]PURIFY[-] the stinky tent, tidying up the mess
552.text: The occupants return to find their tent far cleaner and better organized than when they left it, and they offer you a satchel in appreciation. Gain item [b]Item 1230[/b] and politely exit to [b]Location 294[/b].

553.action: [0b955e]BUILD[-] a barricade so you have the room to yourself
