553.text: With the room secure, you have time to look around. The elixir stands out to you; gain item [b]Item 864[/b]. If X is 4+, the door holds long enough for you to pilfer something else too (gain item [b]Item 925[/b]). Then exit north to [b]Location 120[/b] before someone kicks in the door.

554.action: [0b955e]BUILD[-] a barricade so you have the room to yourself
554.text: With the room secure, you have time to look around. The ointment stands out to you; gain item [b]Item 868[/b]. If X is 4+, the door holds long enough for you to pilfer something else too (gain item [b]Item 930[/b]). Then exit north to [b]Location 485[/b] before someone kicks in the door.

555.action: [0b955e]BUILD[-] a barricade so you have the room to yourself
555.text: With the room secure, you have time to look around. The pliers stand out to you; gain item [b]Item 881[/b]. If X is 4+, the door holds long enough for you to pilfer something else too (gain item [b]Item 865[/b]). Then exit west to [b]Location 128[/b] before someone kicks in the barricade.

556.action: [0b955e]BUILD[-] a barricade so you have the room to yourself
556.text: With the room secure, you have time to look around. The fish trap stands out to you; gain item [b]Item 912[/b]. If X is 4+, the door holds long enough for you to pilfer something else too (gain item [b]Item 907[/b]). Then exit north to [b]Location 209[/b] before someone kicks in the barricade.

557.action: [0b955e]BUILD[-] a barricade so you have the room to yourself
557.text: With the room secure, you have time to look around. The cards stand out to you; gain 1 random card from the Skirm spoiler pack (place it in your reserve, where your entire Skirm collection counts as only 1 reserved card. You can use this type of card from your reserve during [ec1c3b]overpower-[b]DUEL[/b][-] actions, which have further instructions). If X is 4+, the door holds long enough for you to pilfer something else too (gain item [b]Item 924[/b]). Then exit north to [b]Location 220[/b] before someone kicks in the door.

558.action: [0b955e]CONSOLE[-] a sentient who recently lost a game
558.text: The sentient weeps and collapses into your arms, horrified that they just lost $17 from an ill-advised gamble. You grab a torch and lead them out of the casino. Gain item [b]Item 1087[/b] and exit to [b]Location 266[/b].

559.action: [0b955e]BUILD[-] a barricade so you have the room to yourself
559.text: With the room secure, you have time to look around. The water bag stands out to you; gain item [b]Item 857[/b]. If X is 4+, the door holds long enough for you to pilfer something else too (gain item [b]Item 935[/b]). Then exit north to [b]Location 409[/b] before someone kicks in the door.

choices.outcome: With the room secure, you have time to look around. The tool kit stands out to you; gain item [b]Item 880[/b]. If X is 4+, the door holds long enough for you to pilfer something else too (gain item [b]Item 1086[/b]). Then exit north to [b]Location 678[/b] before someone kicks in the door.

With such a vast array of tools at your disposal, crafting is much easier than usual. Gain either the benefit of a [0b955e]CRAFT[-] action on a card you control or a simple wood curio ([b]Item 1094[/b]). Either way, exit to [b]Location 673[/b].

561.action: [0b955e]BUILD[-] a barricade so you have the room to yourself
561.text: With the room secure, you have time to look around. A torch stands out to you; gain item [b]Item 1084[/b]. If X is 4+, the door holds long enough for you to pilfer something else too (gain item [b]Item 986[/b]). Then exit north to [b]Location 490[/b] before someone kicks in the door.

choices.outcome: With the area secure, you have time to look around. The nearby axe stands out to you; gain item [b]Item 1042[/b]. If X is 4+, the door holds long enough for you to pilfer something else too (gain item [b]Item 946[/b]). Then slip out of the barricade to [b]Location 160[/b].

With such a vast array of tools at your disposal, crafting is much easier than usual. Gain either the benefit of a [0b955e]CRAFT[-] action on a card you control or a simple energy dingsbums ([b]Item 1097[/b]). Either way, exit to [b]Location 160[/b].

563.text: With the area secure, you have time to look around. The nearby blue crystal stands out to you; gain item [b]Item 1160[/b]. If X is 4+, the door holds long enough for you to pilfer something else too (gain item [b]Item 943[/b]). Then continue with the [2694d0]move-[b]EXIT[/b][-] action.

564.action: [0b955e]ASSIST[-] a museum guest who has lost their datapad
564.text: You pick up the errant datapad from the floor and return it to the sentient. They’re overwhelmed with gratitude, and they share a neat trick with you regarding the museum’s security system. Gain ability [b]Item 1495[/b] and [fff349]1 take[-]; you may continue.

565.action: [0b955e]BUILD[-] a barricade between you and the bewildered shop owner
565.text: With the area secure, you have time to look around. The nearby potion stands out to you; gain item [b]Item 861[/b]. If X is 4+, the door holds long enough for you to pilfer something else too (gain item [b]Item 953[/b]). Then exit north to [b]Location 244[/b].

566.action: [0b955e]ASSIST[-] the guard, who is just around the corner taking aim at a pirate ship
566.text: After several warning shots, the ship steers away into the clouds. The guard clasps your shoulder in gratitude and offers you a glider to aid in your travels. Gain vehicle [b]Item 957[/b] and 1 morale, and exit to [b]Location 304[/b].

567.text: With the area secure, you have time to look around. The nearby blue crystal stands out to you; gain item [b]Item 1160[/b]. If X is 4+, the door holds long enough for you to pilfer something else too (gain item [b]Item 1039[/b]). Then exit north to [b]Location 707[/b].

568.action: [0b955e]REPAIR[-] some broken items for the vendor
568.text: The sentient warily lets you patch up a few older items, and they’re pleased with the results. They offer you a pair of goggles in appreciation. Gain item [b]Item 941[/b] and exit to [b]Location 333[/b].

569.action: [0b955e]OFFER[-] to help the vendors unpack and organize the crates
569.text: The vendors appreciate the extra set of hands. When they realize that a winter coat was included in a crate by mistake, they give it to you. Gain item [b]Item 929[/b] and exit to [b]Location 335[/b].

570.text: With the area secure, you have time to look around. The robe stands out to you; gain item [b]Item 966[/b]. If X is 4+, the door holds long enough for you to pilfer something else too (gain item [b]Item 994[/b]). Then exit north to [b]Location 343[/b].

choices.outcome: With the area secure, you have time to look around. The nearby grenade stands out to you; gain item [b]Item 860[/b]. If X is 4+, the door holds long enough for you to pilfer something else too (gain item [b]Item 870[/b]). Then exit north to [b]Location 125[/b].

With such a vast array of tools at your disposal, crafting is much easier than usual. Gain either the benefit of a [0b955e]CRAFT[-] action on a card you control or a simple lava chisme ([b]Item 1101[/b]). Either way, exit to [b]Location 376[/b].

572.text: With the area secure, you have time to look around. The nearby goggles stand out to you; gain item [b]Item 940[/b]. If X is 4+, the door holds long enough for you to pilfer something else too (gain item [b]Item 988[/b]). Then exit north to [b]Location 397[/b].

573.text: With the area secure, you have time to look around. The nearby quickdraw stands out to you; gain item [b]Item 909[/b]. If X is 4+, the door holds long enough for you to pilfer something else too (gain item [b]Item 876[/b]). Then exit north to [b]Location 411[/b].

choices.outcome: With the area secure, you have time to look around. The nearby armor stands out to you; gain item [b]Item 976[/b]. If X is 4+, the door holds long enough for you to pilfer something else too (gain item [b]Item 874[/b]). Then exit north to [b]Location 454[/b].

With such a vast array of tools at your disposal, crafting is much easier than usual. Gain either the benefit of a [0b955e]CRAFT[-] action on a card you control or a simple metal knickknack ([b]Item 1093[/b]). Either way, exit to [b]Location 453[/b].

575.text: With the area secure, you have time to look around. The nearby pair of binoculars stands out to you; gain item [b]Item 972[/b]. If X is 4+, the door holds long enough for you to pilfer something else too (gain item [b]Item 944[/b]). Then exit north to [b]Location 456[/b].

576.text: With the area secure, you have time to look around. The nearby explosives stand out to you; gain item [b]Item 879[/b]. If X is 4+, the door holds long enough for you to pilfer something else too (gain item [b]Item 905[/b]). Then exit north to [b]Location 457[/b].

577.text: With the area secure, you have time to look around. The nearby nanotech syringe stands out to you; gain item [b]Item 869[/b]. If X is 4+, the door holds long enough for you to pilfer something else too (gain item [b]Item 1045[/b]). Then exit north to [b]Location 465[/b].

578.action: [0b955e]ASSIST[-] the workers with the incoming cargo
578.text: The workers appreciate your help, and you quickly unload several large barrels from the boat. They give you a few coins and a spare rope in gratitude. Gain item [b]Item 901[/b] and $2.

579.text: With the area secure, you have time to look around. The nearby ring stands out to you; gain item [b]Item 993[/b]; If X is 4+, the door holds long enough for you to pilfer something else too (gain item [b]Item 982[/b]). Then exit north to [b]Location 358[/b].

580.text: Using the screwdriver, you patch up a loose panel. Gain item [b]Item 875[/b] and exit north to [b]Location 618[/b].

581.text: The robots accept your craft command within minutes. Gain either the benefit of a [0b955e]CRAFT[-] action on a card you control or a simple circuit nani nani ([b]Item 1098[/b]). Either way, exit to [b]Location 492[/b].

582.text: With the area secure, you have time to look around. The nearby trident stands out to you; gain item [b]Item 1090[/b]. If X is 4+, the door holds long enough for you to pilfer something else too (gain item [b]Item 877[/b]). Then exit north to [b]Location 641[/b].

583.text: You take the podium and offer your homeworld’s aid to this planet. Your proposal fascinates the council and lays the groundwork for diplomatic relations. Gain 1 morale.

584.text: With the area secure, you have time to look around. The nearby climbing shoes stand out to you; gain item [b]Item 963[/b]. If X is 4+, the door holds long enough for you to pilfer something else too (gain item [b]Item 1229[/b]). Then exit north to [b]Location 667[/b].

585.text: With the area secure, you have time to look around. The nearby key stands out to you; gain item [b]Item 996[/b]. If X is 4+, the door holds long enough for you to pilfer something else; gain either a book ([b]Item 1044[/b]) or a knife ([b]Item 1209[/b]). Then exit north to [b]Location 681[/b].

586.text: With the area secure, you have time to look around. The nearby ring stands out to you; gain item [b]Item 995[/b]. If X is 4+, the door holds long enough for you to pilfer something else too (gain item [b]Item 916[/b]). Then exit north to [b]Location 687[/b].

587.action: [0b955e]FEED[-] a feast to the fishermen using the fruit and fish they caught
587.text: Your parents taught you how to cook a decent meal, so you smoke some fish with the fruit and some spices you find hanging from the rafters. The sentients are delighted to try something different, and they give you a choice of the totem ([b]Item 899[/b]) or the oxygen mask ([b]Item 964[/b]) as a parting gift. Gain 1 morale and exit to [b]Location 744[/b].

588.text: You scrub the floors clean after learning that the occupant’s partner was recently murdered in the middle of this room in broad daylight. They were on the northern edge of the island when it happened, and they didn’t hear a single sound. The owner of the house pays you to investigate. Gain $3 and quest [b]Item 1645[/b] (add it horizontally to your supply).

589.action: [0b955e]PLACE[-] an offering at the foot of the statue (lose 1 item or flora)
589.text: As you place your item at the foot of the statue, you covertly take another item there. Gain one of the following: the bone mace (item [b]Item 969[/b]), the egg (item [b]Item 977[/b]), the crystal (item [b]Item 1160[/b]), or $5. Exit to [b]Location 763[/b].

590.action: [0b955e]ASSIST[-] a sentient who is struggling with a feisty mount
590.text: The large bird responds well to you, but it seems to want nothing from the sentient, who reluctantly hands you the reins. Gain animal [b]Item 803[/b] and item [b]Item 904[/b]; exit north to [b]Location 770[/b].

591.text: With so many wires, the sword is prone to damage, but you easily repair it. Gain item [b]Item 893[/b] and exit west to [b]Location 780[/b] before your presence is detected.

592.text: The sentient—a master at their craft—reluctantly accepts your assistance. They teach you how to collect the memories that trickle into this mountain palace, showing you the subtle differences in the same memories after they later return. They even show you some of the earliest memories from the people of this world, the awakenings of sentience after the collision resulted in the birth of the 12 elements. With your help, they finish their work early and offer to join you for a stroll. Gain sentient [b]Item 1343[/b] and $3.

596.text: The elder dragon releases a great sigh as you dress the many wounds that have never healed. With every arrow you remove and every poultice you apply, the dragon seems happier and more trusting of you. Gain animal [b]Item 1110[/b]; you may go down the passage and deeper into the planet to cave [b]Location 047[/b].

597.text: With the area secure, you have time to look around. The nearby binoculars stand out to you; gain item [b]Item 972[/b]. If X is 4+, the door holds long enough for you to pilfer something else too (gain item [b]Item 1251[/b]). Then exit north to [b]Location 310[/b].

599.text: The gears on the door have rusted with age; conversely, they make you feel young as you clean them and link them together. Gain 2 health and go deeper into the planet to cave [b]Location 048[/b].

060.text: Refresh X challenge dice in your grid (you may not refresh dice placed during this action). Then, if there are no challenge dice in your grid, gain 1 health. Lastly, roll a skill die and go to where the tides take you: [2694d0]move[-] ([b]Location 057[/b]); [a84fc0]look[-] ([b]Location 056[/b]); [fd8c46]engage[-] ([b]Location 476[/b]); [0b955e]help[-] ([b]Location 452[/b]); [fff349]take[-] ([b]Location 366[/b]); [ec1c3b]overpower[-] ([b]Location 427[/b]).

601.text: The frozen petals inspire you to create a pleasant novelty. Gain item [b]Item 1100[/b].

602.action: [0b955e]CRAFT[-] a simple gold item from a loose intaglio on the chest
602.text: As you remove the golden decoration from the treasure chest, you realize that what’s inside the chest could be far more valuable than the simple trinket you intended to craft. You may either continue with the [fff349]take-[b]DISMANTLE[/b][-] action with a cost reduced by 3 or use the gold to craft a simple zamazingo (gain item [b]Item 1099[/b]).

603.text: If you have a flora or food, let the animal nibble on part of it, then gain animal [b]Item 820[/b]. If not, gain 1 boost.

604.text: The sentient won’t stop walking even as you attempt to heal their wound, but fortunately their pace is so slow that it doesn’t make a difference. When you finish, they snap out of their daze and realize what you’ve done. They’re so grateful that they offer to accompany you. Gain sentient [b]Item 1312[/b] and $3.

605.text: The sentients are surprised to see you emerge from the snow, and they confer briefly amongst themselves. Finally the leader clears their throat and says that they will honor you with the task of cooking them a fine vegetable stew. Gain 1 boost and quest [b]Item 1662[/b] (add it horizontally to your supply).

606.text: The sentient is extremely hesitant to stoop to the level of needing help from you, but they reluctantly admit that they aren’t able to leap across the gap in the cave behind them. If you offer to do it for them, gain $4 and go to cave [b]Location 021[/b].

607.text: If you have flora or food, let the animals nibble on part of it, then gain animal [b]Item 812[/b]. If not, you gain back a little warmth thanks to the animals as they pass by (gain 1 health).

608.action: [0b955e]CRAFT[-] a basic item using some loose circuitry
608.text: You fiddle with the circuits for a few minutes (gain item [b]Item 1098[/b]). The machine won’t respond to you afterward.

609.action: [0b955e]CRAFT[-] a simple gold item from a loose intaglio on the chest
609.text: As you remove the golden decoration from the treasure chest, you realize that the nearby sled could be far more valuable than the simple trinket you intended to craft. You may either continue with the [fff349]take-[b]HIJACK[/b][-] action with a cost reduced by 3 or use the gold to craft a simple zamazingo (gain item [b]Item 1099[/b]).

610.text: If you have flora or food, let the animal nibble on part of it, then gain animal [b]Item 810[/b]. If not, you gain back a little warmth thanks to the animal as it nuzzles against you (gain 1 health).

611.text: You polish the obelisk with vigor, gaining the respect of several circuit sentients in the area. They share with you the knowledge of ice magic. Gain spell [b]Item 1377[/b] and continue.

612.text: A little rewiring did the trick. It appears to be some sort of bypass code or key. Gain item [b]Item 1178[/b].

613.text: A loose panel reveals that the levitation core of the runecaster is disconnected. While you have access to the inside, you pair the device to your augsuit. Gain item [b]Item 1030[/b].

614.text: You kneel before the massive sentient. They nudge you to rise and they reveal that they saw you crash on this planet, and they’re pleased that you emerged from your escape pod much quicker than the Traveler did. They mention that some of your wreckage is to the southwest of here. Gain 2 boost.

615.text: Reconnecting the cord proves easy. A pulse of light ripples outwards from the center seam of the runecaster. Each player gains [a84fc0]1 look[-]; you also gain 1 morale.

616.text: Without its tether, the elemental imprints onto you instead. Gain elemental [b]Item 1399[/b]; if you have it, lose the matching elemental curse.

617.action: [0b955e]CRAFT[-] either a gold or an ice widget
617.text: If you craft with gold, gain item [b]Item 1099[/b]. If you craft with ice, gain item [b]Item 1100[/b].

618.action: [0b955e]OFFER[-] your services to the entities controlling the speakers
618.text: The masks are impressed by your ability to stay connected to your crew via wireless technology. They offer you their assistance in departing this planet if you help them untether. Choose one:

choices.outcome: The masks proudly proclaim that they don’t actually need your help—they’re doing just fine on their own, thank you very much! They try to prove this point by giving you a small piece of their technological advances. Gain item [b]Item 1190[/b].

Gain $4, [0b955e]1 help[-], and destiny [b]Item 1606[/b] (place it in the center). The circuit sentients send you to the northeast, where you can find vehicles that push the limits of their technology.

619.text: The sentient shrugs as if complex circuitry is no big deal, but you can tell they like the ego boost, so you heap on the compliments. Eventually the sentient can’t resist joining you. Gain sentient [b]Item 1310[/b] and 1 boost.

062.action: [0b955e]SHARE[-] a description of the view with your crewmates
062.text: As you describe your vantage, the group feels a sense of camaraderie. Each player may gain 1 random skill. If your result matches that of any other player, you gain 1 morale. Then go to where the tides take you (match your newly gained skill): [2694d0]move[-] ([b]Location 051[/b]); [a84fc0]look[-] ([b]Location 057[/b]); [fd8c46]engage[-] ([b]Location 478[/b]); [0b955e]help[-] ([b]Location 450[/b]); [fff349]take[-] ([b]Location 364[/b]); [ec1c3b]overpower[-] ([b]Location 429[/b]).

620.text: You snip the wires attached to the sentient, attempting to avoid direct contact with the high-voltage metal. Roll 4 skill dice and gain all [fff349]take[-] results. Lose 1 health unless you pay [fff349]1 take[-]. Then gain sentient [b]Item 1326[/b].

621.text: The judges cheer and welcome you to participate in the trial. Continue with the [a84fc0]look-[b]MEMORIZE[/b][-] action.

622.text: They bask in your revelry, tossing some coins at your feet and uploading some advice directly into your brain. Gain $5 and 2 random skills; you may continue.

623.action: [0b955e]CRAFT[-] a simple circuit item, ignoring the hologram
623.text: It only takes a few cords of ivy for you to create a pleasant novelty. Gain item [b]Item 1098[/b].

624.action: [0b955e]PRACTICE[-] your ability to squeeze through tight places
624.text: This isn’t a skill set you often have the chance of practicing, so you take the opportunity as presented. Gain ability [b]Item 1507[/b].

625.action: [0b955e]HONOR[-] the circuit traditions and try to better understand them
625.text: A sentient sees the reverence and curiosity with which you observe the ceremony, and they pull you aside to explain that this is the Lightstone, the spark of life and sentience on this planet. The circuit sentients built their civilization around the Lightstone, believing that they must directly connect their soul to the Lightstone. Gain 3 boost and continue.

626.action: [0b955e]ASSEMBLE[-] a gadget worthy of the attention of the building owners
626.text: Noticing that everything about this place is connected by wires, you patch together a wireless flying drone. The factory workers are in awe of the device, and in exchange for it, they lead you inside and stuff your purse with money. Gain $6 and go to interior [b]Location 581[/b].

627.action: [0b955e]ASSIST[-] a sentient heading toward the city
627.text: The circuit sentient resists your assistance, but they begrudgingly admit they need some help carrying several buckets of crystals from their nearby farm. Gain $4 and go to city [b]Location 521[/b].

628.text: Other crystals in the area have thick wires running through them, but not this one. A farmer notices your handiwork and gives you the pliers in appreciation. Gain item [b]Item 883[/b] and 1 morale.

629.text: Unfortunately, the healing process begins with the removal of the dead limb that keeps the animal tethered to this cliff. Freed at last, it lingers nearby, wanting to trust you. Gain animal [b]Item 808[/b].

630.text: The Traveler contemplates ways for you to assist them, but they instead recommend that you help the animal to the west of here. Gain [0b955e]2 help[-] and continue.

631.action: [0b955e]RELAX[-] to the pleasant ebb and flow of the underwater currents
631.text: Refresh X challenge dice in your grid (you may not refresh dice placed during this action). Then, if there are no challenge dice in your grid, gain 1 health, and you may continue.

632.text: It only takes a few petals for you to create a pleasant novelty. Gain item [b]Item 1096[/b].

633.text: If you have flora or food, let the animal nibble on part of it, then gain animal [b]Item 806[/b]. If not, the animal still gives you a little affection, blowing air into your lungs (whenever you arrive at your next location, ignore any hypoxia damage).

634.text: This thriving area seems like a great place to run a business. You sketch out a few ideas of what you might make. Gain blueprint [b]Item 1298[/b].

635.text: It only takes a few petals for you to create a pleasant novelty. Gain item [b]Item 1096[/b].

636.text: Avoiding being caught in the churning water yourself while pulling the trapped sentient out requires monumental effort and concentration, but you finally succeed. Gain sentient [b]Item 1347[/b].

637.text: It only takes a few petals for you to create a pleasant novelty. Gain item [b]Item 1096[/b].

638.action: [0b955e]BREW[-] a mild tincture from the lotus roots
638.text: You grind the roots into a pulp with makeshift equivalents of a mortar and pestle—plus a hearty wad of saliva—resulting in a sparkling substance. Gain item [b]Item 867[/b].

639.action: [0b955e]CRAFT[-] a basic item from a bone
639.text: Your mind wanders as you carve away at the ivory, and you’re pleased to create a charming bauble. Gain item [b]Item 1092[/b].

640.action: [0b955e]VOLUNTEER[-] to work at the outpost while the guards take a break
640.text: The sentients respect your willingness to step up for duty, and they swim north, excitedly discussing the armory in the City of Waves. You take the opportunity to peek inside the outpost. Go to interior [b]Location 582[/b].

641.action: [0b955e]PRAISE[-] a sentient heading toward the city
641.text: The young sentient is reciting a short speech to themselves; they explain that they’re working on their homework for school. You give them some words of encouragement. Gain 1 morale and go to city [b]Location 528[/b].

642.action: [0b955e]NURTURE[-] the animal with a gentle hand
642.text: The creature brays appreciatively and opens its mouth, revealing a large water-free area occupied by several sentients—it’s an underwater taxi service for landwalkers like you! You may hitch a ride northwest to [b]Location 476[/b], northeast to [b]Location 478[/b], southeast to [b]Location 647[/b], or southwest to [b]Location 635[/b]. When you arrive, ignore the hypoxia damage (if any).

643.action: [0b955e]RESCUE[-] an animal being pulled into the waterspout
643.text: You drag some heavy flotsam toward the animal, using it as leverage to prevent the both of you from succumbing to the funnel. When the animal is safe, it darts to the east and returns with a large egg, presenting it to you in gratitude. Gain item [b]Item 979[/b].

644.text: After patching a small portion of the shattered spaceship, you realize just how big of a task you’ve created for yourself. Gain destiny [b]Item 1605[/b] (place it in the center) and 1 boost. You may either stop or continue with a [0b955e]help-◆5-[b]REPAIR[/b][-] action to weld the pieces into something more cohesive yet still nonfunctional (then read the next result only):

choices.outcome: You step back and admire your work. This part of the spaceship is airtight, but the most difficult job remains. For the spaceship to be even semi-operational, you must rewire it and fix the power supply. Gain 1 morale and [0b955e]1 help[-]. You may either stop or continue with a [0b955e]help-◆7-[b]REPAIR[/b][-] action to obtain a partial spaceship (then read the next result):
The lights flicker on, and your heart sings as the ship hovers above the seabed. Gain vehicle [b]Item 1434[/b].

645.text: The sentient indicates that they don’t need help guarding the king, but they appreciate your desire to enlist. They point you to the City of Waves to the northwest. Gain 1 morale.

646.action: [0b955e]HONOR[-] the creature with a gift (lose 1 card with a coin value from your grid or reserve before rolling the challenge die)
646.text: In appreciation of your offering, the sentient welcomes you as the finest of landwalkers. They offer you the choice of participating in the Trial of Strength to the north (gain item [b]Item 889[/b] and go to [b]Location 647[/b]) or information about the location of a mech suit (gain quest [b]Item 1656[/b]; add it horizontally to your supply).

647.text: The judges cheer and welcome you to participate in the trial. Continue with the [ec1c3b]overpower-[b]FIGHT[/b][-] action.

648.action: [0b955e]CRAFT[-] a simple flora item, keeping your distance from the sharks
648.text: It only takes a few petals for you to create a pleasant novelty; you’re impressed that you pulled off such a feat underwater. Gain item [b]Item 1096[/b] and 1 morale.

649.text: Numerous trips to the surface for air are necessary as you reassemble the broken ship. The job would be even more difficult were it not for the water-resistant wood and the sturdy construction of the ship. Eventually the ship rises from the depths with you at its helm. Gain vehicle [b]Item 1015[/b].

choices.option: Clean some of the gold-like fungal growth from the sentient’s exterior
choices.outcome: The gold peels away, but you worry it will return soon. The sentient mentions that a landwalker friend of theirs to the east is developing a cure. Gain 1 morale and 1 boost.

choices.option: Pay 2 boost from item [b]Item 865[/b] (if you have this item)
choices.outcome: You apply the antidote to the gold-encrusted areas on the sentient, and within minutes they begin to dissolve into the water. The sentient, pain free for the first time in ages, thanks you profusely and gives you $10. While they don’t think their fellow water sentients will care about their renewed health, they know their leaf friend will. Gain quest [b]Item 1655[/b] (if you don’t already have it), then rotate quest [b]Item 1655[/b] and add it to your grid.

651.text: If you have flora or food, let the animal nibble on part of it, then gain animal [b]Item 850[/b]. If not, the animal tries to bite your arm (lose 1 health unless you pay 1 boost or [2694d0]1 move[-]).

652.action: [0b955e]RESCUE[-] whatever or whomever is trapped in the pit
652.text: You perfectly time your rescue attempt when the guards’ attention is elsewhere. Inside the pit is a feeble sentient who follows your lead. Gain sentient [b]Item 1356[/b]. You may pay 1 boost to go to an adjacent location other than north; otherwise, continue.

653.action: [0b955e]CRAFT[-] a simple gold item from a loose intaglio on the chest
653.text: As you remove the golden decoration from the treasure chest, you realize that what’s inside the chest could be far more valuable than the simple trinket you intended to craft. You may either continue with the [fff349]take-[b]DISMANTLE[/b][-] action with a cost reduced by 3 or use the gold to craft a simple zamazingo (gain item [b]Item 1099[/b]).

654.action: [0b955e]PRACTICE[-] possible approaches to clearing the anemones
654.text: Gain the navigate ability ([b]Item 1464[/b]), squeeze ability ([b]Item 1507[/b]), or cut ability ([b]Item 1508[/b]). You may continue.

655.text: The flat ledge and abundance of sunken supplies creates a great opportunity to construct a refuge from the lack of oxygen below the surface. Gain structure [b]Item 1290[/b] and continue.

656.action: [0b955e]CRAFT[-] a simple stone item from the rubble at the mouth of the cave
656.text: Gain item [b]Item 1095[/b]. Up close, the cave doesn’t look as daunting as it did from a distance. If you dare, you may gain [a84fc0]1 look[-] and continue with the [a84fc0]look-[b]EXPLORE[/b][-] action.

657.text: Freed from its tether, elemental imprints onto you instead. Gain elemental [b]Item 1406[/b]; if you have it, lose the matching elemental curse.

658.text: A glowing head appears from the dark depths, and the sentient motions their gratitude. Gain sentient [b]Item 1318[/b].

659.text: You kneel at the edge of the graveyard. As you do, a tendril of light drifts from the bones into your chest, and you have a feeling of renewal. Gain 1 health. You may go north to [b]Location 660[/b], south to [b]Location 658[/b], or west to [b]Location 653[/b]; if you do, don’t suffer hypoxia damage upon arrival. Otherwise, continue.

660.text: If you have flora or food, let the animal nibble on part of it, then gain animal [b]Item 848[/b]. If not, gain 1 health if you suffered hypoxia damage this turn.

661.text: The turtle-like taxi saunters over to you and gestures to its cracked glass shell. You seal a few gaps and climb aboard. Gain vehicle [b]Item 1013[/b] with 2 boost on it.

662.action: [0b955e]ASSIST[-] the hunters with skinning their prey
662.text: In gratitude, the hunters give you a spare pair of climbing shoes ([b]Item 963[/b]) and recommend that you hunt for giant huskroaches to the northeast.

663.action: [0b955e]PRACTICE[-] an ability that might be helpful in the surrounding area
663.text: Gain the ask ability ([b]Item 1470[/b]), steal ability ([b]Item 1482[/b]), or build ability ([b]Item 1488[/b]).

664.text: You sketch out a few ideas of what you might make. Gain blueprint [b]Item 1294[/b].

665.action: [0b955e]VOLUNTEER[-] to fix up some of the cottages
665.text: The overworked landlord is grateful for your assistance. The hovels are built into the hill, and rainstorms have left the ceilings soggy. Gain $10 and continue.

666.text: The tree explains that they are so close to being brought to life as a wood sentient, but the Carver forgot about them. They weep thick, sappy tears and implore you to use the Tools of Creation. Gain [0b955e]1 help[-] and quest [b]Item 1640[/b] (add it horizontally to your supply).

667.action: [0b955e]HONOR[-] the sentients’ traditions by quietly waiting until the right moment and then offering a gift
667.text: The newlyweds soon cross the bridge, solidifying their union. Choose one:

choices.option: Give them each a good-luck coin (pay $2)
choices.outcome: The sentients are touched by this gift from a total stranger, and they insist that you join them for their first meal as a new couple. Gain 2 health.
The sentients are surprised to hear from a stranger, but they’re happy to celebrate with anyone and everyone. They give you a big hug. Gain 1 morale.

668.text: If you have flora or food, let the animal nibble on part of it, then gain animal [b]Item 853[/b]. If not, the animal deposits a shiny coin in your palm, proud to have stolen it from some unsuspecting traveler (gain $1).

669.text: The bulbous fungus yields a greenish salve. Gain item [b]Item 868[/b].

670.action: [0b955e]BREW[-] a mild tincture from the lotus near the rune
670.text: You grind the roots into a pulp with makeshift equivalents of a mortar and pestle—plus a hearty wad of saliva—resulting in a sparkling substance. Gain item [b]Item 867[/b].

671.text: As you describe your vantage, the group feels a sense of camaraderie. Each player may gain 1 random skill. If the random skill you gain matches that of any other player, you gain 1 morale. If not, gain destiny [b]Item 1599[/b] (place it in the center).

672.action: [0b955e]OFFER[-] to help the fisherman with an errand
672.text: The fisherman laments a special crate they lost at sea that contained something priceless to them. They give you a fresh bite of fish as a token of their gratitude. Gain 1 health and quest [b]Item 1634[/b] (add it horizontally to your supply).

673.action: [0b955e]SHARE[-] information with your crewmates or the sentient

choices.outcome: As you describe your vantage, the group feels a sense of camaraderie. Each player may gain 1 random skill. If the random skill you gain matches that of any other player, you gain 1 morale. If not, gain destiny [b]Item 1599[/b] (place it in the center).

You tell a story of your travels to the sentient, who is delighted by your exploits. In turn, they recommend that you speak with the sentient to the north. Gain [2694d0]1 move[-] and [fd8c46]1 engage[-].

choices.option: If you have a food card and pay 1 boost from it
choices.outcome: You stand in the creature’s path, palm outstretched. It accepts the gift tenderly, as if this were the first time anyone had ever done this. Gain animal [b]Item 846[/b].

choices.option: If you don’t pay a boost from a food card
choices.outcome: The animal shares some fruit with you instead. Gain item [b]Item 1224[/b].

675.action: [0b955e]CRAFT[-] a simple gold item from a loose intaglio on the chest
675.text: As you remove the golden decoration from the treasure chest, you realize that what’s inside the chest could be far more valuable than the simple trinket you intended to craft. You may either continue with the [fff349]take-[b]DISMANTLE[/b][-] action with a cost reduced by 3 or use the gold to craft a simple zamazingo (gain item [b]Item 1099[/b]).

676.text: The sentient’s tears soak into your augsuit, and they beg you to deliver an antidote to a dear friend—a water sentient—to the west. Gain item [b]Item 865[/b] and quest [b]Item 1655[/b] (add the quest horizontally to your supply).

677.action: [0b955e]ASSIST[-] a sentient waiting in front of the city
677.text: The sentient says that they’re waiting for the Gatherer of the Forest to return from the southeast with a fresh harvest for their tavern. They ask you to wait for the Gatherer and then bring the harvest to them.

choices.outcome: Gain quest [b]Item 1636[/b] (add it horizontally to your supply).
Go to city [b]Location 519[/b].

678.text: The sentient continues to pace back and forth as they rant about a pair of vicious alien beasts that reign terror over the woodlands to the northeast. If you dare, gain quest [b]Item 1668[/b] (add it horizontally to your supply). If not, gain 1 boost.

679.action: [0b955e]AID[-] a sentient in need or the animal

choices.option: Aid a sentient in need based on a plea illuminated on the orb’s surface
choices.outcome: The outside of the orb includes requests for help from sentients in the area, each promising a generous reward. One such request is from a metal sentient trying to find the end of a rainbow to the east. Gain [2694d0]1 move[-] and quest [b]Item 1703[/b] (add it horizontally to your supply).

Behind the animal are dozens of others like it; this one seems to be their representative. It doesn’t seem to understand your words, so you kneel and let it approach you. It extends a tendril and brushes it against your arm, and after a moment’s contemplation, it seems satisfied by your intentions. Gain animal [b]Item 843[/b].

680.text: If you have flora or food, let the animal nibble on part of it, then gain animal [b]Item 854[/b]. If not, you gain a little morale thanks to the animal as it nuzzles against you (gain 1 morale).

681.action: [0b955e]PRACTICE[-] your skills in the clearing before proceeding
681.text: Gain the defend ability ([b]Item 1478[/b]), trailblaze ability ([b]Item 1484[/b]), squeeze ability ([b]Item 1507[/b]), or cut ability ([b]Item 1508[/b]). You may continue.

682.text: The occupants appreciate your unsolicited aid, saying that they’ve tried to maintain this place they call Ole Hollow. Either gain $5 or invite yourself inside (enter interior [b]Location 586[/b]).

683.text: The leaf sentient deflects the compliment, but you can tell from how they flutter their petal-like shoulders that they take pride in their appearance. They offer you some tea and an activity recommendation. Gain 1 health, 1 boost, and quest [b]Item 1657[/b] (add it horizontally to your supply).

684.text: You quickly realize that the hummingbats aren’t attacking you—they’re acting like a dangerous predator is in their midst. Then you see it: a massive beetle, nearly invisible against a tree trunk. You almost walked right by it. You act as a shield between the beast and the bats, and the beetle skitters away down the tree. The hummingbats nuzzle against you in appreciation and steer you up the staircase; gain 2 morale, and you may go north to [b]Location 689[/b].

685.text: It only takes a few petals for you to create a pleasant novelty. Gain item [b]Item 1096[/b].

686.action: [0b955e]BUILD[-] a business using the abundance of trees
686.text: You sketch out a few ideas of what you might make, whittling absentmindedly at a stick as you do. Gain item [b]Item 1094[/b] and blueprint [b]Item 1298[/b].

687.text: As you describe your vantage, the group feels a sense of camaraderie. Each player may gain 1 random skill. If the random skill you gain matches that of any other player, you gain 1 morale. If not, gain destiny [b]Item 1599[/b] (place it in the center).

688.action: [0b955e]CRAFT[-] a dingsbums from the energy surging through the tower
688.text: As you try to weave the tower’s energy into something pleasant, you realize that you could instead manipulate the same energy to send a signal to your homeworld. You may either continue with the [fd8c46]engage-[b]TRANSMIT[/b][-] action with a cost reduced by 3 or use the energy to gain item [b]Item 1097[/b].

689.text: If you have flora or food, let the cats nibble on part of it, then gain animal [b]Item 827[/b]. If not, you may instead use 2 boost to gain animal [b]Item 827[/b].

690.text: You’re able to improve some the structural integrity of the gateways. To repair them fully, however, some amount of sorcery is required. Gain quest [b]Item 1657[/b] (add it horizontally to your supply). You may continue.

691.text: It’s clear to you that this is a sacred place—not to mention one that is probably well-guarded. You bow deeply toward the monument and step away. As you do, five heavily armed warriors emerge from the roots, returning your bow in unison. One of them gives you a basket of fruit. Gain item [b]Item 1224[/b] and 1 morale.

692.text: If you have flora or food, let the animal nibble on part of it, then gain animal [b]Item 841[/b]. If not, the animal feeds some treats to you, shaking some blue and red berries from within its leafy mane (gain 1 health).

693.text: The judges cheer and welcome you to participate in the trial. Continue with the [2694d0]move-[b]SCALE[/b][-] action.

694.action: [0b955e]HONOR[-] this ancient place by staying away
694.text: As if the ruins recognize your restraint and respect, you feel a purifying wave wash over you. Lose 1 curse and gain 1 morale.

695.action: [0b955e]OFFER[-] to help the owner of the farm
695.text: The farmer, a wood sentient, explains that their entire herd broke free last night. They beg you to search the surrounding area to find them and steer them back here. Gain [2694d0]1 move[-] and quest [b]Item 1702[/b] (add it horizontally to your supply).

696.action: [0b955e]BREW[-] a mild tincture from the lotus roots
696.text: You grind the roots into a pulp with makeshift equivalents of a mortar and pestle—plus a hearty wad of saliva—resulting in a sparkling substance. Gain item [b]Item 867[/b].

697.text: After patching a small portion of the shattered spaceship, you realize just how big of a task you’ve created for yourself. Gain destiny [b]Item 1605[/b] (place it in the center) and 1 boost. You may either stop or continue with a [0b955e]help-◆5-[b]REPAIR[/b][-] action to weld the pieces into something more cohesive yet still nonfunctional (then read the next result only):

choices.outcome: You step back and admire your work. This part of the spaceship is airtight, but the most difficult job remains. For the spaceship to be even semi-operational, you must rewire it and fix the power supply. Gain 1 morale and [0b955e]1 help[-]. You may either stop or continue with a [0b955e]help-◆7-[b]REPAIR[/b][-] action to obtain a partial spaceship (then read the next result):
The lights flicker on, and your heart sings as the ship hovers off the ground. Gain vehicle [b]Item 1434[/b].

698.action: [0b955e]CRAFT[-] a simple stone item from the rubble at the mouth of the cave
698.text: Gain item [b]Item 1095[/b]. Up close, the cave looks even more inviting than it did from a distance. If you dare, you may gain [a84fc0]1 look[-] and continue with the [a84fc0]look-[b]EXPLORE[/b][-] action.

699.text: Nearby travelers applaud the new bridge and give you a spare toothbrush in appreciation, saying it’ll result in friendlier conversations in the capital city to the north. Gain item [b]Item 1208[/b]; you may go north to [b]Location 779[/b] (if you do, also gain [0b955e]2 help[-] from the runecaster on the far side of the gully).

700.action: [0b955e]CRAFT[-] a basic item from a bone
700.text: Your mind wanders as you carve away at the ivory, and you’re pleased to create a charming bauble. Gain item [b]Item 1092[/b].

701.text: Choose a specific animal, sentient, flora, or item from your grid or reserve to place inside the box:

choices.outcome: The animal disappears and doesn’t return. Lose the animal and gain 1 boost. Continue.
The sentient disappears and doesn’t return. Lose the sentient and gain 1 boost. Continue.
The flora just sits in the box—nothing happens. Gain 1 boost and continue.
The item just sits in the box—nothing happens. Gain 1 boost and continue.

702.action: [0b955e]BREW[-] a mild tincture from the lotus roots
702.text: The creature lurking behind the lotus lashes out, making a simple brew a considerably more difficult challenge. Having fended off the beast, you grind the lotus roots into a pulp with makeshift equivalents of a mortar and pestle—plus a hearty wad of saliva— resulting in a sparkling substance. Gain item [b]Item 867[/b].

703.text: The energy in their joints sizzles appreciatively, and they toss a map case at your feet. “With the trials almost complete, I don’t need this anymore.” Gain item [b]Item 1261[/b]; the sentient highlights your current location (view page 18 in the Book of Vantages; you are in region J).

704.action: [0b955e]AID[-] a sentient in need based on a plea illuminated on the orb’s surface
704.text: The outside of the orb includes requests for help from sentients in the area, each promising a generous reward. One such request is to recover a stolen soulstone; the instructions (from a sentient to the northeast of here) say that the stone was taken to a bandit hideout to the north of this orb. Gain 1 boost and quest [b]Item 1654[/b] (add it horizontally to your supply).

705.text: If you have flora or food, let the animal nibble on part of it, then gain animal [b]Item 838[/b]. If not, the animal still seems content to enjoy some friendly company for a moment (gain 1 morale).

706.text: You scare away the animal’s pursuers, and the exhausted animal eases to the ground nearby, nuzzling into your palm. Gain animal [b]Item 840[/b].

707.text: As you describe your vantage, the group feels a sense of camaraderie. Each player may gain 1 random skill. If the random skill you gain matches that of any other player, you gain 1 morale. If not, gain destiny [b]Item 1599[/b] (place it in the center).

708.text: The stone sentient is almost inconsolable, but you manage to understand that their child needs some help to the north. If you will help, gain [2694d0]1 move[-] and go north to [b]Location 709[/b]; otherwise gain 1 boost.

709.action: [0b955e]RESCUE[-] the person or people at the other end of the rope
709.text: You find a young sentient wedged within a crack in the column. After you wiggle them free, you lower them to the ground and give them a big hug. Gain sentient [b]Item 1346[/b] and ability [b]Item 1513[/b].

710.action: [0b955e]ASSEMBLE[-] a zipline to connect the ledge to the area below
710.text: A nearby traveler applauds the effort and gives you a spare pair of translating glasses in appreciation, saying you’ll need it in the capital city to the west. Gain item [b]Item 925[/b]; you may go north to [b]Location 711[/b].

711.text: Having remained alone in one place for so long, the lizard was in dire need of a little care and attention. You soothe its stress and inject some revitalizing meds between the cracks of its stone-like skin. Gain animal [b]Item 837[/b].

712.text: A pulse of light ripples outwards from the center seam of the runecaster. Each player gains 1 skill matching the rune. You also gain 1 morale.

713.text: After patching a small portion of the shattered spaceship, you realize just how big of a task you’ve created for yourself. Gain destiny [b]Item 1605[/b] (place it in the center) and 1 boost. You may either stop or continue with a [0b955e]help-◆5-[b]REPAIR[/b][-] action to weld the pieces into something more cohesive yet still nonfunctional (then read the next result only):

choices.outcome: You step back and admire your work. This part of the spaceship is airtight, but the most difficult job remains. For the spaceship to be even semi-operational, you must rewire it and fix the power supply. Gain 1 morale and [0b955e]1 help[-]. You may either stop or continue with a [0b955e]help-◆7-[b]REPAIR[/b][-] action to obtain a partial spaceship (then read the next result):
The lights flicker on, and your heart sings as the ship hovers off the ground. Gain vehicle [b]Item 1434[/b].

714.text: The sentient is grateful for the offer, explaining that their sibling recently wandered too far from home and was captured by enterprising metal sentients to the far north. Gain $2, [2694d0]1 move[-], and quest [b]Item 1652[/b] (add it horizontally to your supply).

715.text: The sentient waves away your respect, but you can tell they appreciate the gesture. “This is my family business,” they say. They offer to identify and bestow your soul upon you. Roll a skill die and gain a crystal matching the resulting color ([2694d0]blue[-]: [b]Item 1160[/b]; [a84fc0]purple[-]: [b]Item 1161[/b]; [fd8c46]orange[-]: [b]Item 1162[/b]; [0b955e]green[-]: [b]Item 1163[/b]; [fff349]yellow[-]: [b]Item 1164[/b]; [ec1c3b]red[-]: [b]Item 1165[/b]). If you already have that exact crystal, the Soulkeeper nods knowingly and instead offers you some insight into using that crystal (gain 2 skills matching its color).

716.action: [0b955e]CRAFT[-] a simple stone item from the rubble at the mouth of the cave
716.text: Gain item [b]Item 1095[/b]. Up close, the cave doesn’t look as steep as it did from a distance. If you dare, you may gain [a84fc0]1 look[-] and continue with the [a84fc0]look-[b]EXPLORE[/b][-] action.

717.action: [0b955e]BREW[-] using some fresh water and the nearby flora
717.text: The orange petals of the flower dissolve into the water, then quickly thicken into an acidic paste. Gain item [b]Item 859[/b].

718.text: The sentient’s voice sounds like rocks grinding together as they explain that a group of bandits—metal sentients—stole their soulstone and took it to the west. Gain [fff349]1 take[-] and quest [b]Item 1654[/b] (add it horizontally to your supply).

719.action: [0b955e]BUILD[-] a castle in the clouds from the framework of the ruins
719.text: This peak provides a fortified position for you to settle down and make a home in these mountains. Gain structure [b]Item 1265[/b].

720.action: [0b955e]CRAFT[-] a basic item from a bone
720.text: Your mind wanders as you carve away at the ivory, and you’re pleased to create a charming bauble. Gain item [b]Item 1092[/b].

721.text: The judges cheer and welcome you to participate in the trial. Continue with the [a84fc0]look-[b]CALCULATE[/b][-] action.

722.action: [0b955e]HONOR[-] someone you love by performing a leap of faith
722.text: Trusting the low gravity in this region of the world, you gather your courage and step off the path into the clouds. As you do, close your eyes and think of someone specific to honor (friend, family member, pet, etc.): It feels like you’re floating forever. As you do, the thing you value most about your honoree comes to mind. Choose one:

choices.outcome: Gain 2 health. When you open your eyes, you’re on the opposite path. Gain 1 morale and go north to [b]Location 723[/b].
Gain 2 morale. When you open your eyes, you’re on the opposite path. Gain 1 morale and go north to [b]Location 723[/b].
Gain 2 boost. When you open your eyes, you’re on the opposite path. Gain 1 morale and go north to [b]Location 723[/b].

723.action: [0b955e]PRACTICE[-] an ability that might be useful here or in the surrounding area
723.text: Gain the leap ability ([b]Item 1486[/b]), scale ability ([b]Item 1503[/b]), or force ability ([b]Item 1512[/b]). If you choose the scale ability, you may continue with a [2694d0]move-[b]SCALE[/b][-] action.

724.text: If you have flora or food, let the animal nibble on part of it, then gain animal [b]Item 837[/b] and continue with the [fd8c46]engage-[b]PICK[/b][-] action at a cost reduced by 2. If not, the animal wanders away from the treasure chest; gain [fd8c46]1 engage[-].

725.action: [0b955e]BUILD[-] an agricultural establishment in this well-traveled area
725.text: You sketch out a few ideas of what you might make. Gain blueprint [b]Item 1296[/b].

726.text: You stand between the travelers and the giant, warding it away while the sentients escape. Gain 1 morale.

727.action: [0b955e]ASSIST[-] a sentient heading toward the city
727.text: The sentient appreciates the help carrying cartons of medical gear toward the hospital. Gain $3 and go to city [b]Location 523[/b].

728.action: [0b955e]TEACH[-] the sentient how to fall without injuring themselves
728.text: Your mandatory space cadet safety training comes in handy from time to time! The sentient is appreciative of your advice, and they invite you to watch them attempt the famous Leap of Faith. If you agree, gain sentient [b]Item 1347[/b] and go west to [b]Location 722[/b]. If not, they request that you look for their lost pet, a hovertail that recently flew off to the east (gain quest [b]Item 1650[/b]; add it horizontally to your supply).

729.text: Without its tether, the elemental imprints onto you instead. Gain elemental [b]Item 1405[/b]; if you have it, lose the matching elemental curse.

730.action: [0b955e]CRAFT[-] a simple stone item from the rubble at the mouth of the cave
730.text: Gain item [b]Item 1095[/b]. Up close, you realize the mine is better lit than you originally thought. If you dare, you may gain [a84fc0]1 look[-] and continue with the [a84fc0]look-[b]EXPLORE[/b][-] action.

731.text: After patching a small portion of the shattered spaceship, you realize just how big of a task you’ve created for yourself. Gain destiny [b]Item 1605[/b] (place it in the center) and 1 boost. You may either stop or continue with a [0b955e]help-◆5-[b]REPAIR[/b][-] action to weld the pieces into something more cohesive yet still nonfunctional (then read the next result only):

choices.outcome: You step back and admire your work. This part of the spaceship is airtight, but the most difficult job remains. For the spaceship to be even semi-operational, you must rewire it and fix the power supply. Gain 1 morale and [0b955e]1 help[-]. You may either stop or continue with a [0b955e]help-◆7-[b]REPAIR[/b][-] action to obtain a partial spaceship (then read the next result):
The lights flicker on, and your heart sings as the ship hovers off the ground. Gain vehicle [b]Item 1434[/b].

732.text: After patching a small portion of the decaying spaceship, you realize just how big of a task you’ve created for yourself. Gain destiny [b]Item 1605[/b] (place it in the center) and 1 boost. You may either stop or continue with a [0b955e]help-◆5-[b]REPAIR[/b][-] action to weld the pieces into something more cohesive yet still nonfunctional (then read the next result only):

choices.outcome: The further you get into the repairs, the more you’re fascinated by this particular ship. It’s similar to your vessel, but some of the technology is slightly more advanced, yet the overgrowth on the ship indicates that it crashed here long before yours. Gain 2 boost. You may either stop or continue with a [0b955e]help-◆6-[b]REPAIR[/b][-] action to fire up the thrusters.

You step back and admire your work. This part of the spaceship is airtight, but the most difficult job remains. For the spaceship to be even semi-operational, you must rewire the navigational system. Gain 1 boost and 1 morale. You may either stop or continue with a [0b955e]help-◆7-[b]REPAIR[/b][-] action to obtain a partial spaceship (then read the next result):
The lights flicker on, and your heart sings as the ship hovers off the ground. Gain vehicle [b]Item 1434[/b].

733.text: It’s clear to you that this is a sacred place. You bow deeply toward the pearl and step away. Sentients in the area are pleased by the gesture of respect, and they reward you with some local ointment. Gain item [b]Item 868[/b] and continue, as the sentients assure you it’s perfectly fine to go touch the pearl.

734.text: You have absolutely no idea what you’re doing, as your training did not include healing rifts in spacetime. With your instincts and intuition as your only guides, you find a way to fold the rift into itself as if it were quantum pizza dough. When you’re finished, you have a heightened sense of understanding of the universe. Gain lesson [b]Item 1433[/b].

735.text: The sentient lowers their hands and peeks out of the orb, explaining that they’ve been trying to get it to levitate. They give you a pair of goggles linked to their own so they can see what you see (gain item [b]Item 941[/b]) and ask you to scout the floating rocks to the northwest (gain quest [b]Item 1675[/b]; add it horizontally to your supply).

736.text: The task is a nice distraction from the heat. Gain item [b]Item 1091[/b] and continue.

737.text: The sentient appreciates the gesture. “I can’t believe my dear Timber is gone,” they say. “And just days before the annual fishing challenge—they haven’t lost in years! Would you like to come inside for a few minutes? I can make tea.” Gain 1 boost; you may go to interior [b]Location 588[/b].

738.text: The sentient appreciates the assistance as they load their boat. They steer you into the city; gain $2 and go to city [b]Location 527[/b].

739.text: It’s clear to you that this is a sacred place to the pirates—not to mention one that is probably well-guarded. You bow deeply toward the island and step away. As you do, several pirates swing into the water from the jungle and return your bow. They share a flagon of ale with you and recommend you visit the spaceship wreckage to the southwest. Gain 1 morale and 1 boost.

740.text: The sentient says their family has been growing a tree here for the last 100 years to use for a magnificent vessel. The tree was here just a week ago, and now it’s gone! The only hope is to find the rare seeds in a cave to the southeast and somehow accelerate the growth of the tree. Choose one:

choices.outcome: The sentient notices the seeds spilling from your pocket. They are very excited by this, and they beg you to plant the seeds here, walk through the time portal to the north, and find the future version of this location. If you accept, lose item [b]Item 1020[/b] to gain sentient [b]Item 1364[/b] and quest [b]Item 1699[/b] (add the quest horizontally to your supply). Otherwise, gain 3 boost.
Gain 1 boost and [2694d0]1 move[-].

741.action: [0b955e]BUILD[-] a business in front of the gateway, assuming this is an important junction for travel and commerce
741.text: You sketch out a few ideas of what you might make. Gain blueprint [b]Item 1298[/b].

742.text: The sentient places a floppy hand on your forehead, soaking in your knowledge and history. As a token of their appreciation, they give you a special map. Gain item [b]Item 1264[/b]; the sentient highlights your current location (view page 21 in the Book of Vantages; you are in region H).

743.action: [0b955e]OFFER[-] to help, gesturing toward the sentient on the shore
743.text: The water sentient explains that the frantic person on the shore has been accused of murder in a small vacation home to the west. They suspect foul play, so before alerting the authorities, they request your help with the investigation. Gain sentient [b]Item 1359[/b] and quest [b]Item 1645[/b] (add the quest horizontally to your supply).

744.action: [0b955e]ASSIST[-] a sentient as they debone freshly caught fish
744.text: The sentient is grateful for the help. Before you depart, they give you a fish trap and challenge you to bring back an even bigger fish from the depths of the ocean. Gain item [b]Item 910[/b] and quest [b]Item 1660[/b] (add the quest horizontally to your supply).

745.text: In appreciation of your unsolicited effort, the owner gives you a big hug and a few coins. Gain $2 and 1 morale.

746.text: You sketch out a few ideas of what you might make. Gain blueprint [b]Item 1294[/b].

747.text: You snap off a brittle piece of the nearby flora, its sap dripping down your hand. The thirsty animal laps up the liquid. Gain animal [b]Item 834[/b].

748.action: [0b955e]ASSIST[-] a sentient heading toward the city
748.text: Their hands are full of glassblowing instruments, and they reluctantly appreciate the help. Gain $3 and go to city [b]Location 531[/b].

749.action: [0b955e]BREW[-] a mild tincture from the lotus roots
749.text: You grind the roots into a pulp with makeshift equivalents of a mortar and pestle—plus a hearty wad of saliva—resulting in a sparkling substance. Gain item [b]Item 867[/b].

750.text: You assumed at first that the kraken was the antagonist, but then you see how the villagers vilify the creature and throw stones at it without provocation. The kraken could have attacked them long ago, yet it didn’t. You give it permission to go to shore and live up to the reputation unfairly given to it. After the kraken returns to the sea, you find a totem among the damaged beach huts. Gain item [b]Item 899[/b] and [0b955e]1 help[-].

751.action: [0b955e]SHARE[-] your rations with the child and their pet
751.text: As the child munches on the food, they invite you on a grand adventure they’ve been planning for ages. Gain 1 morale, 1 boost, and quest [b]Item 1643[/b] (add it horizontally to your supply).

752.text: Without its tether, the elemental imprints onto you instead. Gain elemental [b]Item 1404[/b]; if you have it, lose the matching elemental curse.

753.text: The beautiful creature is dehydrated and exhausted; you direct some nutrients from your augsuit directly into it. The rider is grateful beyond words, and they offer to guide you to the Trial of Speed. They give you a saddle (gain item [b]Item 958[/b]) and transport you north (go to [b]Location 754[/b]).

754.text: The judges cheer and welcome you to participate in the trial. Continue with the [2694d0]move-[b]SPEED[/b][-] action.

755.action: [0b955e]CRAFT[-] a rowboat from the wreckage to give to the sentient
755.text: With the sentient’s permission, you use some of the scrap wood from the wreckage to cobble together a small boat. The sentient offers some tips while you work, and eventually they join you. It’s a humble vessel compared to what the ship must have looked like, but it’s seaworthy. Gain vehicle [b]Item 1014[/b] and 1 morale.

756.action: [0b955e]CRAFT[-] a simple gold item from a loose intaglio on the chest
756.text: As you remove the golden decoration from the treasure chest, you realize that what’s inside the chest could be far more valuable than the simple trinket you intended to craft. You may either continue with the [fff349]take-[b]DISMANTLE[/b][-] action with a cost reduced by 3 or use the gold to craft a simple zamazingo (gain item [b]Item 1099[/b]).

757.action: [0b955e]CRAFT[-] a simple stone item from stones rubbed smooth by the waterfalls
757.text: You fashion an uncomplicated doodad from the rocks. Gain item [b]Item 1095[/b].

758.text: The beast resists your calm approach, but eventually it’s paralyzed by pain. It breathes a sigh of relief as you dislodge a bone from its throat. Gain animal [b]Item 832[/b].

759.text: The sentients don’t particularly want your help, but they say that if you have time to spare, you could do them a favor and protect the besieged fortress to the north. Gain $3 and quest [b]Item 1659[/b] (add it horizontally to your supply).

076.action: [0b955e]CRAFT[-] a simple wind item from a wind chime
076.text: There’s no one in the room to stop you, so you take your time to create an air huppeldepup. Gain item [b]Item 1102[/b].

760.text: The invaders offer no explanation for the battle; they simply hand you a shield and send you to war. Gain item [b]Item 939[/b] and quest [b]Item 1694[/b] (add the quest horizontally to your supply).

761.action: [0b955e]ASSIST[-] a sentient heading into the city
761.text: The sentient is carrying a basket of assorted items—”gifts for the Founder!” they say. They give you a hug in appreciation for the help. Gain 1 morale and go north to [b]Location 762[/b].

762.action: [0b955e]TEACH[-] the sentient the nuances of your language
762.text: The sentient is excited by the opportunity to communicate with an alien like you, and they join you on your journey. Gain sentient [b]Item 1328[/b].

763.text: If you lose 1 item, gain 2 morale as nearby sentients praise your generosity and guide you inside the towering building (go to interior [b]Location 589[/b]). If you don’t lose an item, gain 1 morale and continue.

764.text: The sentient leans their wings against you while staggering off the street onto a bench, where you wait patiently for them to sober up. In the meantime they ask if you can help them with a task. Gain item [b]Item 1158[/b] and quest [b]Item 1641[/b] (add the quest horizontally to your supply).

765.action: [0b955e]ASSIST[-] the ground crew with a stubborn knot
765.text: The crewmembers are grateful for your strong fingers, and they invite you to join them for a drink at a local tavern a little south of here. Choose one:

choices.outcome: You don’t understand much of what the sentients say, but the drinks are good and the camaraderie is a nice change of pace. Gain 1 morale. You step away for some fresh air and find yourself alone in the stables. Go to interior [b]Location 590[/b].
The sentients give you some pointers and bid you farewell. Gain [2694d0]1 move[-] and $2.

766.action: [0b955e]PRAISE[-] the integrity of the vessel and its passengers
766.text: The sentient and the Traveler wave at you in gratitude before drifting away. Gain 2 morale.

767.action: [0b955e]ASSIST[-] a sentient heading toward the city
767.text: The sentient is struggling to balance a heavy barrel of liquid and a large metal bird, so you lend a hand. Gain $3 and 1 morale.

768.action: [0b955e]ASSIST[-] the disoriented sentient to the right
768.text: The sentient thanks you for your help but laughs off the concern—they were waiting for a friend who hasn’t shown up. You offer to accompany them instead. Gain sentient [b]Item 1360[/b].

769.action: [0b955e]VOLUNTEER[-] to help with an undesirable task
769.text: The bulky sentient smirks and leads you to the stables, where they point at a pile of manure, flick a coin at you, and leave you alone. Gain $1 and go to interior [b]Location 590[/b].

077.text: The sentient is surprised by your presence, but their fluttering wings betray their pleasure at your compliment. When they finish the game, they offer to take you on a tour of the top level. Gain sentient [b]Item 1309[/b] and go to interior [b]Location 078[/b].

770.text: In appreciation of your unsolicited effort, the owner gives you a big hug and a few coins. Gain $2 and 1 morale.

771.action: [0b955e]OFFER[-] to help the crew load the ship
771.text: The crew is happy for an extra pair of hands, and when the job is done, they offer you a choice of $3 or a barrel (gain item [b]Item 1158[/b]). You may continue.

772.action: [0b955e]AID[-] the ship’s attempt to leave the bay
772.text: Bullies tend to stand down when others stand up against them, and that’s the case here. The captain expresses their gratitude by inviting you aboard. Gain vehicle [b]Item 1015[/b].

773.action: [0b955e]ASSEMBLE[-] a crude ladder from the nearby trees
773.text: The assembly process takes longer than you hoped, but you’re pleased with the result. Gain 1 morale and go north to [b]Location 774[/b].

774.action: [0b955e]OFFER[-] to run an errand for the sentient
774.text: The sentient complains of vagrants slipping through the lax bridge security and robbing them in the night. They and their friend, the smelter, are desperate for protective measures, and they ask whether you could guard the bridge for the night. They toss you a few coins and speak of a greater reward later. Gain $2 and quest [b]Item 1680[/b] (add it horizontally to your supply).

775.text: The sentient nods appreciatively and takes a hearty swig. They comment on a piece of your armor and, after sizing you up, they ask whether you’d walk with them out of the city. If you accept, gain sentient [b]Item 1334[/b] and go southwest to [b]Location 768[/b].

776.text: You can either learn some crafting tips from the vendor (gain ability [b]Item 1462[/b]) or you can deliver a package for them (gain item [b]Item 1034[/b] and quest [b]Item 1638[/b]; add the quest horizontally to your supply). Either way, they appreciate your eagerness to help, and they offer you a discounted price on a robe; you may pay $4 to gain item [b]Item 966[/b].

777.action: [0b955e]OFFER[-] your services to the structure’s occupants
777.text: The sentient salutes your assistance and offers to pay you to keep watch while they take a break. You may either gain 1 boost and continue, or lose 1 time to gain $5.

778.text: You clear the tree of dead branches and rotten fruit. A local juice vendor notices the effort and gives you a half-empty barrel in gratitude. Gain item [b]Item 1158[/b].

779.text: As you describe your vantage, the group feels a sense of camaraderie. Each player may gain 1 random skill. If the random skill you gain matches that of any other player, you gain 1 morale. If not, gain destiny [b]Item 1599[/b] (place it in the center).

078.text: The tired sentient welcomes your aid. They explain that they are kept here against their will by the Spormonger. If you have the Spormonger (sentient [b]Item 1309[/b]), you may lose them to gain sentient [b]Item 1319[/b]. If not, you may simply gain sentient [b]Item 1319[/b]. Either way, exit to [b]Location 346[/b].

780.action: [0b955e]CRAFT[-] a simple wood curio while enjoying the background noise of rushing water
780.text: Your mind wanders to and from the crafting process, so the end result is a surprise even to you. Gain item [b]Item 1094[/b].

781.text: The sentient sobs about the loss of an item that they crafted as a gift, but the kindness of a stranger is uplifting to them. Gain sentient [b]Item 1344[/b]; you may offer to join them on a calming stroll through the gardens to the south (go to [b]Location 780[/b]).

782.text: The sentient appears ashamed to accept your aid, but they reluctantly agree. They are being chased by the sentient lurking in the background, and they need an armed escort to the east. Gain sentient [b]Item 1353[/b] and quest [b]Item 1665[/b] (add the quest horizontally to your supply).

783.text: You sense that something is weighing on the gold sentient’s bulky shoulders. They lower their voice to admit that they’re not supposed to leave their post at the bank’s vault before their replacement arrives, and now they’re worried that no one is guarding the treasure inside. Gain 2 boost. “Would you mind checking for me?” they ask. If you accept, go to cave [b]Location 030[/b].

784.action: [0b955e]BUILD[-] a structure from the framework of the ruins
784.text: Examining what remains of the ancient floorplan, you sketch out a few ideas of what you might make. Gain blueprint [b]Item 1294[/b].

785.action: [0b955e]VOLUNTEER[-] your support those on the bridge
785.text: The guards atop the bridge look at each other and nod in agreement. As they pull you up, they share that budget cuts to the city watch have resulted in waves of thieves crossing the bridge at night. Gain $1 and quest [b]Item 1680[/b] (add it horizontally to your supply).

786.text: The three broad-shouldered guards chuckle at your offer, assuring you that your services would be better employed elsewhere. In fact, they mention that the bridge to the south could use some help. Gain [fd8c46]1 engage[-] and quest [b]Item 1680[/b] (add it horizontally to your supply). You may continue.

787.text: Refresh X challenge dice in your grid (you may not refresh dice placed during this action). Then, if there are no challenge dice in your grid, gain 1 health, and you may continue.

788.text: All the sentient requests is that you serve as a distraction for the other vendors in the square for 5 seconds—that’s all it’ll take for them to rob each of them, and they’ll split the proceeds with you. Choose one:

choices.outcome: You pretend to faint with as much dramatic flair as you can muster. When the crowd finally realizes you’re okay, you meet the sentient off to the side, and they commend your effort. Gain ability [b]Item 1481[/b] and $5.

You announce the sentient’s intentions to the other vendors, who drive away the thief, but not before they curse you for your betrayal. Fortunately, the vendors share their appreciation with you. Gain curse [b]Item 1391[/b], 1 morale, and 1 health.

789.action: [0b955e]OFFER[-] to find a rare item for the sentient
789.text: The sentient gestures to the far north, requesting that you obtain an aether lantern for them. It’s being held indoors by energy sentients. Gain [2694d0]1 move[-] and quest [b]Item 1648[/b] (add it horizontally to your supply).

079.text: You nudge rotating boulders at just the right angles so they wedge into each other, forming a natural bridge down to the central pillar. Gain ability [b]Item 1506[/b] and go deeper into the planet to cave [b]Location 046[/b].

790.action: [0b955e]BUILD[-] a better stand for the book
790.text: Such an important book deserves a truly impressive pedestal. The author of the book takes notice and decides to put a better copy of the book on the stand; they give you the older copy. Gain item [b]Item 1045[/b].

791.action: [0b955e]RESCUE[-] the child in the life support capsule
791.text: A young girl is locked into a peaceful, centuries-long cryogenic slumber. As you observe her, the Traveler appears by your side, their holographic visage gesturing toward the chamber. “I’ve wandered this planet as a hologram for far too long. I love this world, but I miss my home. Please don’t risk removing me from this chamber. You are my only hope.” If you have mission [b]Item 1596[/b], read entry [b]Location 791[/b] in the Book of Secrets. Otherwise, gain 1 boost and destiny [b]Item 1605[/b]. You may either exit to [b]Location 732[/b] (this option is recommended if you already have a spaceship or a vehicle you are in the process of upgrading to a spaceship) or continue with a [0b955e]help-◆3-[b]REPAIR[/b][-] action to start the rebuilding process in the hopes of rescuing the child (then read the next result only). If you decide to exit, you can return later to perform this action:

choices.outcome: After patching a small portion of the shattered spaceship, you realize just how big of a task you’ve created for yourself. Gain 2 boost. You may either stop or continue with a [0b955e]help-◆5-[b]REPAIR[/b][-] action to weld the pieces into something more cohesive yet still nonfunctional (then read the next result only):

You step back and admire your work. This part of the spaceship is airtight, but the most difficult job remains. For the spaceship to be even semi-operational, you must rewire it and fix the power supply. Gain 1 morale and [0b955e]1 help[-]. You may either stop or continue with a [0b955e]help-◆7-[b]REPAIR[/b][-] action to obtain a partial spaceship (then read the next result):

The lights flicker on, and your heart sings as the ship hovers off the ground. Gain vehicle [b]Item 1434[/b], the Traveler safe and sound inside. You don’t know what the future holds for them, but you are hopeful that the esteemed medical crew on your homeworld will help to save them.

795.text: As you kneel, a metal sentient emerges from the shadows and taps you on the shoulder. “Excuse me,” they say. “What are you doing?” They go on to say that this building has been left to the sands of time, which is ironic given that the stained glass window was designed by ancient sand sentients to honor the interconnected nature of the past, present, and future. The sentient is planning to steal the book, but they let you look at it first. View page 23 of the Book of Vantages, then gain 2 boost and exit to [b]Location 281[/b].

799.text: Part of an old ladder leans against the far wall, as if another prisoner attempted to escape but didn’t complete the job. You’re able to make it tall enough to reach halfway up the wall. Gain [2694d0]3 move[-] and continue.

080.text: The sweltering sentient welcomes your assistance, and you make small talk about safecracking while you melt the gold. Gain sentient [b]Item 1339[/b] and $1; you may continue.

801.text: You kneel before the precious shard—surely it must be precious to be hidden on such a remote sky island. As you bow your head, the shard drifts toward you. Perhaps it does not wish to be kept hidden any longer. Gain item [b]Item 1707[/b].

081.action: [0b955e]CRAFT[-] a bauble from some loose wires
081.text: Weaving together the pliable strands is a mindless but oddly satisfying task. Gain item [b]Item 1098[/b] and 1 morale.

082.text: At best, you’re a novice ice sculptor, but you manage to create something mildly pleasant. Gain item [b]Item 1100[/b].

083.text: Out of curiosity, you break off a loose piece of the gateway and mold it into a trinket. Gain item [b]Item 1097[/b] and continue.

084.action: [0b955e]ASSEMBLE[-] a proper guardrail and bridge on the precipitous ledge
084.text: Just as you finish the assembly process, you turn to see a sentient lurch out onto the rock. They would have tumbled off the edge were it not for the newly constructed railing. Recognizing your workmanship, they pledge their loyalty to you. Gain sentient [b]Item 1311[/b] and go deeper into the planet to cave [b]Location 048[/b].

085.text: If you don’t pay, the sentient remains a spectator, confiding in you that it’s for the best (gain 1 morale). If you pay $3 to the fight club on behalf of the sentient, they embrace you in a sweaty hug and promise to bring back the grand prize; seconds later they’re carted out of the arena, leaving their sword in your hands. Gain item [b]Item 887[/b] and continue.

086.action: [0b955e]CRAFT[-] an item using the pliable magma
086.text: All you can create is a fairly useless doodad, but it has potential to be much more. Gain item [b]Item 1101[/b].

087.text: While some of the miners are here of their own will and accord, others are not. You quietly unchain one sentient at a time, gesturing toward the exit. One wood sentient refuses to leave your side. Gain sentient [b]Item 1362[/b] and either go toward the surface to cave [b]Location 027[/b] or go deeper into the planet to cave [b]Location 049[/b].

088.text: You curl up in the bedroll within the nook. Refresh X challenge dice in your grid (you may not refresh dice placed during this action). Then, if there are no challenge dice in your grid, gain 1 health, and you may continue. Also gain the bedroll ([b]Item 1040[/b]).

089.text: As you describe your vantage, the group feels a sense of camaraderie. Each player may gain 1 random skill. If the random skill you gain matches that of any other player, you gain 1 morale. If not, gain destiny [b]Item 1599[/b] (place it in the center).

090.action: [0b955e]CRAFT[-] a zamazingo from a lump of gold
090.text: Your mind wanders as you craft, and you’re surprised to see what your subconscious creates. Gain item [b]Item 1099[/b].

091.action: [0b955e]CRAFT[-] a simple gold item from a loose intaglio on the chest
091.text: As you remove the golden decoration from the treasure chest, you realize that what’s inside the chest could be far more valuable than the simple trinket you intended to craft. You may either continue with the [fff349]take-[b]DISMANTLE[/b][-] action with a cost reduced by 3 or use the gold to craft a simple zamazingo (gain item [b]Item 1099[/b]).

092.action: [0b955e]RELAX[-] in the serenity of the underwater cave
092.text: Refresh X challenge dice in your grid (you may not refresh dice placed during this action). Then, if there are no challenge dice in your grid, gain 1 health, and you may continue.

093.action: [0b955e]CRAFT[-] a glider to fly over the maze
093.text: Using spare parts, you patch together a glider. Gain vehicle [b]Item 957[/b]; you may go deeper into the planet to cave [b]Location 043[/b].

094.action: [0b955e]ASSIST[-] a sentient heading toward the city
094.text: They have a magical blue haze around their head, and you help to steer them into the city, where they march into the first door on your left. Gain 1 morale and go to city [b]Location 041[/b].

095.action: [0b955e]HONOR[-] the nest by steering clear of the eggs
095.text: Recognizing your deliberate effort, the mother of the eggs emerges from the shadows and guides you to a passage in the rear of the cavern. Proceed deeper into the planet to dungeon [b]Location 596[/b]; keep this location for reference.

954.text: You may replace this with a glider ([b]Item 957[/b]) or decide instead to keep the hammock (gain 1 boost).

956.text: Gain X boost on this card.

choices.option: If you have an animal, feed it to the dragon
choices.outcome: The dragon eats the sacrificial offering with a single chomp and greedily begs for more. Lose the animal, then gain animal [b]Item 807[/b].

choices.option: If you don’t have an animal or have one but don’t want to feed it to the dragon
choices.outcome: The dragon strikes at you again. Roll 4 skill dice and gain all [2694d0]move[-] results. Lose 1 health unless you pay [2694d0]1 move[-].

960.text: Gain X boost on this card.

097.text: You touch one of the runecasters (there is one for each skill), and a pulse of light ripples outwards from its center seam. Each player gains 1 skill matching the rune you chose. You also gain 1 morale.

971.text: Gain a winter coat ([b]Item 929[/b]) or a large bedroll ([b]Item 1040[/b]).

098.action: [0b955e]CRAFT[-] a curio from the easily pliable roots
098.text: Your mind wanders as you carve, and you’re surprised to see what your subconscious created. Gain item [b]Item 1094[/b].

985.text: Replace this with a levitating cube ([b]Item 1010[/b]).

989.text: Replace this with a levitating cube ([b]Item 1010[/b]) or jetpack ([b]Item 1253[/b]).

099.action: [0b955e]PRAISE[-] the tour guide for their knowledge of ancient glyphs
099.text: The pink sentient seems to glow a little brighter at the compliment. They confide in you that they have a theory about the Great Collision that resulted in the origins of life on this world—they think it was aliens from outer space who crash-landed in the archipelago to the southeast of here. Gain ability [b]Item 1480[/b], 1 morale, and 1 boost.
